The company provides coal mining, overburden removal, coal hauling, waste removal, reclamation, and land rehabilitation services, as well as coal transportation and road maintenance services. It also engages in the rental of heavy equipment. PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Duta Pertiwi Nusantara Tbk
summary: PT Duta Pertiwi Nusantara Tbk engages in the glue, chemical, and mining businesses in Indonesia. It operates through two divisions, Glue Industry and Coal Mining. The company offers urea formaldehyde, phenol formaldehyde, urea melamine formaldehyde, and particle board glues and hardeners; semi-finished products, including formaldehyde; hardeners for producing plywood; and additives, such as emission bonding agents, etc. It is also involved in mining coal. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Pontianak, Indonesia. PT Duta Pertiwi Nusantara Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Dutapermana Makmur.

name: PT Dua Putra Utama Makmur Tbk
summary: PT Dua Putra Utama Makmur Tbk engages in the fisheries and trading businesses in Indonesia. Its fish products include Indian mackerel, black pomfret, narrow-barred Spanish mackerel, large-head hairtail, snapper, spotted sardine, moonfish, round scad, short-fin scad, bullet tuna, frigate tuna, skipjack tuna, trevally, barracuda, thread-fin bream, hard-tail scad, leather jacket, tuna, purple-spotted big eye, grouper, conger eel, emperor, parrotfish, lizardfish, banyar fish, hammer croaker, samge, swangi, bloso, lemadang, silago, grouper, pure-bred, deho, salem, splotch, salmon, trevally, badong, tuna, manyung, kuniran, milkfish, jahan, etc. The company also provides shrimp products comprising white, black tiger, sea tiger, pink, flower, and vannamei shrimps; and squids, cuttlefish, and octopus. In addition, it offers processed food, including marugoto, ebi furay, ebi fritter, katsu ball squid and shrimp, nugget shrimp, squid nugget and beef, and shrimp steak and meatballs. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Pati, Indonesia. PT Dua Putra Utama Makmur Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Pandawa Putra Investama.

name: PT Dharma Samudera Fishing Industries Tbk
summary: PT Dharma Samudera Fishing Industries Tbk, together with its subsidiary, engages in collecting, processing, marketing, and trading of fishing products in Indonesia. The company provides fish fillet, red snapper, grouper, tuna, king fish, octopus, cuttlefish, barramundi, malabar snapper, squid, and other products. It offers its products under the Daruma, April Spring, Pacific Sun, Indo Gold, Pacific Fresh, Lucky Doll, Malacca, Sumatera, Fantastic, and Magenta brands, as well as exports its products to Japan, Europe, the United States, and internationally. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Dharma Samudera Fishing Industries Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Marina Berkah Investama.

name: PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk
summary: PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk engages in the forestry, agriculture and plantation, transportation, plant construction, service, and trading industries in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Palm Oil, Wood Products, and Others. The company plants, produces, and sells palm oil products, including crude palm oil, palm kernel, and palm kernel oil. It also provides various wood products, such as block boards and plywood, as well as panels and engineered floors. As of December 31, 2019, the company had 112,450 hectares of planted areas of palm oil plantations. It also exports its products to Europe, Central America, Canada, Japan, Asia, and the Middle East. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Dian Swastatika Sentosa Tbk
summary: PT Dian Swastatika Sentosa Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the power generation, trading, coal mining and trading, multimedia, forestry, and infrastructure businesses. It operates through Supply of Steam and Electricity, Fertilizer and Chemicals Trading, Rent, and Coal Mining and Trading segments. The company operates 4 units of captive power plants located in Tangerang, Serang, Karawang-1, and Karawang-2 with a total capacity of 600 megawatts. It also offers research and development, and management consulting services; trades in chemicals, pesticides, and fertilizers; and engages in the pulp and wood chip mill activities. In addition, the company provides pay TV and Internet service provider services; and venture capital and management services. It also operates in Indonesia, China, India, Korea, Spain, Thailand, Cambodia, and Dubai. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Dian Swastatika Sentosa Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Sinar Mas Tunggal.

name: PT Jaya Bersama Indo Tbk
summary: PT Jaya Bersama Indo Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates various Chinese restaurants in Indonesia. It operates 31 restaurant outlets primarily under the brand names of The Duck King Group, Fook Yew, and Panda Bowl. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in West Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Jaya Bersama Indo Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Asia Kuliner Sejahtera.

name: PT Duta Pertiwi Tbk
summary: PT Duta Pertiwi Tbk primarily engages in the real estate business in Indonesia. The company operates through Real Estate, Property, Hotel, and Information Technology segments. It offers houses, shop houses, condominiums, apartments, office buildings, shopping centers, and other buildings, as well as land; and rents real estate properties. It also operates hotels and a recreation arena; and provides information technology services. PT Duta Pertiwi Tbk was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Duta Pertiwi Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk.

name: PT Darya-Varia Laboratoria Tbk
summary: PT Darya-Varia Laboratoria Tbk engages in the manufacture and trading of pharmaceutical products and cosmetics in Indonesia and internationally. It operates in three segments: Prescription Drugs, Consumer Health Products, and Export and Toll Manufacturing Services. It provides various prescription and consumer health products in antibiotic, antiparasit, antiseptic, anti-fungal, cough and cold, cardiology, central nervous system, gastro-hepatology, somatic, vitamin and food supplement, women healthcare, ear healthcare, and derma medic areas. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Darya-Varia Laboratoria Tbk is a subsidiary of Blue Sphere Singapore Pte. Ltd.

name: PT Dwi Guna Laksana Tbk
summary: PT Dwi Guna Laksana Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the coal mining and trading activities in Indonesia. It also offers port, crushing, loading, and barging services. The company has a concession area of 412.8 hectares located in the Jilatan Village, district of Batu Ampar, Regency of Tanah Laut, South Kalimantan. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Banjarmasin, Indonesia. PT Dwi Guna Laksana Tbk is a subsidiary of Hawthorn-Capital Investment Pte. Ltd.

name: PT Dyandra Media International Tbk
summary: PT Dyandra Media International Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides event solutions in Indonesia. The company organizes events and exhibitions; and provides supporting events. It also operates venues and halls, including convention and exhibition halls; and hotels. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Dyandra Media International Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Teletransmedia.

name: PT Eastparc Hotel Tbk
summary: PT Eastparc Hotel Tbk owns and operates hotels in Indonesia. It operates Eastparc Hotel, a 5 star hotel with 189 guestrooms located in Yogyakarta. PT Eastparc Hotel Tbk is based in Yogyakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Electronic City Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Electronic City Indonesia Tbk engages in the trade of electronic goods in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Sales of Branded Electronic Goods, Rents, and Others. The company offers audio-video products, such as televisions, brackets, television antennas, speakers, karaoke monitors, subwoofers, and amplifiers; home appliances, including vacuum cleaners, cooker hoods, dispensers, water heaters, washing machines, refrigerators, freezers, showcase refrigerators, air conditioners, fans, and air purifiers; camera and office equipment comprising cameras, memory cards, camera lens, tripods, handycams, printers, ink/cartridges, projectors, tripod screens, and telephones; and information technology and gadgets consisting mobile phones, tablets, smartwatches, accessories, laptops, mouse, USB, adapters, keyboards, PlayStation, PlayStation controllers, and PlayStation games. It also provides mom and baby products, such as tableware, food baby makers, bags, toys, and strollers, as well as various electronic and non-electronic products; small appliances, including rice cookers, blenders, ovens, electric kettles, mixers, juicers, stoves, choppers, electric iron, hair dryers, hair straighteners, shavers, hair clippers, digital thermometers, blood pressure monitors, nebulizers, oximeters, digital scales, and massage guns; and electric vehicles comprising electric bicycles and electric motorcycles. In addition, the company offers electronic city store services; and engages in the property and retail business. It sells its products through online sales channel, as well as through stores. PT Electronic City Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Indointernet Tbk.
summary: PT. Indointernet Tbk, a digital solutions company, provides information and communication technology infrastructure services in Indonesia. It offers connectivity, network managed, IT managed, data center, and cloud services. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Tangerang Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Ekadharma International Tbk
summary: PT Ekadharma International Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and markets self-adhesive tapes in Indonesia and Malaysia. The company offers aluminum foil, anti-slip, cloth, double foam, double side, Kraft, masking, metalizing, OPP, OPP printing, PVC electrical insulation, and stationery tapes; stretch films; epoxy, water, and white glues; and glue sticks under the DAIMARU, SUPERFIX, and EKATAPE brands. It is also involved in the trading of carton sealers and stretch wrappers. The company was formerly known as PT Ekadharma Widya Grafika and changed its name to PT Ekadharma International Tbk in 2006. PT Ekadharma International Tbk was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Ekadharma International Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Ekadharma Inti Perkasa.

name: PT Elnusa Tbk
summary: PT Elnusa Tbk provides oil and gas services in Indonesia. The company operates through Integrated Upstream Oil and Gas Services; Oil and Gas Support Services; and Energy Distribution and Logistics Services segments. It offers geophysical/seismic data measurement services, such as seismic and non-seismic data acquisition, and seismic data processing; and drilling and oilfield services, including drilling, hydraulic workover, coiled tubing, cementing and pumping, drilling fluid, drilling evaluation, electric wireline logging, surface well testing and drill stem testing, mud logging and H2S, slick line, artificial lift, operation and maintenance, enhance oil recovery, and well plug and abandonment. The company also provides data licensing solutions, data access services, and integrated data management solutions; and integrated storage system, online helpdesk, mobile storage services, delivery, health safety security environment system, and electrical power backup services. In addition, it offers threading services; logistic and marine support services for field operation, such as tug boat, crew boat, and accommodation work barges, as well as rents multipurpose barges; and services for mining and general businesses. Further, PT Elnusa Tbk engages in transportation, depot, and trading business; operates fuel and LPG filling stations; and distributes and trades in oil, gas, and chemicals. The company was formerly known as PT Electronika Nusantara and changed its name to PT Elnusa Tbk in September 1969. PT Elnusa Tbk was founded in 1969 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Elnusa Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Pertamina (Persero).

name: PT Bakrieland Development Tbk
summary: PT Bakrieland Development Tbk. operates as an integrated property company in Indonesia. The company develops and sells land, housing, apartment/condominium, and office spaces; rents and manages office, spaces, and courts; manages the shopping centers and theme park; and operates hotels. It is also involved in the construction, trading, investment, and refinancing businesses; and the management of recreation and tourism areas, a sport center, buildings, apartments, and residential areas. In addition, the company provides food and beverage services. The company was formerly known as PT Elang Realty Tbk. and changed its name to PT Bakrieland Development Tbk. in April 1997. PT Bakrieland Development Tbk. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Megapolitan Developments Tbk
summary: PT Megapolitan Developments Tbk operates as a property development company in Indonesia. It develops shopping centers, housing estates, commercial districts, and business centers. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Megapolitan Developments Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Cosmopolitan Persada Developments.

name: PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi Tbk
summary: PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi Tbk, through its subsidiaries, provides media, information technology, connectivity, and other services in Indonesia. The company operates in three segments: Media, Solutions, and Others. The Media segment is involved in free-to-air television broadcasting business through 3 television channels, including PT Indosiar Visual Mandiri, PT Surya Citra Televisi, and PT Omni Intivision, as well as film, video production, megaportal website, and digital publishing businesses. The Solutions segment provides a range of infrastructure solutions and services that include telecommunications and networking, banking software and hardware, integrated very small aperture terminal solutions, and telecommunication's retail distribution solutions. The Others segment offers connectivity services, such as internet, DVBT pay TV, and wireless broadband services; and medical service, as well as engages in fintech and other businesses. The company is also involved in trading of medical equipment, leasing of broadcasting and film studios, trading of multimedia film and content, content management and production, ad based video-on demand and subscription video-on demand, and online media businesses; and provision of tower lease, management, information technology, tourism, artist management, and outdoor media advertising services. PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi Tbk was founded in 1983 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk
summary: PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk, an upstream oil and gas company, engages in the exploration, development, production, and trading of crude oil and natural gas in Indonesia and Mozambique. It has interests in oil and gas properties located in Kangean Island, East Java province, Riau, North Sumatra, and East Kalimantan provinces. PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: Waran Seri I Morenzo Abadi Perk
PT Morenzo Abadi Perkasa Tbk
summary: PT Morenzo Abadi Perkasa engages in the processing and export of seafood to various countries. It offers a range of products from pasteurized crabmeat to frozen seafood, such as squid, shrimp, soft shell crab, octopus, cuttlefish, etc. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Demak, Indonesia.

name: PT Megalestari Epack Sentosaraya Tbk
summary: PT Megalestari Epack Sentosaraya Tbk engages in plastic packaging business in Indonesia. The company is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Megalestari Epack Sentosaraya Tbk is a subsidiary of ePac Flexibles Asia Pte. Ltd.

name: PT Enseval Putera Megatrading Tbk
summary: PT Enseval Putera Megatrading Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the distribution and supply of pharmaceutical products in Indonesia. The company operates in three segments: Pharmaceutical, Consumer Products, and Others. It also trades in medical and laboratory equipment and supplies; operates health care clinics; and offers dental and other equipment, as well as calibration services. In addition, the company engages in the trading of raw materials for pharmaceutical products; consumable products for hemodialysis therapy; and food and beverages. Further, it offers warehousing services, including chiller, cool, and ambient rooms, as well as container chiller as facilities. The company was formerly known as PT Arya Gupta Cempaka and changed its name to PT Enseval Putera Megatrading Tbk in August 1993. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Enseval Putera Megatrading Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Kalbe Farma Tbk.

name: PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk
summary: PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk imports, distributes, and retails mobile telecommunication products in Indonesia. The company offers mobile phones and tablets, subscriber identity module cards, prepaid mobile vouchers, accessories, Internet of Things devices, and Google Play gift cards; computers and other electronic devices; and trades in medical equipment, as well as provides value added services, including mobile phones protection and cellphone leasing services. It also engages in information technology system; management consulting; outsourcing; and property businesses. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in West Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Eralink International.

name: PT Eratex Djaja Tbk
summary: PT Eratex Djaja Tbk manufactures and sells garments in Indonesia and internationally. It is involved in spinning, weaving, dyeing, finishing, printing, false twisting, and knitting. The company's products include jeans, casual dress pants, denims, and Italian twills. It is also involved in the general trading business. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia. PT Eratex Djaja Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Buana Indah Garment.

name: PT Sinergi Inti Plastindo Tbk
summary: PT Sinergi Inti Plastindo Tbk provides plastic packaging products in Indonesia and internationally. It offers low and high density polyethylene products, such as T-shirt bags, soft loop handle bags, poly draw bags, and patch handle bags. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Sinergi Inti Plastindo Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Tanindo Omega Pasifik.

name: PT Surya Esa Perkasa Tbk
summary: PT Surya Esa Perkasa Tbk engages in purification and processing of natural gas in Indonesia. The company operates through LPG Refinery, Ammonia, and Others segments. It offers LPG primarily for use as a kitchen appliance fuel for homes, shopping centers, and hotels; and motor vehicle fuel, as well as for construction industries such as steel workshop as welding fuel. The company also provides propane; condensate for use as a raw material for thinner, glue, and vehicle tires applications, as well as light naphtha, which is a cracker material for the manufacture of polyethylene; and ammonia that is used as a raw material for fertilizer production, pharmaceutical, food and beverage, textile, industrial and household cleaning, water and wastewater treatment, metallurgical processes, pulp and paper, leather, rubber, and other applications.In addition, it offers management and business consulting services; operates an ammonia plant; and sells raw feed gas through pipelines. PT Surya Esa Perkasa Tbk was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Esta Multi Usaha Tbk
summary: PT Esta Multi Usaha Tbk owns and operates a hotel under the Hotel 88 name in Indonesia. The company's Hotel 88 operates a total of 70 rooms located in Bekasi City. It also engages in the rental of shops, as well as rental and trade of passenger cars. The company was formerly known as PT Esta Asri Propertindo and changed its name to PT Esta Multi Usaha Tbk in September 2019. PT Esta Multi Usaha Tbk was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in South Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Esta Multi Usaha Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Esta Utama Corpora.

name: PT Ever Shine Tex Tbk
summary: PT Ever Shine Tex Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells synthetic yarns and fabrics in Indonesia. The company's Yarn division offers nylon filament, draw textured, air textured, micro, high stretch, dope dyed, and melange and special yarns, as well as polyester high stretch and air textured yarns under the PRS brand for use in various industries, such as circular and warp knitting, elastic, embroidery, fancy yarn, fashion garments, gloves, labels, lingerie, ribbons, sewing threads, socks and hosiery, and sweater. Its Fabric division provides nylon, polyester, and nylon/polyester blended woven fabrics, as well as warp knitting fabrics for garment and lifestyle industries. It also produces special applications fabrics for use in automotive, home furnishings, and outdoor industries, including decorations, furniture, outdoor tents, sleeping bags, car seat covers, and others. The company offers its products under the APL 10000, APOLLO, HUT 1080, DECOTEX, LININGTEX, and PRO-COTTON brand names. It also exports its products. PT Ever Shine Tex Tbk was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Ever Shine Tex Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Cahaya Interkontinental.

name: PT XL Axiata Tbk
summary: PT XL Axiata Tbk provides telecommunication, telecommunications network, and multimedia services for consumers and businesses in Indonesia. The company offers cellular mobile and closed fixed network, Internet service provider, voice over Internet protocol, content provider, money remitter service, e-money issuance services, and Internet interconnection services. It also provides leased line, VPN MPLS, corporate Internet, and voice over Internet protocol services; mobile data and home broadband services; data center and cloud services; mobile communication services; and mobile advertising and big data services, such as messaging services, display services, and digital rewards, as well as Internet of Things based solutions. The company was formerly known as PT Excelcomindo Pratama Tbk. and changed its name to PT XL Axiata Tbk in 2009. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT XL Axiata Tbk is a subsidiary of Axiata Investments (Indonesia) Sdn. Bhd.

name: PT FAP Agri Tbk
summary: PT FAP Agri Tbk operates as an agricultural producing company in Indonesia. It processes and produces palm oil and other related products. The company is based in West Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Fast Food Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Fast Food Indonesia Tbk engages in the food and restaurant activities in Indonesia. It holds rights to establish and operate Kentucky Fried Chicken and Taco Bell franchise outlets. The company was incorporated in 1978 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT MD Pictures Tbk
summary: PT MD Pictures Tbk produces and distributes films and videos in Indonesia. It is also involved in the studio rental and shooting equipment rental activities. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT MD Pictures Tbk is a subsidiary of PT MD Graha Utama.

name: Waran Seri I Fimperkasa Utama T
PT Fimperkasa Utama Tbk
summary: PT Fimperkasa Utama Tbk engages in the construction service business in Indonesia. Its portfolio of services cover building and residential construction comprising residential homes, estates, apartments, mini buildings, sport centers, and school buildings; commercial and industrial constructions, such as shophouses and offices, buildings and facilities, factories, warehouses, facilities and infrastructure, and industrial area; and civil and infrastructure constructions, including land preparation, highways, bridges and flyovers, parking areas, and dams/reservoirs. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia.

name: PT Alfa Energi Investama Tbk
summary: PT Alfa Energi Investama Tbk, through its subsidiaries, engages in the coal mining and trading business in Indonesia. The company holds interests in a concession with approximately 2,089 hectares located in Kutai Kartanegara, East Kalimantan; and a concession with approximately 6,000 hectares located in West Kutai, East Kalimantan. It also provides coal mining management services. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT FKS Multi Agro Tbk
summary: PT FKS Multi Agro Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, supplies food and feed ingredients in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Trading and Distribution, Manufacturing, and Logistic. The company engages in the wholesale trading of various goods, which includes canola seed, millet, and canary seed; food and beverages consisting rice flour, tapioca flour, caramel, shrimp crackers, pet food, and animal feed; and agriculture yields, as well as rice, corn, un-hulled rice, wheat, secondary crops, and other cereals; and other agricultural products and live animals. It also offers fishery products, such as fish, shrimp, crabs, oysters, pearls, clams, seaweed, sponges and frogs, and fish seeds; vegetable oils and fats; pharmaceuticals; and fish meal and oil products. In addition, the company provides business advisory services; purchases, sells, leases, and operates properties, such as apartment, residential, and non-residential buildings; warehousing and storage services; and cold storage services. Further, it provides fermented and non-fermented soybean products; oilseed meals include soybean meals and rapeseed meals; grain milling co-products, consisting dried distiller's grains soluble, wheat bran, and corn gluten meal and feed products; and logistics services, including port logistics, warehouse management, transport, and distribution services, as well as bulk handling and product packaging services. Additionally, the company involved in the development and management of industrial zones; and provision of loading and unloading services. It serves aquaculture and animal feed industries, and food processors. The company was formerly known as PT Fishindo Kusuma Sejahtera Tbk and changed its name to PT FKS Multi Agro Tbk in June 2006. PT FKS Multi Agro Tbk was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT FKS Multi Agro Tbk is a subsidiary of PT FKS Corporindo Indonesia.

name: PT Hotel Fitra International Tbk
summary: PT Hotel Fitra International Tbk owns and operates hotels in Indonesia. The company operates Fitra Hotel, a three-star hotel with 113 rooms located in Majalengka. It also provides travel and tourism services. The company is based in Majalengka, Indonesia.

name: PT Fortune Mate Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Fortune Mate Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the provision of real estate development and construction services in Indonesia. It is also involved in trading and professional activities. The company's project portfolio includes land, residential, office, and industrial properties. PT Fortune Mate Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1989 and is based in Surabaya, Indonesia.

name: PT Sentra Food Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Sentra Food Indonesia Tbk, through its subsidiary, PT Kemang Food Industries, engages in the processing and trading of meat products in Indonesia. It operates through Processed Meat and Fresh Meat (Raw) segments. The company offers meat products, such as sausages, burgers, meatballs, and delicatessens; specialty products, including kebabs and dried beef; and mayonnaise and thousand island sauces. It sells its products under the Kemfood brand. The company was formerly known as PT Sentra Darmaga and changed its name to PT Sentra Food Indonesia Tbk in August 2018. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Sentra Food Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Super Capital Indonesia.

name: PT Fortune Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Fortune Indonesia Tbk provides integrated advertising and public relations services in Indonesia. The company engages in consulting services; marketing and production communication strategies; planning and implementation consulting services; exhibition and interactive audio-visual services, including multimedia and event management; consulting and implementation of virtual communication services, including cyberspace communications; and planning and implementation of above-the-line medium media advertising shopping, including electronic, digital, and print, as well as below-the-line media, such as outdoor media, and media monitoring and analysis services. It also provides crisis management, investor relations, media relations, government relations, corporate, investigation, supervision marketing, and marketing intelligence and analysis. In addition, the company offers advertising, digital, and media services; and brand consultancy, media intelligence, creative communications, social marketing, and social media services. Further, it provides public relations-based integrated communication solutions; graphic design; and integrated marketing communication services, including media specialist, creative agency, and sports marketing services. The company was founded in 1970 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Fortune Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of Imr Asia Holding Pte Ltd.

name: PT Lotte Chemical Titan Tbk
summary: PT Lotte Chemical Titan Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, produces and distributes polyethylene products in Indonesia. It produces high density polyethylene, low density polyethylene, and linear low density polyethylene products; and polypropylene homopolymers, and polypropylene random and impact copolymers, as well as imports BOPP films. The company is also involved in the wholesale trade of polyethylene and polypropylene. The company was formerly known as P.T. Titan Kimia Nusantara Tbk and changed its name to PT Lotte Chemical Titan Tbk in April 2013. PT Lotte Chemical Titan Tbk was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Lotte Chemical Titan Tbk is a subsidiary of Lotte Chemical Titan International Sdn. Bhd.

name: PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk
summary: PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides telecommunication services in Indonesia. The company develops, builds, owns, operates, leases, and maintains facilities and network to operate telecommunications network and services, as well as information and convergence technology services; imports, trades in, distributes, and sells telecommunication goods, equipment, and/or products; and provides after sales services for telecommunication goods, equipment, and/or products. It also offers multimedia products and related services, including voice services, data/image, and other mobile commercial services; electronic money services; and payment services, and/or domestic and international money remittance services. The company was formerly known as PT Mobile-8 Telecom Tbk and changed its name to PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk in March 2011. PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Fuji Finance Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Fuji Finance Indonesia Tbk operates as a multi-finance and leasing company in Indonesia. The company offers investment finance for various industrial machineries and equipment, such as power plant equipment comprising generators and compressors, etc.; heavy equipment, including excavators, bulldozers, and forklifts; and various vehicles, such as trucks and buses. It also provides working capital financing for purchasing raw material/inventory and cashflow for operation or services; multipurpose financing for procurement of goods or services; invoice financing and factoring; bridging and mezzanine financing; and renewable/green financing for solar power systems. The company was formerly known as PT Jaya Fuji Leasing Pratama and changed its name to PT Fuji Finance Indonesia Tbk in July 2018. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Fuji Finance Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of Indovalue Capital Asset Management Ltd.

name: PT Aksara Global Development Tbk
summary: PT Aksara Global Development Tbk develops real estate properties in Indonesia. The company operates through Apartments and Houses segments. Its property portfolio includes land, apartments, shop houses, houses, and other properties. The company also constructs buildings, bridges, roads, docks, housing buildings, schools, recreational parks, market or modern markets, hospitals, and other buildings; and offers consultation service in the areas of business and management, property, architecture, landscape, design and interior, civil, property agent, and others. In addition, it is involved in export and import, and wholesale trading activities; and the manufacture of building materials and construction tools. PT Aksara Global Development Tbk serves middle-class income families in second-tier cities and urban areas. The company was formerly known as PT Gading Development Tbk. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Gunawan Dianjaya Steel Tbk
summary: PT Gunawan Dianjaya Steel Tbk produces and sells hot rolled steel plates in Indonesia. It offers steel plates for general use, such as low carbon structural steel plates and high strength low alloy structural steel plates; steel plates for boilers and pressure vessels; and steel plates for ship building, including mild steels and high tensile steels. The company also exports its products. PT Gunawan Dianjaya Steel Tbk was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia.

name: PT Goodyear Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Goodyear Indonesia Tbk manufactures, imports, exports, distributes, wholesale tires for vehicles, motorbikes, airplanes and other related components. The company was formerly known as NV The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company Limited and changed its name to PT Goodyear Indonesia Tbk in July 1978. The company was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Bogor, Indonesia. PT Goodyear Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company.

name: PT Gema Grahasarana Tbk
summary: PT Gema Grahasarana Tbk operates as an interior contractor and furniture manufacturer in Indonesia and internationally. It offers a range of products and services, such as interior fit-outs, furniture and panel manufacturing, mechanical and electrical installation, maintenance, and logistics. The company also manufactures and sells customized, modular, home and office, and hospitality furniture. In addition, the company is involved in trading laminated material interior and furniture; house, and office furniture and equipment; and interior and furniture components. It serves banking and financial institutions; oil, gas, and mining, as well as retail and hospitality industries; and multinational company and others. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in West Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Gema Grahasarana Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Virucci Indogriya Sarana.

name: Golden Energy and Resources Limited
summary: Golden Energy and Resources Limited is a resources company focused on the exploration, mining, and marketing of thermal coal. The company operates primarily in Indonesia, with significant coal reserves. Golden Energy and Resources aims to become a leading coal producer in the region.

name: PT Gudang Garam Tbk
summary: PT Gudang Garam Tbk produces and sells cigarettes in Indonesia and internationally. The company operates through Cigarettes, Paperboards, and Others segments. It offers hand-rolled, machine-made, and klobot clove cigarettes. The company markets its products under the Gudang Garam Family, Surya Family, and GG Family brand names. It is also involved in trading activities. In addition, the company provides non-scheduled air transportation and entertainment services. The company was formerly known as PT Perusahaan Rokok Tjap √Ç¬ìGudang Garam√Ç¬î Kediri. PT Gudang Garam Tbk was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Kediri, Indonesia. PT Gudang Garam Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Suryaduta Investama.

name: PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk
summary: PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk produces and sells steel products in Indonesia and internationally. The company offers slabs, blooms, beam blanks, and billets; coil plates and derivatives; and steel profiles and derivatives, as well as hot steel coils and steel plates. It serves bridge, building, and other projects. The company was formerly known as PT Gunung Naga Mas and changed its name to PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk in 1991. PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia. PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk is a subsidiary of Orientstar Pte. Ltd.

name: PT Gihon Telekomunikasi Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Gihon Telekomunikasi Indonesia Tbk provides telecommunications tower leasing services in Indonesia. The company is involved in the engineering, design, construction, installation, and network integration of telecommunication Industry. It also provides telecommunications infrastructure services, including maintenance, operation, and maintenance of sites and networks. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Gihon Telekomunikasi Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk.

name: PT. Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk
summary: PT. Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk provides airline services in Indonesia and internationally. It operates through Flight Operation, Aircraft Maintenance Services, and Other Operations segments. The company undertakes the scheduled and non-scheduled commercial air transportation for passengers, cargoes, and mail. It also offers aircraft repair and maintenance, as well as catering services and ground handling services, passenger services, information system services, and other services; ticketing and aircraft rental services; aircraft maintenance and overhaul; and hotel services. PT. Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk was founded in 1949 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Gajah Tunggal Tbk
summary: PT. Gajah Tunggal Tbk produces and distributes tires for passenger cars, SUVs, commercial vehicles, off-the-road vehicles, industrial vehicles, and motorcycles. It also manufactures and sells other rubber related products, such as synthetic rubber, tire cords, inner tube, flap, o-ring, and other products, as well as nylon filament yarn, polyester chips as raw materials for nylon cord, and fishing net yarn. In addition, the company engages in general trading activities. It markets its products in Indonesia, the United States, Asia, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, Australia, and Oceania. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Global Teleshop Tbk
summary: PT Global Teleshop Tbk engages in the retail and distribution of cellular phones and operator products in Indonesia. It operates through Cellular Phones, Reload vouchers, Content, and Other segments. The company offers smart phones, tablets, computers, audio products, wearable devices, gadget accessories, and lifestyle and travel products, and fashion and accessories. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated 43 Global Teleshop outlets and service centers. The company was formerly known as PT Pro Empower Perkasa. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT Global Teleshop Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Trikomsel Oke Tbk.

name: PT Galva Technologies Tbk
summary: PT Galva Technologies Tbk supplies electronic products in Indonesia. The company operates through Business Solutions, IT Distribution, and Printing Solutions segments. It primarily sells computers, printers, displays, and audio-video equipment. The company also sells broadcasting products, audio visual and media products, PA and communication products, professional audio and lighting products, digital signage products, security systems, projectors, and accessories. In addition, it offers system integration, design, installation, integration, maintenance, and engineering support services; and a range of hardware and business process solutions, including scanning, archiving, document management, and managed print services, as well as distributes software. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT Galva Technologies Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Elsiscom Prima Karya.

name: PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia Tbk
summary: PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia Tbk provides various aircraft maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) services for aircraft, engines, and components in Africa, Asia, Australia, America, Europe, and Oceania. The company operates through three segments: Repairs and Overhauls, Line Maintenance, and Other Operations. Its MRO services include line maintenance, base maintenance, airframe, component, engineering, material and logistics, cabin maintenance, engine and APU maintenance, learning center, power, and aircraft support, as well as technical ground handling. The company was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk.

name: PT Gowa Makassar Tourism Development Tbk
summary: PT Gowa Makassar Tourism Development Tbk engages in the real estate and urban development activities in Indonesia. It operates in two segments, Real Estate and Supporting. The company develops residential and commercial buildings, hotels, recreational facilities, and non-commercial supporting facilities; and planned areas, facilities, and infrastructure. It also provides ready-to-build land for consumers; and services related to township management, as well as manages built facilities and infrastructure. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Makassar, Indonesia.

name: PT Visi Telekomunikasi Infrastruktur Tbk
summary: PT Visi Telekomunikasi Infrastruktur Tbk provides telecommunication infrastructure services in Indonesia. It offers general telecommunication; telecommunication equipment maintenance; multimedia and utilization; procurement of telecommunication human resources; tower and telecommunication equipment leasing; transportation; and base transceiver station tower leasing and management services, as well as consultation services for the telecommunication and electrical sectors. The company also provides leasing and management services for buildings, office and retail spaces, apartment rooms, and condominiums; and consultation services for management, administration business, business development, and investment strategy, as well as for the construction sector. In addition, it invests in other companies. The company was formerly known as PT Golden Retailindo Tbk and changed its name to PT Visi Telekomunikasi Infrastruktur Tbk in August 2016. PT Visi Telekomunikasi Infrastruktur Tbk was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Visi Telekomunikasi Infrastruktur Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Tower Bersama Infrastruktur Tbk.

name: PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk
summary: PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk provides snacks and beverages in Indonesia. The company operates through Snack Foods, Beverages, and Others segments. It offers biscuits, peanuts, bread, chocolates, ready-to-drink drinks, confectioneries, and milk processing products; and snacks, such as atomic, salted, sukro, and crunchy peanuts, as well as foods made from soybeans and other nuts. The company also exports its products. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Tudung Putra Putri Jaya.

name: PT Perdana Gapuraprima Tbk
summary: PT Perdana Gapuraprima Tbk develops real estate properties in Indonesia. The company develops shopping centers, offices, apartments, hotels, condotels, houses, commercial, and mixed used projects. It also engages in planning and supervising housing and building development activities, as well as purchasing and selling of buildings and land rights. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Perdana Gapuraprima Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Citraabadi Kotapersada.

name: PT Equity Development Investment Tbk
summary: PT Equity Development Investment Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides insurance products and services in Indonesia. The company operates through four segments: Insurance; Financing; Securities and Stock Administration; and Equity Participation, Travel Services, and Venture Capital. It offers general insurance products, such as fire, motor vehicles, accident, marine hull, engineering, and marine cargo; and life insurance products, including whole life, term insurance, health assurance, unitized pensions, unit link, pure endowment pensions, mortgage reduction term allowance, and combined endowments, as well as provides reinsurance services. The company also provides financial lease, consumer financing, and factoring services, as well as health insurance and pension fund; operates as an underwriter, broker, investment manager, and advisor; and offers venture capital services. In addition, it offers travel services; insurance brokerage services; share registrar services; mutual funds; and administration and health services. The company was formerly known as PT Gajah Surya Arta Leasing. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Equity Development Investment Tbk is a subsidiary of Equity Global International Limited.

name: PT Greenwood Sejahtera Tbk
summary: PT Greenwood Sejahtera Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, develops real estate properties in Indonesia. It is also involved in the sale and rental of apartments, shopping centers, and offices; and operation of a hotel. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Greenwood Sejahtera Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Prima Permata Sejahtera.

name: PT Gozco Plantations Tbk
summary: PT Gozco Plantations Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, develops and operates oil palm plantations. It is also involved in the processing of crude palm oil and palm kernel; and production of fruit bunches for distribution in Indonesia. The company was formerly known as PT Surya Gemilang Sentosa and changed its name to PT Gozco Plantations Tbk in December 2007. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Himalaya Energi Perkasa Tbk
summary: PT Himalaya Energi Perkasa Tbk provides financial advisory services. The company offers offline and online trading services; underwriting services; and financial advisory services, such as corporate actions, including merger and acquisition, limited public offering, restructuring, and financing transaction. It also provides trade and debt syndication, and sector financing services. In addition, the company engages in the debt origination, underwriting, securitization, and trading of asset backed securities activities, such as the securitization of housing loans, commercial property, automobile, and credit card; and provision of marketing and distribution services for the products selling, government, corporate, sukuk, and Repo bonds for institutional investor clients, such as banks, pension funds, insurance companies, government agencies, cooperative employees, and financial institutions. Further, it provides liquefied petroleum gas refueling services. The company was formerly known as PT HD Capital Tbk. PT Himalaya Energi Perkasa Tbk was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Radana Bhaskara Finance Tbk
summary: PT Radana Bhaskara Finance Tbk primarily engages in consumer financing activities in Indonesia. The company provides financing services for new and second-hand motor vehicles. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 41 branch offices located in Jakarta, Bogor, Depok, Tangerang and Bekasi, West Java, Central Java, East Java, North Sumatera, Riau, and South Sumatera. The company was formerly known as PT HD Finance Tbk and changed its name to PT Radana Bhaskara Finance Tbk in June 2014. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. As of November 25, 2019, PT Radana Bhaskara Finance Tbk operates as a prior subsidiary of PT Tiara Marga Trakindo.

name: PT Hensel Davest Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Hensel Davest Indonesia Tbk engages in the financial technology and electronic commerce business in Indonesia. The company offers DavestPay mobile application for digital product purchase, billing payment, and ticket reservation. It also provides DoeKu, a platform that lends money in peer-to-peer lending market. In addition, the company engages in computer programming and consulting, finance consulting and insurance, guarantees, education, information, and financial services. PT Hensel Davest Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2013 and is based in Makassar, Indonesia. PT Hensel Davest Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Pt. Davest Investama Mandiri.

name: PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk
summary: PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk operates a network of general hospitals in Indonesia. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 37 hospitals comprising 8 type B hospitals and 29 type C hospitals. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Jaya Trishindo Tbk
summary: PT Jaya Trishindo Tbk provides business and private helicopter charter services in Indonesia. The company is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Hero Supermarket Tbk
summary: PT Hero Supermarket Tbk engages in the retail business primarily in Indonesia. It operates through Food and Non Food segments. The company operates supermarket, hypermarket, and specialty stores, including pharmacy, drugs stores, health and beauty stores, home furnishing stores, etc. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 22 Hero supermarkets, 100 Giant stores comprising Giant Ekspres and Giant Ekstra, 293 Guardian stores, and 2 IKEA stores. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in South Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Hero Supermarket Tbk is a subsidiary of Mulgrave Corporation B.V.

name: PT Hexindo Adiperkasa Tbk
summary: PT Hexindo Adiperkasa Tbk engages in the trading and rental of heavy equipment and related spare parts in Indonesia. It offers excavators, loading shovels, wheel loaders, rigid frame trucks, articulated dump trucks, used equipment, and consolidated solutions for construction sites; and a range of equipment to suit various industry solutions, such as mining, quarrying, general construction, demolition, recycling, and forestry. The company also provides various parts, such as lubricants, filters, undercarriages, O-ring kits for control valves, ground engaging tools, seal kits, and remanufactured components; and support services. It offers Hitachi, John Deere, Krupp, and Bell branded products. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Hexindo Adiperkasa Tbk is a subsidiary of Hitachi Construction Machinery Co. Ltd.

name: PT Humpuss Intermoda Transportasi Tbk.
summary: PT Humpuss Intermoda Transportasi Tbk., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the sea transportation and other related activities in Indonesia. The company operates through Chartered Vessels Services; and Crews and Vessel Management Services and Other Services divisions. It transports liquefied natural gas, crude and fuel oil, chemicals, containers, coal, and other sea cargoes. The company also provides vessel crews and management services to vessel owners, as well as charters vessels; and offshore support vessel, marine support, dredging, and human capital and development services. In addition, it engages in the energy distribution, crew training, and trading activities. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT HK Metals Utama Tbk
summary: PT HK Metals Utama Tbk manufactures and trades in building and household materials in Indonesia. It offers stainless steel accessories, aluminum coated steel and coil machineries and spare parts, PVC pipes, light steel products, toilet and sanitary wares, and other household materials. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia. PT HK Metals Utama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Hyamn Sukses Abadi.

name: PT Hanjaya Mandala Sampoerna Tbk
summary: PT Hanjaya Mandala Sampoerna Tbk manufactures and trades in cigarettes in Indonesia. The company engages in the general trading, property development, and expedition and warehousing businesses; e-commerce and agency activities; and the provision of leisure and golf services. It sells its products under the Dji Sam Soe, Sampoerna A, Sampoerna Kretek, and Sampoerna U brand names. The company was founded in 1913 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia. PT Hanjaya Mandala Sampoerna Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Philip Morris Indonesia.

name: PT Buyung Poetra Sembada Tbk
summary: PT Buyung Poetra Sembada Tbk produces and distributes rice in Indonesia. It supplies rice to supermarkets, hypermarkets, and other retail networks under the LIMAS, HOKI, Topi Koki, BPS, and Belida brand names; and broken rice to vermicelli plants. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Buyung Poetra Sembada Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Buyung Investama Gemilang.

name: PT Grand House Mulia Tbk
summary: PT Grand House Mulia Tbk engages in operating residential and commercial properties in Indonesia. It also offers property development consulting service. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Tangerang, Indonesia.

name: PT. Saraswati Griya Lestari Tbk
summary: PT. Saraswati Griya Lestari Tbk operates in the field of hospitality in Indonesia. It operates in two segments, Hotel and Property. It operates hotels, condotels, and resorts. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT. Saraswati Griya Lestari Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Tiara Realty.

name: PT Menteng Heritage Realty Tbk
summary: PT Menteng Heritage Realty Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, owns and operates hotels in Indonesia. The company owns The Hermitage, a hotel located in Menteng, Central Jakarta. It is also involved in mining; general trading and services; and sea and domestic transportation businesses. The company was formerly known as PT Citra Prestasi Abadi and changed its name to PT Menteng Heritage Realty Tbk in October 2007. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Menteng Heritage Realty Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Wijaya Wisesa Realty.

name: PT Hartadinata Abadi Tbk
summary: PT Hartadinata Abadi Tbk manufactures and sells gold jewelry products in Indonesia. The company offers necklaces, rings, pendants, earrings, and bracelets. It sells its products through its retail and online stores. The company also provides franchising opportunities for its stores. As of 31, December, 2019 the company operated 26 stores under the Aurum Colection Center (ACC) name, 3 outlets under the Claudia Perfect Jewelery name, and 3 outlets under the Celine Jewelery name. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Bandung, Indonesia. PT Hartadinata Abadi Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Terang Anugrah Abadi.

name: PT Harum Energy Tbk
summary: PT Harum Energy Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in coal mining and logistics activities in Indonesia. It operates through Coal Mining Sectors, Shipping Services, and Others Sectors divisions. The Coal Mining Sectors division is involved in the general survey, exploration, exploitation, transportation, processing, and sale of coal. The Shipping Services division engages in the transportation and rental of tugboats and barges. The Others Sectors division invests in coal mining, trading, and services businesses. The company also exports its products to China, South Korea, Japan, Taiwan, Hong Kong, India, Bangladesh, Thailand, the Philippines, Singapore, and Vietnam. The company was formerly known as PT Asia Antrasit and changed its name to PT Harum Energy Tbk in November 2007. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Harum Energy Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Karunia Bara Perkasa.

name: PT MNC Energy Investments Tbk
summary: PT MNC Energy Investments Tbk, an investment and holding company, engages in the trading and investment in the energy sector. It is involved in the coal mining; aircraft charter, repair, and maintenance; and nickel mining activities, as well as offers port services. The company was formerly known as PT Indonesia Transport & Infrastructure Tbk and changed its name to PT MNC Energy Investments Tbk in February 2022. PT MNC Energy Investments Tbk was founded in 1968 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Intan Baruprana Finance Tbk
summary: PT Intan Baruprana Finance Tbk operates as a finance company in Indonesia. The company provides finance leasing, consumer financing, and factoring services. It offers financing for new and second-hand capital goods, including heavy equipment, transport equipment and commercial vehicles, shipping equipment, industrial machines, medical equipment, and other supporting facilities. The company also engages in the sale and leaseback financing activities. It provides financing to plantation, infrastructure, mining, transportation, gas and oil, forestry, aquaculture, health, hospitality, and other sectors. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Intan Baruprana Finance Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Intraco Penta Tbk.

name: PT Inti Bangun Sejahtera Tbk
summary: PT Inti Bangun Sejahtera Tbk provides telecommunication network services in the Republic of Indonesia. It rents and maintains telecommunication towers. The company's products include Build to Suit (B2S), a rental space from the operator base to build the tower; co-location, a basic rental space; telecommunication infrastructure in the form of BTS Hotel; and microcell pole with fiber optic network. Its products also comprise Metro-E, a data network solution, which can be used to serve the bandwidth requirements of telecom operators; and Cluster Based, an integrated indoor and outdoor coverage service solution for wireless mobile service in clustered area with indoor and outdoor distributed antenna systems. PT Inti Bangun Sejahtera Tbk was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Indofood CBP Sukses Makmur Tbk
summary: PT Indofood CBP Sukses Makmur Tbk produces and sells consumers products in Indonesia and internationally. It offers noodles, sauces, and instant seasonings under the Indomie, Supermi, Sarimi, Pop Mie, Sakura, and Mi Telur Cap 3 Ayam brands. The company also provides sweetened condensed milk; UHT, sterilized bottled, and pasteurized liquid milk; powdered milk; ice cream; and butter under the Indomilk, Cap Enaak, Tiga Sapi, Kremer, Orchid Butter, Indoeskrim, Good To Go, and Milkuat brands. In addition, it offers chips and non-chips snacks under the Chitato, Qtela, Lays, Chiki, Cheetos, Jetz, Trenz, Wonderland, Dueto, Doritos brands; and food seasonings, including powdered and liquid seasonings, condiments, and syrups under the Sambal Indofood, Bumbu Special Indofood, Bumbu Racik, Indofood Freiss, Kecap Indofood, and Kecap Piring Lombok brands. Further, the company provides nutrition and special foods, such as baby cereals, follow-on cereals, noodle soups, and baby biscuits, as well as fortified milk for expectant and lactating mothers under the Promina, Sun, Govit, and Gowell brands. Additionally, it offers beverages comprising non-alcoholic beverage products, including tea, packaged water and fruit-flavored drinks, under the brands of Ichi Ocha, Club, and Fruitamin. The company also manufactures packaging materials; provides management consulting, general trading, and transportation services; processes oil and fats; markets and distributes paper diapers; and manages restaurants. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Indofood CBP Sukses Makmur Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk.

name: PT Island Concepts Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Island Concepts Indonesia Tbk engages in the provision of hospitality services in Indonesia. The company operates through three segments: Catering and Maintenance Services; Villa; and Sale of House and Lot and Condotel. It offers accommodation services; and rent rooms, cottages, and spa facilities. In addition, the company is involved in the provision of catering and urban facility maintenance for oil and gas and mining sectors; and property services, including offices, hotels, and housing, as well as its facilities. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Badung, Indonesia.

name: PT Indonesia Pondasi Raya Tbk
summary: PT Indonesia Pondasi Raya Tbk engages in piling, retaining wall, and ground improvement business in Indonesia. The company provides foundation construction services for various building and infrastructure projects, including housings, house of worships, hospitals, skyscrapers, roads, bridges, and underpasses. It also offers pile testing services comprising comprehensive, tension, integrity, and lateral tests; other foundation construction services, such as soil nailing and shotcrete, slurry wall, ground anchor, kingpost, bar coupler, dewatering, and excavation services; and operates concrete batching plant. In addition, the company provides precast walls; and machineries and equipment for piling, retaining walls, ground improvement, pile testing, and other foundation construction activities. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Indonesia Fibreboard Industry Tbk
summary: PT Indonesia Fibreboard Industry Tbk engages in the wood processing industry in Indonesia, Japan, the Middle East, and internationally. The company offers high, medium, and low density fibreboards; high moisture resistant wood products; veneer; plywood and plywood medium density fibreboard (MDF) products; and MDF laminated paper products. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Jakarta Utara, Indonesia. PT Indonesia Fibreboard Industry Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Adrindo Intiperkasa.

name: PT Ifishdeco Tbk
summary: PT Ifishdeco Tbk engages in the exploration and development of nickel ore properties. The company was founded in 1971 and is based in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Champion Pacific Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Champion Pacific Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells flexible packaging products in Indonesia and internationally. The company offers packaging products comprising laminated aluminum foils, laminated plastic films, and coated aluminum foils in the form of rolls, bags, and sheets for the pharmaceutical, food, cosmetics, agrochemical, and other industries. It also engages in management consulting services. The company was formerly known as PT Kageo Igar Jaya Tbk and changed its name to PT Champion Pacific Indonesia Tbk in October 2010. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia. PT Champion Pacific Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Kingsford Holdings.

name: PT Intikeramik Alamasri Industri Tbk
summary: PT Intikeramik Alamasri Industri Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, distributes, and sells porcelain tiles in Indonesia and internationally. The company operates in two segments, Ceramic Industry and Hotel Industry. It also engages in the hospitality business. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Era Mandiri Cemerlang Tbk
summary: PT Era Mandiri Cemerlang Tbk operates in the processing and trade sectors of fishery products in Indonesia and internationally. The company produces and supplies seafood products. It offers mahi-mahi, tuna, swordfish, oilfish, red snapper, grouper, and octopus products. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Era Mandiri Cemerlang Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Berkah Delapan Samudera.

name: PT Sumi Indo Kabel Tbk
summary: PT Sumi Indo Kabel Tbk manufactures and sells conductors, power and control cables, and automobile and telecommunication cables in Indonesia. The company provides bare conductor cables, fire resistance and flame retardant cables, armored and non-armored cables, and low and medium voltage cables of copper and aluminum. It also offers special products, including laminated aluminum polyethylene polyamid, low temperature, solar, bonding, and rolling stock cables; and low-voltage wires for batteries, earth bond low voltage wires, and vinyl insulated low voltage wires for automobiles, as well as steel wire amour cables for underground. The company was formerly known as PT IKI Indah Kabel Indonesia and changed its name to PT Sumi Indo Kabel Tbk in 1999. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Sumi Indo Kabel Tbk is a subsidiary of Sumitomo Electric Industries, Ltd.

name: PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk
summary: PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the integrated automotive business in Indonesia. The company operates through four segments: Automotive, Financial Services, Rental and Services, and Others. The company distributes vehicles and spare parts, as well as fuel; assembles vehicle; manufactures automotive parts/component; and provides after sales services, vehicle financing, car rental, used cars trading, logistics, non-formal education services, and other related supporting services, as well as acts as a trademark license holder. Its products include two-wheel and four-wheel vehicles, buses, trucks, and heavy equipment. The company offers products of Audi, Bandit, Datsun, HIAB, Hino, John Deere, Kalmar, KIA, Manitou, Nissan, Renault Trucks, SDLG, Suzuki, Volkswagen, Volvo Bus, Volvo Construction Equipment, and Volvo Trucks brands. In addition, it is involved in the rental and building management activities; operation of gas stations; mining, plantation, and forestry contracting business; industrial plantations management; and transportation and logistics businesses. Further, the company provides e-learning, manpower, and data processing services; and automotive services, such as dealership, workshop, and financing. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk is a subsidiary of Gallant Venture Ltd.

name: PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk
summary: PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides financial, and car rental and related services in Indonesia. The company offers various financing services; and vehicle rental, trucking, driver, and inspection services. It also sells fuel. The company was formerly known as PT Multi Tambang Abadi and changed its name to PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk in February 2013. PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk.

name: PT Impack Pratama Industri Tbk
summary: PT Impack Pratama Industri Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes building materials and plastic products in Indonesia and internationally. The company provides various roofing products, including polycarbonate, vinyl and vinyl composite, uPVC, and fiber reinforced polyester products; aluminum composite panels; sealants and adhesives; packaging products comprising corrugated PP sheet under the Impraboard brand name; and polymer resins, as well as rigid PVC compounds under the POLYVIC and CRYSTAL brands for use in blow molding, extrusion, and film and injection applications. It also develops and rents a business park in the Altira area. In addition, the company distributes plastic products, and adhesives materials or glue; and provides engineering, procurement, and construction services. PT Impack Pratama Industri Tbk was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Indofarma (Persero) Tbk
summary: PT Indofarma (Persero) Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and markets pharmaceutical products in Indonesia. The company manufactures, trades in, and distributes medicine and medical devices; extracts and herbals; and operates laboratory. It also provides devices and health services for prevention, control, and treatment of COVID-19. The company also exports its products. PT Indofarma (Persero) Tbk was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia. PT Indofarma (Persero) Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Bio Farma.

name: PT Indal Aluminium Industry Tbk
summary: PT Indal Aluminium Industry Tbk manufactures and distributes aluminium products in Indonesia. The company operates through four divisions: Aluminium Industry, Construction Services, Software Services, and General Trading and Investments. It offers architectural products, such as curtain walls, doors, windows, and aluminium composite panels; electronic and precision parts, including heat sinks and precision parts; and ladder products comprising household, tradesmen, heavy duty industrial, and level arc ladders, as well as planks. The company also provides other commodities, which include stainless steel water tanks; aluminium profiles for various parts of transportation, such as body frames and window frames of vans, trucks and other commercial vehicles; and aluminium-extruded products for office room partitions, as well as fabricates aluminium frames for showcases, picture frames, signage profiles, customized chairs, and tables, as well as aluminium solar frames and mounting systems. In addition, it offers constructing services for fa√É¬ßade design, supply, and installation; sells, maintains, and repairs ERP software; invests in aluminium and coating industries; and manufactures paints. The company also exports its products to Japan, Hong Kong, Thailand, Singapore, Australia, the United States, and other countries in Asia. PT Indal Aluminium Industry Tbk was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia.

name: PT Indo Komoditi Korpora Tbk
summary: PT Indo Komoditi Korpora Tbk engages rubber, dry jelutung, and maklon service businesses. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Intanwijaya Internasional Tbk
summary: PT Intanwijaya Internasional Tbk manufactures and sells formaldehyde and formaldehyde resin products primarily in Indonesia. The company offers formalin, urea formaldehyde resin, melamine urea formaldehyde resin, phenol formaldehyde resin, urea formaldehyde powder, hardener, catcher, and other products primarily for plywood, block board, and particle board industries. It is also involved in real estate business. The company exports its products. The company was formerly known as PT Intan Wijaya Chemical Industry and changed its name to PT Intanwijaya Internasional Tbk in June 2000. PT Intanwijaya Internasional Tbk was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in West Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Vale Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Vale Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the mining and processing of nickel in Indonesia. The company was formerly known as PT International Nickel Indonesia Tbk and changed its name to PT Vale Indonesia Tbk in September 2011. PT Vale Indonesia Tbk was incorporated in 1968 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk
summary: PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk produces and sells various food products in Indonesia and internationally. It operates through four segments: Consumer Branded Products Business Group, Bogasari Business Group, Agribusiness Group, and Distribution Business Group. The Consumer Branded Products Business Group segment offers noodles; dairy products, including sweetened condensed, temperature, sterilized bottled, pasteurized liquid, multi-cereal, and powdered milk, as well as butter, ice cream, and creamer; snack foods, such as potato, cassava, soybean, sweet potato, and various extruded snacks, as well as biscuits; culinary products and syrups; nutrition and special foods; and ready-to-drink tea, packaged water, and fruit-flavored drinks. The Bogasari Business Group segment produces flour and pasta. The Agribusiness Group segment produces palm oil, rubber, sugar cane, timber, cocoa, and tea; and manufactures and markets cooking oils, margarines, shortenings, and other by-products. The Distribution Business Group segment distributes third-party products. It is also involved in the shipping, investment, trade export agency, industrial estate, and restaurant chain management activities; ownership and management of buildings; and provision of management consulting, flour blending and trading, and research management and technical services, as well as packaging materials and fertilizers. In addition, it manufactures coffee; extracts and processes coconut oil; operates bulking station; provides transportation services; and markets and distributes paper diapers and packaged drinking water. The company was formerly known as PT Panganjaya Intikusuma and changed its name to PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk in 1994. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk is a subsidiary of First Pacific Investment Management Limited.

name: PT Royalindo Investa Wijaya Tbk
summary: PT Royalindo Investa Wijaya, through its subsidiaries, operates boarding facilities in Indonesia. The company operates two boarding facilities, including the PJ Mansion boarding house and Puri Cempaka 04 boarding house located in Central Jakarta. PT Royalindo Investa Wijaya was founded in 2005 and is based in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT. Indo-Rama Synthetics Tbk
summary: PT. Indo-Rama Synthetics Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells polyester, spun yarns, and fabrics in Indonesia, the rest of Asia, Europe, North America, South America, and internationally. It offers spun yarns, sewing threads, polyester filament yarns, polyester staple fiber, chips, pet resins, grey and finished polyester fabrics, nitrogen and phosphate fertilizers, polyethylene, polypropylene, polyester, textiles, cotton fiber, medical gloves, and polyester feedstocks. The company engages in trading, investment, and other activities; and management of office and school buildings. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1975 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT. Indo-Rama Synthetics Tbk is a subsidiary of Indorama Corporation Pte. Ltd.

name: PT Indospring Tbk
summary: PT Indospring Tbk manufactures and sells leaf and coil springs to the automotive industry in South East Asia. It offers parabolic, trailing, and yoko-oki leaf springs; and tension, compression, valve, and hot coil springs, as well as wire rings and stabilizer bars. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in Gresik, Indonesia. PT Indospring Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Indoprima Gemilang.

name: PT Tanah Laut Tbk
summary: PT Tanah Laut Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides sea transport and trans loading services in Indonesia. The company also offers business management consultancy services, which includes planning and designing the development of business management in the areas of shipping, marine transport and logistics, harbor, mining, energy resources, and other consultation services. In addition, it provides ports and terminal development and services; marine transportation and logistics services; and trading services. The company was formerly known as PT IndoExchange Tbk and changed its name to PT Tanah Laut Tbk in June 2011. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Tanah Laut Tbk is a subsidiary of Equatorex Sdn. Bhd.

name: PT Indika Energy Tbk
summary: PT. Indika Energy Tbk operates as an integrated energy company in Indonesia. The company operates through Energy Resources, Energy Services, Energy Infrastructure, and Other Portfolio Holdings segments. The Energy Resources segment produces coal. This segment undertakes surface coal mining at a 50,921 hectares concession in Paser Regency, East Kalimantan, Indonesia. The Energy Services segment provides mining, engineering, procurement, construction, and offshore supply base services in the coal, and oil and gas sectors; and operation, maintenance, and logistics services. The Energy Infrastructure segment operates 660 megawatt coal-fired power plant in Cirebon, West Java. It also provides sea logistics and transportation solutions for bulk materials and natural resources; and offshore supply logistics services for oil and gas companies. In addition, this segment engages in the port operations; and provision of logistics, integrated operation, management, and maintenance services. The company is also involved in the investment, general trading, marketing, financing, coal and mineral trading, contracting, development, construction, industrial, agriculture, printing, workshop, and transportation activities; and provision of consultancy services for construction, industry, and infrastructure, as well as waste management services. In addition, the company provides transportation management, business and management consultancy, gold mining, real estate and trading, shipping, warehousing, and other services. Further, it offers information and communication, professional, scientific and technical manpower, travelling agent, insurance, vehicle repair maintenance, and retail and rental and lease services, as well as digital technology services. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk
summary: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk operates in the paper packaging industry in Indonesia, Asia, North and South America, Australia, Africa, and Europe. The company offers white grade papers, brown grade papers, and carton boxes, as well as offset printing services. The company was founded in 1976 and is based in Serang, Indonesia. PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Purinusa Ekapersada.

name: PT Inocycle Technology Group Tbk
summary: PT Inocycle Technology Group Tbk engages in the production and sale of recycle polyester staple fiber in Indonesia, the United States, Japan, the Philippines, India, Saudi Arabia, Morocco, Germany, Spain, Italy, and Australia. The company provides hollow conjugated, solid, and special function fiber. It also offers homeware products, such as pillows, bolsters, mattresses, blankets, carpets, mattress protectors, and bed cover sets; and geotextile non-woven products used in various industries, such as mining, construction, agriculture, manufacturing, and infrastructure.
