The company also provides Iron Mountain Clean Start that navigates changing workplace requirements from densifying and reconfiguring the office for social distancing to office closures or moving to digital way of working; and Iron Mountain Connect web portal that allows to locate and retrieve the information as needed. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia. PT Multifiling Mitra Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of Iron Mountain Hong Kong Limited.

name: PT Mahkota Group Tbk
summary: PT Mahkota Group Tbk engages in the palm oil processing and its derivatives businesses in Indonesia. The company produces crude palm oil, palm kernel, and other derivative products. It also offers logistic services; and engages in palm oil plantation activities. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Medan, Indonesia. PT Mahkota Group Tbk is a subsidiary of Pt Mahkota Global Investama.

name: PT Multi Indocitra Tbk
summary: PT Multi Indocitra Tbk produces and trades in baby and health care products, and cosmetics in Indonesia. The company offers baby products and healthcare products, including bottle, nipple, breast feeding accs, feeding accs, nursing accs, healthcare accs, teether, pacifier, breast pads and pumps, baby wipes, baby and kids toiletries, and baby skin care products; personal care products, such as face and compact powder, two way cake, facial foam, and moisturizer; and cosmetics, which includes body lotions, hand gels, lip care, lipstiks, eyes shadows, and make up. It also provides skincare products consists of shower cream and bubble foam shower; hotwheels, barbie, thomas & friends, fisher price, and mega bloks; shaver and refill cartridges; adult and baby diapers; gummy vitamin for kids, adult, beauty, and expectant mom; air fresheners; kitchen cleaners; floor cleaners; cleaner for all surfaces and glasses; ready to drink soya milk; lampu LEDs, daylight and warmwhite bulbs, and flood lights; and viva face tonic, milk cleansers, scin foods, air mawar, eye brow pencils, and liquid foundations. In addition, the company offers food and beverage products, including lexus, oat crunch, samudra, crackers, topmix, and funmixed munchy's; ota moruku, crack potato, miaowmiaow, omypop, and mini rice crack potatoes; waisun, southern, marshmallow, and lot sour 100 candies; and d'best birdness, guava, tea, soya starway, dolphin, and wanfa drink beverages. It sells its brands under the Pigeon and Lock&Lock brands name. The company offers its products through its own distribution centers, as well as third party suppliers and sub-distributors. PT Multi Indocitra Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in West Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Midi Utama Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Midi Utama Indonesia Tbk engages in the retail trading in Indonesia. The company operates through Food, Fresh Food, and Non-Food segments. It is involved in retail of consumer products through minimarket networks under the Alfamidi brand; supermarket network under the Alfamidi super; and fruit store network under the Midi Fresh brand. The company was formerly known as PT Midimart Utama. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Midi Utama Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Sumber Alfaria Trijaya Tbk.

name: PT Mitra Keluarga Karyasehat Tbk
summary: PT Mitra Keluarga Karyasehat Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, owns and operates hospitals in Indonesia. The company provides healthcare services; and operates a pharmacy. Its hospital network comprises of 16 Mitra Keluarga hospitals and 8 other hospitals located in Jakarta, Bekasi, Cikarang, Depok, Cibubur, Tangerang, Sukabumi, Karawang, Cirebon, Surabaya, Cibinong, Subang, and Tegal. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia. PT Mitra Keluarga Karyasehat Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Griyainsani Cakrasadaya.

name: RH
summary: RH, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a retailer in the home furnishings. It offers products in various categories, including furniture, lighting, textiles, bathware, d√É¬©cor, outdoor and garden, and child and teen furnishings. The company provides its products through its retail galleries; and Source Books, a series of catalogs, as well as online through rh.com, rhbabyandchild.com, rhteen.com, and rhmodern.com, as well as waterworks.com. As of January 30, 2021, it operated a total of 68 RH Galleries and 38 RH outlet stores in 31 states in the District of Columbia and Canada, as well as 14 Waterworks showrooms throughout the United States and the United Kingdom. The company was formerly known as Restoration Hardware Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to RH in January 2017. RH was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Corte Madera, California.

name: PT Mitra International Resources Tbk
summary: PT Mitra International Resources Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides land transportation services in Indonesia. The company offers transportation services to automobile assembling industry; logistics and warehousing services, including handles loading and unloading of goods in warehouses; on shore and offshore support services for energy, oil, and gas sectors; and building management services, as well as industrial support services, as well as operates a mixer truck fleet for carrying out projects in Central Java and East Java. It also provides manufacturing services of various car body products, such as flat truck deck truck, dump truck, box, and wing box. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated 518 trucks. The company was formerly known as PT Mitra Rajasa and changed its name to PT Mitra International Resources Tbk in October 2009. PT Mitra International Resources Tbk was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Mitra Komunikasi Nusantara Tbk
summary: PT Mitra Komunikasi Nusantara Tbk distributes and sells telecommunication products in Indonesia. The company offers smartphones, tablets/pads, prepaid vouchers, SIM cards, and network products. It also sells its products online. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Metropolitan Kentjana Tbk
summary: PT Metropolitan Kentjana Tbk develops and manages lands and buildings in Indonesia. The company operates through Shopping Center, Office, Apartment, Real Estate, Air/Water Park, and Hotel segments. It also engages in the rental of space in shopping centers, office buildings, and apartments; and sale of land and buildings. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Multi Bintang Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Multi Bintang Indonesia Tbk operates as a beverage company in Indonesia and internationally. The company is involved in the production and marketing of alcoholic beverages and other products, as well as management consulting activity. It offers beers under the Heineken; BINTANG Pilsener; BINTANG Arak Jeruk; BINTANG Anggur Merah; BINTANG Crystal; BINTANG Radler; and BINTANG 0.0% brand names. The company was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Multi Bintang Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Heineken International B.V.

name: PT Mulia Industrindo Tbk
summary: PT Mulia Industrindo Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells glass in Indonesia. It offers plain and colored float glass; glass containers, such as bottles, mugs, and cups, as well as transparent and colored container glass used for packaging of food, and beverages and beer; architectural glass blocks for application on wall and floor; automotive safety glass; and ceramic tiles. The company also exports its products to Asia, Australia, Europe, Africa, and the United States. It primarily sells its products to distributors and glass processors. PT Mulia Industrindo Tbk was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Multipolar Tbk Class A
summary: PT Multipolar Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in telecommunication, information technology, and general trading businesses in Indonesia and internationally. The company operates through Retail and Distribution, Information Technology, and Others segments. It operates a chain of retail hypermarkets, SmartClub, Foodmart, Boston Health & Beauty, and FMX, as well as e-commerce business; department stores and Books & Beyond book stores; and family entertainment centers. The company also provides IT services and solutions, including hardware and integration services; application system and implementation services; and IT consulting services. In addition, it operates filing management; offers services for record, computer data, valuable document, electronic document, and facility management services; other auxiliary services; and develops and manages shopping centers, offices, and apartments. Additionally, the company provides a web based platform for procurement of goods and services for business-to-business and business-to-government market segments; and telecommunication and air transportation services. Further, it is involved in import, export, interinsulair, local and retail, property/real estate development and management services, rental space of building, and investment businesses. PT Multipolar Tbk was formerly known as PT Multipolar Corporation Tbk and changed its name to PT Multipolar Tbk in July 2007. PT Multipolar Tbk was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Multipolar Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Inti Anugrah Pratama.

name: PT Multipolar Technology Tbk
summary: PT Multipolar Technology Tbk provides information technology (IT) consulting, system integration, and IT systems management services in Indonesia. The company offers IT strategy and planning services, such as digital transformation planning, IT operation and governance, independent validation and verification, IT PMO set up and operation assistance, data center consulting, and data governance; customer experience platform and services, including e-channel, mobility, communication system and collaboration, customer relationship management, and digital marketing; and digital insights solutions comprising big data and analytics, business performance intelligence, and artificial intelligence. It also provides banking, enterprise resource planning, smart office, enterprise project management, and field operation solutions; merchant IT and IT operation managed services; and blockchain, Internet of Things, OS and virtualization, database platform, services oriented architecture, container management, and application program interface management solutions. In addition, the company offers ICT infrastructure, colocation, data center managed, and cloud services, as well as disaster recovery as a service; and security solutions, and managed security service provider/security operation center. It serves financial, telecommunication, government, health care, manufacturing, oil and gas, and retail sectors. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Multipolar Technology Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Multipolar Tbk.

name: PT Mega Manunggal Property Tbk
summary: PT Mega Manunggal Property Tbk provides logistics facilities in Indonesia. It also leases warehouses and office spaces. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Mega Manunggal Property Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Mega Mandiri Properti.

name: PT. Media Nusantara Citra Tbk
summary: PT. Media Nusantara Citra Tbk operates as a media company in Indonesia. It operates through Television, Radio, Print Media, Content, and Advertising Agency segments. The company owns and operates national free-to-air televisions (TV), such as RCTI TV station that offers a range of programs, including drama series, box office movies, sports events, talent search shows, reality shows, music shows, and infotainment programs; MNCTV, which offers family drama series, sports programs, and various shows; GTV that focuses on animation, variety shows, reality shows, game shows, and talent search programs; and iNews TV, which focuses on news, sports, and other factual programs. In addition, it operates RDTI+, an entertainment app; Sindonews.com, an online edition of Koran Sindo, Okezone.com, a general and news portal, iNews.id, a news portal comprising national news and regional portal; and publishes Koran Sindo, a newspaper; and meTube.id, a user generated content platform, as well as ROOV and MNC. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT. Media Nusantara Citra Tbk is a subsidiary of PT. Global Mediacom Tbk.

name: PT Madusari Murni Indah Tbk
summary: PT. Madusari Murni Indah Tbk, through its subsidiaries, produces, distributes, trades in, and sells food grade ethanol. It also provides carbondioxide gas in liquid and dry forms; and organic and potassium fertilizers. The company sells its products under the Molindo Ethanol, Molindo CO2, and Molindo Fertilizer brands. It serves food and beverage, pharmaceutical, cosmetic, cigarette, hospital, furniture, ink, printing, fuel, and welding industries. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Malang, Indonesia. PT. Madusari Murni Indah Tbk is subsidiary of Pt Cropsco Panen Indonusa.

name: PT Mitra Pinasthika Mustika Tbk
summary: PT Mitra Pinasthika Mustika Tbk, through its subsidiaries, engages in the distribution of two-wheel vehicle and spare parts under Honda brand primarily in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Distribution, Retail and Aftermarket; Transportation; and Others. The company operates MPMMotor retail outlets. It is also involved in the four-wheel vehicle retail sale and rental, general insurance, and financing activities, as well as online sale of four wheels-vehicle and its supporting activities. In addition, the company provides investment, management consulting, and advisory services; auction services; outsourcing services; land, sea, and air freight forwarding; and other, trading, and workshop services. Further, it trades in new and used motor vehicles, and supporting components; offers general and motor vehicle trading and agency services; and computer consultant activities and other computer facility management services. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Megapower Makmur Tbk
summary: PT Megapower Makmur Tbk operates as an independent power producing company in Indonesia. It generates and operates electricity from various energy sources, such as nuclear, coal, gas, fuel oil, diesel, hydro, solar, wind, marine, and geothermal, as well as provides power plant operation and maintenance services. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in North Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Megapower Makmur Tbk is a subsidiary of Bina Puri Power Sdn. Bhd.
industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers

name: PT Matahari Putra Prima Tbk
summary: PT Matahari Putra Prima Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates a chain of retail stores that offers fast moving consumer goods in Indonesia. The company operates Hypermart stores; Foodmart Fresh and Foodmart Primo supermarkets, which offers fresh foods, bakery products, and ready-to-eat products, as well as eat-in or quick take-away meals, and caf√É¬© and boutique bakery; and Foodmart Express (FMX) convenient stores that provides food and snack products. As of December 31, 2018, it operated 219 stores, including 107 Hypermarts, 2 SmartClubs, 24 Foodmarts, 74 Boston Health & Beauty stores, and 12 FMX convenience stores. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Matahari Putra Prima Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Multipolar Tbk.

name: PT Maha Properti Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Maha Properti Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a property company in Indonesia. The company operates through Apartment and Building Management segments. It develops infrastructure, such as lifestyle malls, apartments, and star hotels, as well as housing, shop houses, office areas, shopping centers, and townhouses and shophouses. The company was formerly known as PT Propertindo Mulia Investama Tbk and changed its name to PT Maha Properti Indonesia Tbk in September 2019. PT Maha Properti Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Mustika Ratu Tbk
summary: PT Mustika Ratu Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, trades, and distributes herbal and traditional cosmetics, body care products, health drinks, and other related products in Indonesia. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Mustika Ratu Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Mustika Ratu Investama.

name: PT Maskapai Reasuransi Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Maskapai Reasuransi Indonesia Tbk engages in the reinsurance business in Indonesia. The company offers general reinsurance products, such as property, motor vehicle, marine hull and cargo, aviation, health, liability, personal accident, suretyship, and engineering reinsurance, as well as energy, and oil and gas reinsurance. It provides life reinsurance, including term life, personal accident, credit life, critical illness, health, and catastrophe reinsurance products, as well as Sharia life and general reinsurance products. The company was founded in 1953 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT. MNC Studios International Tbk.
summary: PT. MNC Studios International Tbk. engages in the television and film program, advertising, digital, and talent management businesses in Indonesia. It produces drama series, TV movies, shows, reality shows, music programming, and documentaries. The company also produces box office films for cinemas through in-house production, co-production, project financing, and national film distribution, as well as provides artist management services. In addition, it produces infotainment content, as well as offers complete and integrated media placement services. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia. PT. MNC Studios International Tbk. is a subsidiary of PT Media Nusantara Citra, Tbk.

name: PT MNC Sky Vision Tbk
summary: PT MNC Sky Vision Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides satellite based pay television services in Indonesia. The company distributes approximately 140 local and international channels in various categories, such as sports, news, movies, knowledge, kids, religion, entertainment, hobby/special interest, and others. It provides its services under the Indovision and TopTV brand names. The company was formerly known as PT Matahari Lintas Cakrawala and changed its name to PT MNC Sky Vision Tbk in December 2006. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT MNC Sky Vision Tbk is a subsidiary of PT MNC Vision Networks.

name: PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk
summary: P.T. Metrodata Electronics Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the information communication and technology (ICT) business in Indonesia and internationally. The company's Distribution division sells hardware and software, and basic peripherals, such as data storage devices, terminals, memory, and peripherals. Its Solution division provides maintenance services; sells hardware, system management software, middleware, serverware, and system level software; and rents hardware and software products. The company's Consultation division provides professional services for consultation, implementation, and training; and sells software products. The company also offers business transformation solutions; assembly services in the computer field or wireless communication equipment area; and system integration services, as well as distributes information technology products and personal computer products. P.T. Metrodata Electronics Tbk was founded in 1983 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Capitalinc Investment Tbk
summary: PT Capitalinc Investment Tbk operates in the oil and gas sector in Indonesia. The company engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and natural gas with an area of 5,448.48 square kilometers in the East Kangean; and participates in the exploration, development, and exploitation of petroleum resources covering Seinangka-Senipah Block in East Kalimantan covering an area of 60.61 kilometers square kilometers. It also has an agreement for the exploration and production of crude oil and gas based on production sharing contract in the Air Komering Block, South Sumatera. PT Capitalinc Investment Tbk was founded in 1983 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Capitalinc Investment Tbk opeartes as a subsidiary of BFC SPV Ltd

name: PT Metropolitan Land Tbk
summary: PT Metropolitan Land Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the residential and commercial properties development businesses in Indonesia. It operates through Real Estate, Shopping Center, Hotel, and Others segments. The company's activities include land acquisition; real estate development; renting; leasing; hotels construction and operation; and sale of land, residential houses, shop-houses, apartments, condotels, and offices. It also owns and operates shopping centers, recreation centers, and sports centers. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia.

name: PT Meta Epsi Tbk.
summary: PT Meta Epsi Tbk. provides engineering, procurement, and construction services to customers in the areas of power and industrial generation, transmission, distribution, oil and gas, and infrastructure. The company also offers project management, procurement, construction and commissioning, and project development services. In addition, it is involved in the fisheries and plantation activities. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Meta Epsi Tbk. operates as a subsidiary of Pt Anugerah Perkasa Semesta.

name: PT Metro Realty Tbk
summary: PT Metro Realty Tbk engages in property management and real estate development businesses in Indonesia. The company was formerly known as PT Metro Supermarket Realty Tbk and changed its name to PT Metro Realty Tbk in July 2009. PT Metro Realty Tbk was founded in 1980 and is based in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia.

name: PT Malacca Trust Wuwungan Insurance Tbk
summary: PT Malacca Trust Wuwungan Insurance Tbk provides general insurance products in Indonesia. The company operates in two divisions, General Insurance and Rental Property. It offers health, fire, motor vehicles, cargo, marine hull, and personal accident insurance products, as well as other insurance products, such as liability, engineering, and miscellaneous insurance products. The company was formerly known as Pt Asuransi Wuwungan and changed its name to PT Malacca Trust Wuwungan Insurance Tbk in 2011. The company was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Samindo Resources Tbk
summary: PT Samindo Resources Tbk, through its subsidiaries, provides coal and other mining services primarily in Indonesia. Its activities include overburden removal, coal getting, coal hauling, and geological mapping and drilling. The company was formerly known as PT Myoh Technology, Tbk and changed its name to PT Samindo Resources Tbk in February 2012. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia. Samindo Resources Tbk is a subsidiary of ST International Corporation.

name: PT Mayora Indah Tbk
summary: PT Mayora Indah Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells food and beverage products in Indonesia, rest of Asia, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Packaged Food Processing, Packaged Beverages Processing, and Financial Services. The company offers biscuits under the Roma Marie Susu, Roma Marie Susu Gold, Roma Kelapa, Roma Kelapa Cream, Roma Sandwich, Roma Malkist, Roma Malkist Abon, Roma Malkist Coklat, Roma Malkist Krim Keju Manis, Roma Malkist Krim Tiramisu, Roma Cream Creakers, Royal Choice, Better, Slai O Lai, Sari Gandum, Sari Gandum Sandwich, dll, and other brands names; candies under the Kopiko, Kopiko Cappuccino, KIS, Tamarin, dll, and other brand names; and wafers under the Beng Beng, Beng Beng Maxx, Beng Beng Share It, Astor, Roma Wafer Coklat, Roma Zuperrr Keju, Roma Choco Blast, dll, and other brand names. It also provides chocolates under the Choki-Choki and Drink Beng Beng brands; coffee under the Torabika Duo, Torabika Duo Susu Full Cream, Torabika 3 in 1, Torabika Moka, Torabika Cappuccino, Torabika Jahe Susu, Torabika Creamy Latte, Torabika Double Up, Kopiko Brown Coffee, Toracafe Volcano Chocomelt, Toracafe Caramelove, Torabika Milky Latte, and dll brand names; and health food products under the Energen Cereal, Energen Oatmilk, and Prima Cereal brands. In addition, it is involved in provision of financial services; and processing of coffee powder and instant coffee, and cacao beans. PT Mayora Indah Tbk was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Asia Pacific Investama Tbk
summary: PT Asia Pacific Investama Tbk operates as a garments company in Indonesia, Africa, the United States, Asia, Australia, and Europe. The company operates through two segments, Garments, and Weaving and Spinning. It offers denim, grey, job work, laundry, waste, and other garments, as well as yarns. The company was formerly known as PT Apac Citra Centertex Tbk and changed its name to PT Asia Pacific Investama Tbk in November 2015. PT Asia Pacific Investama Tbk was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia. PT Asia Pacific Investama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT World Harvest Textile.

name: Pt Selaras Citra Nusa Perk Tbk
PT Surya Permata Andalan Tbk
summary: PT Surya Permata Andalan Tbk develops and operates boutique hotels, villas, and resorts in Indonesia. The company was formerly known as PT Nusantara Properti Internasional Tbk. PT Surya Permata Andalan Tbk is based in Bali, Indonesia.

name: PT Pelayaran Nelly Dwi Putri Tbk
summary: PT Pelayaran Nelly Dwi Putri Tbk provides shipping services in Indonesia. It offers vessel charter services; and builds, repairs, and maintains tug-boats and barges, as well as shipping consulting services. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT Pelayaran Nelly Dwi Putri Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Haskojaya Abadi.

name: PT NFC Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT NFC Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the provision of marketing platforms in Indonesia. It operates through Digital Product Aggregator, Digital Cloud Advertisement, Clean Energy Products and Services, Digital Wholesale, and Content and Entertainment segments. The company offers various digital products for SMEs, modern retail, and e-commerce through a B2B2C platform; digital cloud marketing ecosystem solution through hardware, content management system and managed service contract; and transportation products and infrastructure under the electric motorcycle Volta brand name. It is also involved in the management of collection of superhero characters with intellectual property and digital activation platform. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT NFC Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk.

name: PT Charnic Capital Tbk
summary: PT Charnic Capital Tbk, an investment holding company, engages in the property business in Indonesia. It engages in office building management; rental services; and invests in shares of public and non-public companies. The company was founded in 2007 is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Charnic Capital Tbk is a subsidiary of Pt Indovest Central.

name: PT Pelat Timah Nusantara Tbk
summary: PT Pelat Timah Nusantara Tbk operates as a tinplate manufacturer in Indonesia and internationally. It offers tinplate products in the form of coils, and sheets and scrolls. The company provides tinplate for consumer products, such as food and beverages, canned milk, battery, paints, and chemicals industries. PT Pelat Timah Nusantara Tbk was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT City Retail Developments Tbk
summary: PT City Retail Developments Tbk, through its subsidiaries, owns, develops, and operates shopping malls in Indonesia. The company operates through Shopping Mall, Real Estate, Hotel, and Others segments. It also engages in the building construction; rental; and hotel management activities, as well as investment business. Its real estate portfolio includes land kavling, condotel, and shop house buildings. The company was formerly known as PT Nirvana Development Tbk and changed its name to PT City Retail Developments Tbk in May 2018. PT City Retail Developments Tbk was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT City Retail Developments Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Mega Inti Perdana Utama.

name: PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk
summary: PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk provides various banking products and services to corporate and individual customers in Indonesia. It offers savings and current accounts, and deposits; home, multipurpose, automobile, personal, working capital, and investment loans; credit programs; credit and debit cards; mutual funds, insurance products, FX products, bonds, and structured products; and premier and private banking services. The company also provides treasury products; cash management and trade finance services; supplier financing, export, and import services; and Web and mobile banking, and payment services. In addition, it offers bank reference, bank comfort, and confirmation letters; safe deposit boxes; telegraphic transfers; and remittance and e-tax services. The company operates through a network of 236 offices and 592 ATMs. PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk was formerly known as PT Bank NISP Tbk. The company was incorporated in 1941 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk is a subsidiary of OCBC Overseas Investments Pte. Ltd.

name: PT Bank Nationalnobu Tbk
summary: PT Bank Nationalnobu Tbk provides banking products and services. The company operates in Corporate and Treasury segments. It offers savings products; and working capital investment loans, consumer, car, housing, apartment, and office loans. The company also provides debit cards, internet banking, mobile banking, and wealth management services; treasury services, such as foreign exchange transactions and hedging, and investment products. It operates through a network of 41 branch offices, 63 cash offices, and 222 ATMs, as well as a 6 sub branch office in Indonesia. The company was formerly known as PT Bank Alfindo. PT Bank Nationalnobu Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Nusa Palapa Gemilang Tbk
summary: PT Nusa Palapa Gemilang Tbk produces and sells granule NPK fertilizers and granule micro fertilizers in Indonesia. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Sidoarjo, Indonesia.

name: PT Nusa Raya Cipta Tbk
summary: PT Nusa Raya Cipta Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the construction business in Indonesia. The company constructs hotels and resorts, office buildings, apartments, shopping malls, and retail centers. It also engages in the construction of roads, highways, harbors, bridges, irrigation projects, and others for government and private sectors. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Nusa Raya Cipta Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Surya Semesta Internusa Tbk.

name: PT Nusantara Almazia, Tbk.
summary: PT Nusantara Almazia, Tbk. engages in the property development business in Indonesia. It develops apartments, offices, hospitals, hotels, and schools. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Karawang, Indonesia.

name: PT Protech Mitra Perkasa Tbk
summary: PT Protech Mitra Perkasa Tbk operates as an integrated project and construction management company in Indonesia. It engages in the electrical building construction and installation of telecommunications systems. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Protech Mitra Perkasa Tbk is a subsidiary of Pt Indovest Central.

name: PT Ancora Indonesia Resources Tbk
summary: PT Ancora Indonesia Resources Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates in the explosives industry in Indonesia. The company imports, manufactures, trades in, and distributes ammonium nitrate and nitric acid that are used as explosives in coal and mineral mining operation, public works, and the cement industry, as well as explosives related accessories. It offers drilling and work-over of oil well services; blasting services; mining services; and shipping services. The company was formerly known as PT TD Resources, Tbk and changed its name to PT Ancora Indonesia Resources Tbk. in December 2008. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Indonesia Prima Property Tbk
summary: PT Indonesia Prima Property Tbk, through its subsidiaries, operates in the property sector in Indonesia. The company operates through Shopping Center Space Rental; Rental, sale of apartments, and apartment service; Hotel; and Sale of Residentials segments. It also engages in the rental of office spaces, shopping center rental, apartments, houses, and related facilities. The company was formerly known as PT Ometraco Realty and changed its name to PT Indonesia Prima Property Tbk in 1996. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Optima Prima Metal Sinergi Tbk
summary: PT Optima Prima Metal Sinergi Tbk engages in the metal scrap trading business in Indonesia. It supplies steel plates from used ships to steel manufacturers; and offers metal scrap raw materials. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Surabaya, Indonesia. PT Optima Prima Metal Sinergi Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Asian Perkasa Indosteel.

name: PT Minna Padi Investama Sekuritas Tbk
summary: PT Minna Padi Investama Sekuritas Tbk engages in the securities brokerage and underwriting activities in Indonesia. It offers trading and brokerage services for equity or debt securities in the secondary market; underwriting services for initial public offerings and rights issues, bonds, and other convertible bonds, as well as acts as an arranger in private placements; and corporate finance services, such as financial advisory, restructuring, and merger and acquisition services. The company was formerly known as PT Minna Padi Investama Tbk and changed its name to PT Minna Padi Investama Sekuritas Tbk in March 2017. PT Minna Padi Investama Sekuritas Tbk was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Provident Agro Tbk
summary: PT Provident Agro Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the operation of palm oil plantations in Indonesia. It develops plantation through land processing, seeding, nursery, planting, maintenance, and harvesting of fresh fruit bunch; processes fresh fruit bunch into crude palm oil and palm kernel; and sells and trades in plantation products. The company operates a total planted area of approximately 6.295 hectares. It also engages in the trading activities. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Bima Sakti Pertiwi Tbk
summary: PT Bima Sakti Pertiwi Tbk operates as a property developer in Riau. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Pekanbaru, Indonesia.

name: PT Pratama Abadi Nusa Industri Tbk
summary: PT Pratama Abadi Nusa Industri Tbk manufactures and sells packaging cans. The company primarily offers blek cans for glue and oil packaging. It also engages in the processing of fishery products, as well as provides food freezing and cold storage services. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.

name: PT Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk
summary: PT Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk engages in tourism and hospitality businesses primarily in Indonesia. The company offers inbound tour and destination management services to foreign tourists and travelers; and travel leisure offers travel management services to domestic travelers. It also offers media pillar services, such as event and exhibition organizer for meetings, incentives, conventions, and exhibitions activities; live entertainment for music, theater, and other on stage performances; media publication; and publishes travel magazine and books. The company provides premium bus charters, intercity shuttles, tourism buses, and open trip services. PT Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Panorama Tirta Anugerah.

name: PT  Panin Sekuritas Tbk
summary: PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk provides securities brokerage, underwriting, and investment management services in Indonesia. The company was formerly known as PT. Nusamas Panin and changed its name to PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk in June 1995. PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Panca Budi Idaman Tbk
summary: PT Panca Budi Idaman Tbk manufactures, distributes, and trades in plastic packaging products. It provides polyethylene and polypropylene bags; high density polyethylene resins; and heavy duty sacks, as well as packaging products, such as food wrapping papers, cake boxes, plastic ropes, rubber bands, and straws. The company also trades in plastic resins. It distributes its products to retail merchants, semi-wholesalers, and wholesalers. The company provides its products under the Pluit, Tomat, Bangkuang, Jeruk, Cabe, 222, Wayang, Gapura, Sparta, Liberty, Dayana, PB, and various other brand names. It exports its products to the United Kingdom, Germany, the Netherlands, Spain, the United Arab Emirates, Nigeria, the United States, Taiwan, etc. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Panca Budi Idaman Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Alphen Internasional Corporindo.

name: PT Pan Brothers Tbk
summary: PT Pan Brothers Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and supplies garments. It offers woven garments, such as padded and light weight jackets, pants, shorts, casual pants and dress shirts, etc.; technical, functional, and active wear jackets for snow boarding, ski outer wear, active wear, jogging, hiking, other sports and outdoor activities, etc.; and cut and sewn knit garments, including polo shirts, golf shirts, track suits, and sweat suits, as well as various fabric products. The company also provides garment printing and embroidery services. It exports its products to the United States, European Community, Eastern Europe, Canada, Asia, Australia, New Zealand, and internationally. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.

name: PT Paramita Bangun Sarana Tbk
summary: PT Paramita Bangun Sarana Tbk engages in civil construction business in Indonesia. It constructs buildings, and mechanical and electrical infrastructure projects. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Prima Cakrawala Abadi Tbk
summary: PT Prima Cakrawala Abadi Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the processing and distribution of fishery products in Indonesia. It offers pasteurized crab meat, and fresh and frozen products. The company also provides canning and cold storage of marine products. PT Prima Cakrawala Abadi Tbk was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Semarang, Indonesia.

name: PT Destinasi Tirta Nusantara Tbk
summary: PT Destinasi Tirta Nusantara Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a tour operator company in Indonesia. It offers tour and travel packages, tour guides, and tour transportation related services to foreign tourists. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Destinasi Tirta Nusantara Tbk is a subsidiary of PT. Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk.

name: PT Panca Global Kapital Tbk
summary: PT Panca Global Kapital Tbk engages in the brokerage and underwriting services in Indonesia. It is also involved in development and investment business, as well as general trading activities. The company was formerly known as PT Panca Global Securities Tbk. PT Panca Global Kapital Tbk was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Phapros, Tbk
summary: PT Phapros, Tbk operates in the pharmaceutical and health care industry in Indonesia. The company operates through Over the Counter (OTC), Ethical, Generic Drugs Bearing, and Toll Manufacturing segments. It offers OTC drugs, including Antimo Anak, Livron B Plek, Noza, Hemorogard, Bioron, and others. The company also provides generic drug products for government institutions and hospitals, as well as produces drugs for other pharmaceutical industries; and offers medical devices. PT Phapros, Tbk also exports its products internationally. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Phapros, Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Kimia Farma (Persero) Tbk.

name: PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk
summary: PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the transmission and distribution of natural gas to industrial, commercial, and household users in Indonesia and the United States. The company operates through three segments: Gas commercial and transmission, Exploration and Production of Oil and Gas, and Other operations. It is also involved in the liquefied natural gas processing activity; trading of oil and gas; and exploration, exploitation, and business development in oil and gas. In addition, the company provides fiber optic rental for network services; construction and maintenance services to the customers; management and leasing services for buildings and equipment; and engineering and consultancy services. The company was founded in 1859 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Pertamina (Persero).

name: PT Bahtera Bumi Raya Tbk
summary: PT Bahtera Bumi Raya Tbk operates as a shipping and resource integration platform in Indonesia. The company operates in two segments, Travel Services and Shipping Services. It provides flight ticket, travel tour package, event, train ticket, shipping, and other services. The company also engages in the travel agency and tour operator; logistics management and nickel ore transportation; domestic sea transportation for general cargo, special cargo, and shipping services for remote areas; nickel ore and coal trading; and contractor for nickel, coal, gold, and other minerals. PT Bahtera Bumi Raya Tbk was formerly known as PT Tourindo Guide Indonesia Tbk and changed its name to PT Bahtera Bumi Raya Tbk in September 2025. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Pembangunan Graha Lestari Indah Tbk
summary: PT Pembangunan Graha Lestari Indah Tbk engages in the hotel and restaurant businesses in Indonesia. The company owns and operates a hotel under the Travellers Suites name; restaurants under the Le Chic name; and a banquet and restaurant under the Tia Caf√É¬© name. It also generates hydroelectricity power. PT Pembangunan Graha Lestari Indah Tbk was founded in 1994 and is based in Medan, Indonesia.

name: PT Pradiksi Gunatama Tbk
summary: PT Pradiksi Gunatama TBK engages in the palm oil plantation activities in Indonesia. It produces crude palm oil and palm kernel, as well as shell, palm acid oil, empty jlong, and fiber by-products. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Batu Engau, Indonesia.

name: PT Pelangi Indah Canindo Tbk
summary: PT Pelangi Indah Canindo Tbk manufactures and sells metal packaging products in Indonesia and internationally. The company offers steel drums, PG tank, pail cans, food cans, and general cans, as well as provides metal printing services. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk
summary: PT Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, primarily engages in managing recreational parks, sports facilities, and resorts in Indonesia. It operates through Tourism; Real Estate; and Trading and Services segments. The company manages entrance gates, recreational parks and beaches, fantasy world, swimming pool, animal shows, and lodging facilities, as well as engages in merchandise selling activities. It also develops, sells, and rents properties, including houses, shophouses, condominiums, apartments, offices, and shopping centers, as well as land. In addition, the company is involved in souvenirs trading, marine transportation, and restaurant management activities; the purification, management, supply, and distribution of clean water; and the provision of highway construction and services, and waste and draination services. PT Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in North Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Perdana Karya Perkasa Tbk
summary: PT Perdana Karya Perkasa Tbk provides construction support services for oil and gas industries in Indonesia. The company engages in coal mining activities, and leasing of equipment, as well as providing operational support, maintenance, and supply of various spare parts for light and heavy vehicles. It is also involved installation and maintenance of oil and gas pipelines; installation of machinery, electricity, and instrumentation; installation of equipment/production facilities; building construction and architecture; and construction of steel structures, and civil construction and earthworks. PT Perdana Karya Perkasa Tbk was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Samarinda, Indonesia.

name: PT Planet Properindo Jaya Tbk
summary: PT Planet Properindo Jaya engages in hotels, restaurants, and tourism consulting activities. It operates Vue Palace hotel, a 4-star hotel located in Bandung. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Bandung, Indonesia.

name: PT Putra Mandiri Jembar Tbk
summary: PT Putra Mandiri Jembar Tbk engages in the vehicle dealership business. The company also engages in the provision of automotive rental services; and e-commerce business. It operates 45 Mitsubishi dealer showrooms, 1 Mercedes-Benz dealer showroom, and 2 Nissan dan Datsun dealer showrooms located in 31 cities and 10 provinces in Sumatera, DKI Jakarta, and Jawa. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: Pt Panca Mitra Multiperdana Tbk
summary: Pt Panca Mitra Multiperdana Tbk engages in processing and sale of shrimp. The company supplies shrimp under EBINOYA brand name to restaurants, hotels, and food service firms in Indonesia; and exports to the United States and Japan under Leader brand name. Pt Panca Mitra Multiperdana Tbk was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Jawa Timur, Indonesia.

name: PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in providing banking products and services for individuals and businesses in Indonesia and internationally. It operates through Banking and Multi-finance segments. The company offers savings and deposit accounts; savings programs; and credit cards. It also provides loans products, such as KPR Panin, Kredit Exporess, and Referral KPM; wealth management services, including bancassurance, mutual funds, and bond products; electronic banking; international services; and banking services, such as currency exchange, KUDN Panin, TD Valas DHE, and safe deposit boxes. In addition, the company offers business loans comprising working capital, investment, syndication credit, and multipurpose; and business services, including export, import, SKBDN, remittance, draft bank, and correspondent bank services, as well as forward transaction, domestic don deliverable forward, forex swap, cash management, and today, tom, spot services; and Sharia banking services. PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Bank Panin Dubai Syariah Tbk
summary: PT Bank Panin Dubai Syariah Tbk operates as a sharia commercial bank for retail, commercial, and corporate customers in Indonesia. It accepts demand, time, current, savings, and other forms of deposits, as well as certificates of deposit. The company also offers PaS iB profit sharing, working capital, house ownership, investment, multi-service, car ownership, sharia revolving, and other financing products. In addition, it purchases securities based on sharia principles, such as retail Sukuk, government sharia bonds, and corporate Sukuk; and issues reference letters. Further, it provides debit cards, online and mobile banking, billing payment, insurance, safe deposit box, real time gross settlement, bank guarantee, PDSB standing order, and clearing services, as well as cash management systems. It operates through a network of 17 branch offices, and 22 ATMs. The company was formerly known as PT Bank Panin Syariah Tbk and changed its name to PT Bank Panin Dubai Syariah Tbk in July 2016. PT Bank Panin Dubai Syariah Tbk was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Bank Panin Dubai Syariah Tbk is a subsidiary of P.T. Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk.

name: PT PINAGO UTAMA Tbk
summary: PT PINAGO UTAMA Tbk engages in the oil palm and rubber plantation business in Indonesia. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Palembang, Indonesia.

name: PT Paninvest Tbk
summary: PT Paninvest Tbk provides life insurance products in Indonesia. It operates through Life Insurance and Business Consulting Service, Trading and Service, and Tourism segments. The company offers death, personal health, personal accident, unit link, and other insurance products. It also provides business consulting and management, and general administration services, as well as management consulting services in the field of archives. In addition, the company engages in the mutual funds business. The company was formerly known as Pt Panin Insurance Tbk and changed its name to PT Paninvest Tbk in May 2014. PT Paninvest Tbk was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Panin Financial Tbk
summary: PT Panin Financial Tbk provides business consulting, management, and administration services to the general public in Indonesia. The company also offers information technology and management information system services. In addition, it provides life insurance products, including death, whole life, annuity, endowment, endowment combine, universal life, unit-linked, personal accident, and health; and term insurance products. The company was formerly known as PT Panin Life Tbk and changed its name to PT Panin Financial Tbk in January 2010. PT Panin Financial Tbk was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Panin Financial Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Paninvest Tbk.

name: PT Pudjiadi and Sons Tbk
summary: PT Pudjiadi and Sons Tbk operates hotels and hotel facilities. Its facilities include accommodation, offices, shopping, apartments, recreational, and entertainment facilities. The company is also involved in the property management and catering businesses. It operates in Jakarta, Bandung, Anyer, Cisarua, Bali, Lombok, Yogyakarta, and Flores. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Pudjiadi and Sons Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Istana Kuta Ratu Prestige.

name: PT Pool Advista Finance Tbk
summary: PT Pool Advista Finance Tbk operates as a financing company in Indonesia. It offers investment, working capital, multipurpose, and sharia financing. The company was formerly known as PT Indojasa Pratama Finance and changed its name to PT Pool Advista Finance Tbk in November 2017. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Pool Advista Finance Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Pool Advista Indonesia Tbk.

name: PT Pollux Investasi Internasional, Tbk
summary: PT Pollux Investasi Internasional, Tbk, through its subsidiaries, operates in the property and real estate sector in Indonesia. It is involved in the management and rental of buildings, offices, malls, hotels, shophouses, and amusement parks; property management and development activities; hospitality business; and construction and apartment management activities. The company was formerly known as PT Royal Royce Properties and changed its name to PT Pollux Investasi Internasional, Tbk. PT Pollux Investasi Internasional, Tbk was founded in 2009 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Pollux Investasi Internasional, Tbk is a subsidiary of PT World Apparel.

name: PT Pollux Properties Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Pollux Properties Indonesia Tbk operates as a property developer in Indonesia. It operates through Rent Office Room, Apartment, Hotel, Mall, Office, and Others segments. The company develops apartments, condominiums, offices, shopping centers, hospitals, hotels, convention centers, housing, industrial estates, and facilities. It also purchases, sells, leases, and operates real estate properties, as well as offers real estate services, such as agents, real estate brokers, and purchasing intermediaries. In addition, the company engages in the construction, mining, and transportation businesses. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Pollux Properties Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Borneo Melawai Perkasa.

name: PT Golden Flower, Tbk
summary: PT Golden Flower, Tbk manufactures and sells garments in Indonesia. It offers men's and women's casuals, and formal light woven wears. The company's products include ladies blouse, men's shirt, non-iron shirt, casual shirt, skirt, dresses, night wear, uniform, etc. It also offers garment services, such as cutting, sewing, checking, ironing, finishing. The company also exports its products to the United States, Canada, European Union, Australia, Japan, and other Asian countries. PT Golden Flower, Tbk was founded in 1958 and is based in Semarang, Indonesia. PT Golden Flower, Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Profashion Apparel.

name: PT Asia Pacific Fibers Tbk
summary: PT Asia Pacific Fibers Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the chemical and synthetic fiber manufacturing, weaving and knitting, and other activities related to the textile industry in Indonesia. The company offers purified terephthalic acids, regular and specialized polyester chips, staple fibers, filament yarns, and fleece fabrics products. It also trades in textile products; and produces ready to wear garments and accessories, as well as provides financial services. The company's products are used in various apparel, furnishing, and industrial textile applications. It serves customers in Europe, the United States, Asia, Africa, Australia, and the Middle East. The company was formerly known as PT Polysindo Eka Perkasa Tbk and changed its name to PT Asia Pacific Fibers Tbk in December 2009. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Asia Pacific Fibers Tbk is a subsidiary of Damiano Investments B.V.

name: PT Nusantara Pelabuhan Handal Tbk
summary: PT Nusantara Pelabuhan Handal Tbk manages and operates container terminals in Indonesia and Thailand. It operates through Port Services, Sales Container Handling, and Others segments. The company provides container handling and stevedoring services for export/import commodities; goods loading and unloading services; and repair and maintenance services. It is also involved in the trading and investment activities. In addition, the company offers equipment services; and engineering services, retrofitting, and lashing structure systems for shipment. Further, it supplies cranes; and provides seaport and sea transportation services. The company was formerly known as PT Kharisma Mutiara Agung and changed its name to PT Nusantara Pelabuhan Handal Tbk in November 2016. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Nusantara Pelabuhan Handal Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Episenta Utama Investasi.

name: PT Cikarang Listrindo Tbk
summary: PT Cikarang Listrindo Tbk engages in the generation, marketing, distribution, and agency of electric power in Indonesia. The company owns and operates gas and coal-fired power plants with a total installed capacity of 1,144MW; and a transmission system of 150kV across a distance of 33 kilometers. It serves approximately 2,464 customers in five industrial estates, including manufacturers in the automotive, electronics, plastic, food, chemical, and other sectors. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: Waran Seri I Prima Globalindo L
PT Prima Globalindo Logistik Tbk
summary: Pt Prima Globalindo Logistik provides freight forwarding and land transportation services for export and import in Indonesia. It provides international sea and air freight, trucking and custom brokerage, and reefer cargo services. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in North Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT PP Presisi Tbk
summary: PT PP Presisi Tbk operates as an integrated heavy equipment-based construction company in Indonesia. It provides integrated services, including civil works, ready mix, foundation, formwork, erector, and mining, as well as equipment rental services. The company's civil works include the construction of ports, airports, railroads, coastal safeguards, irrigation channels or canals, dams, tunnels, building structures, roads, bridges, swamp reclamations, pipe installations, drillings, and land clearing. It is also involved in the provision of mechanical-electrical works, transportation/logistic, and trading services. In addition, the company possesses 2,650 heavy equipment consisting of 2515 large scale fleet (mobile), such as excavators, dump and mixer trucks, bulldozers, rollers, loaders and graders, concrete pavers, asphalt mixers and finishers, stone crushers, mobile concreate pumps, cement deep mixing and kapal keruks, cold planners and road reclaimers, and other heavy equipment. Further, it provides large scale fleet (non-mobile) comprising tower and crawler cranes, bored piles, passenger hoists, batching plants, and launcher girders. The company was formerly known as PT PP Peralatan Konstruksi and changed its name to PT PP Presisi Tbk in March 2017. PT PP Presisi Tbk was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT PP Presisi Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk.

name: PT Pembangunan Perumahan Properti Tbk
summary: PT Pembangunan Perumahan Properti Tbk engages in the property development, hospitality, and building construction businesses primarily in Indonesia. The company's portfolio includes housing, office, apartment, as well as retail and commercial properties. It also manages hotels, including Park Hotel Jakarta located in East Jakarta district; and PRIME PARK hotels in Pekanbaru and Bandung; and Swiss-Belhotel Balikpapan located in Balikpapan's central business district and government center. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Pembangunan Perumahan Properti Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk.

name: PT. Prima Alloy Steel Universal Tbk.
summary: PT. Prima Alloy Steel Universal Tbk manufactures and sells aluminum alloy wheels in Indonesia. It also exports its products to Europe, the United States, Africa, Australia, and Asia. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Sidoarjo, Indonesia.

name: PT Prodia Widyahusada Tbk
summary: PT Prodia Widyahusada Tbk provides private clinical laboratory services. The company offers laboratory and panel test services; and other diagnostics support services. It operates through a network of 151 branches and outlets in Indonesia. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT Prodia Widyahusada Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Prodia Utama.

name: PT Royal Prima Tbk
summary: PT Royal Prima Tbk provides hospital services in Indonesia. It also offers drugs and medical supplies. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT J Resources Asia Pasifik Tbk
summary: PT J Resources Asia Pasifik Tbk operates in gold mining sector primarily in Indonesia. The company is involved in the mining and sale of gold and silver. It also provides general trading services. The company was formerly known as PT Pelita Sejahtera Abadi and changed its name to PT J Resources Asia Pasifik Tbk in January 2012. PT J Resources Asia Pasifik Tbk was founded in 2002 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Prasidha Aneka Niaga Tbk
summary: PT Prasidha Aneka Niaga Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the processing and trading of agricultural products in Indonesia. It offers crumb rubber; and produces instant and roasted ground coffee products, and coffee beans. The company is also involved in the coffee plantation. It exports its products to the United States, Europe, and Asia. The company was formerly known as PT Aneka Bumi Asih and changed its name to PT Prasidha Aneka Niaga Tbk in 1994. PT Prasidha Aneka Niaga Tbk was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Palma Serasih Tbk
summary: PT Palma Serasih Tbk engages in plantation, processing, and production of crude palm oil in Indonesia. It also exports its products worldwide. PT Palma Serasih Tbk was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Red Planet Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Red Planet Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates hospitality business in Indonesia. It owns and operates various hotels located in Jakarta, Bekasi, Makassar, Palembang, Pekanbaru, Solo, and Surabaya. The company was formerly known as PT Pusako Tarinka Tbk and changed its name to PT Red Planet Indonesia Tbk in May 2014. PT Red Planet Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Pelita Samudera Shipping Tbk
summary: PT Pelita Samudera Shipping Tbk provides integrated logistics and shipping solutions primarily to the coal mining companies in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Time Charter of Tugboats and Barges, Floating Loading Facility, and Motor Vessel. The company engages in the inter-island coal transportation to various locations of coal-fired power plants and other industries, as well as floating loading facility and floating bulk unloader activities. It also owns 38 tug boats and 37 barges with a range of capacities ranging from 7,500 metric tons to 9,500 metric tons. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Bukit Asam Tbk
summary: PT Bukit Asam Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the coal mining activities in Indonesia. The company operates through two segments, Coal Mining and Other. Its coal mining activities include general surveying, exploration, exploitation, processing, refining, transportation, and trading. It manages special coal port facilities; operates steam power plants; and provides consulting services related to the coal mining industry and production. The company also offers briquette processing, mining services, oil palm plantation and processing, and health services. It also operates in India, Taiwan, China, Hong Kong, South Korea, Thailand, Malaysia, the Philippines, Japan, and Vietnam. The company was formerly known as PT Bukit Asam Persero Tbk and changed its name to PT Bukit Asam Tbk in November 2017. PT Bukit Asam Tbk was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Tanjung Enim Selatan, Indonesia. PT Bukit Asam Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Indonesia Asahan Aluminium.

name: PT Djasa Ubersakti Tbk
summary: PT Djasa Ubersakti Tbk engages in the construction business in Indonesia. Its project portfolio include apartments flats, hotels, shopping centers, factories, schools, and worship places. The company offers designing and building, cost estimation, value engineering, construction management, general contracting, and project management services; basic concept, master planning, site research and survey, preliminary design and layout, preliminary estimate, financial consultation, and schedule implementation; and job site management, project schedule management, project cost management, quality control, and environment and safety management services. PT Djasa Ubersakti Tbk was founded in 1971 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Indo Straits Tbk
summary: PT Indo Straits Tbk, together with its subsidiary, provides integrated marine engineering and logistics support services in Indonesia. It offers marine engineering services, including dredging, reclamation and piling works; construction of ports and jetty, piers, breakwaters, and sea walls; and shore protection, and other related marine works, as well as marine civil design and construction services. The company also provides marine support logistic services, such as coal barging, coal transshipment, and sea transportation services. It serves oil and gas, coal mining, and chemical industries, as well as construction and fabrication companies. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in North Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Indo Straits Tbk is a subsidiary of Straits Corporation Pte Ltd.

name: PT PP (Persero) Tbk
summary: PT PP (Persero) Tbk operates as a construction and investment company in Indonesia. The company operates through seven segments: Construction; Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC); Precast; Property and Reality; Equipment Rent Service; Infrastructure; and Energy. It develops high-rise buildings, roads and bridges, dams and irrigation projects, and power plants; and develops, constructs, and operates commercial buildings, hotels, apartments, office buildings, residential properties, shopping centers, trade centers, and other facilities. The company also provides EPC services focusing on energy, oil and gas, mining, and manufacturing sectors; provides building management services; and manufactures and sells precast concrete. PT PP (Persero) Tbk was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Pratama Widya Tbk
summary: PT Pratama Widya Tbk provides construction services in the areas of geotechnical engineering. The company's services include geotechnical investigation; deep foundations, such as bored pile, piling, injection pile, and loading test; retaining walls, such as soldier and contiguous pile, sheet pile, secant pile, and diaphragm wall works; grouting and soil improvements consisting of jet grouting, deep mixing, and soil cement stabilization works; slope reinforcement comprising soil nailing and shotcrete, ground anchor, and rock bolt works, as well as dewatering services; and engineering procurement construction works. It serves various development sectors, such as buildings, infrastructures, mining sites, factories, oil and gas sectors, dams, powerplants, and others. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.

name: PT Petrosea Tbk
summary: PT Petrosea Tbk provides engineering, construction, mining, and other services to the oil and gas, infrastructure, industrial and manufacturing, and utility sectors in Indonesia and internationally. It operates through three segments: Mining, Services, and Engineering and Construction. The Mining segment provides mining contract services, including overburden stripping, drilling, blasting, lifting, hauling, mine, and mine partnering services. The Services segment offers supply base facilities and port services. The Engineering and Construction segment provides a range of engineering, procurement, and construction services, including technical due diligence, feasibility studies, engineering design, project management, procurement and logistics, plant and equipment hire, and operation and commissioning services. This segment also supplies skilled trade personnel. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in South Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Petrosea Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Indika Energy Tbk.

name: PT Sat Nusapersada Tbk
summary: PT Sat Nusapersada Tbk provides electronic manufacturing services in Indonesia. The company offers metal stamping services for the electronics industry; management consulting services; and plastic molding and assembling services. It provides components, parts, and assemblies for network equipment and computers, consumer electronics and devices, multimedia peripherals, and automotive electronic components. The company also has operations in Singapore, Malaysia, Japan, the Philippines, Europe, and the United States. PT Sat Nusapersada Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Batam, Indonesia.

name: PT Pioneerindo Gourmet International Tbk
summary: PT Pioneerindo Gourmet International Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates a chain of restaurants in Indonesia. The company operates restaurants under the California Fried Chicken, Sapo Oriental, and Cal Donat trademarks; fried chicken restaurant; and ramen noodle restaurant under the Sugakiya brand name. It offers its services through its owned and franchised outlets. The company was formerly known as PT Putra Sejahtera Pioneerindo Tbk and changed its name to PT Pioneerindo Gourmet International Tbk in August 2001. PT Pioneerindo Gourmet International Tbk was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.

name: PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk
summary: PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk engages in the real estate development activities in Indonesia. It operates through Apartement Rental and Real Estate, and Hotel segments. The company sells apartments, office buildings, houses, and shophouses, as well as other buildings, such as land. It is also involved in the construction activities; and the rental of space/apartments. In addition, the company owns and operates hotels; and provides building management services. PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk was founded in 1980 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Istana Kuta Ratu Prestige.

name: PT Putra Rajawali Kencana Tbk
summary: PT Putra Rajawali Kencana Tbk operates as an intra logistic and multimode company in Indonesia and internationally. The company provides transportation management services, including the business of sending and/or packing of goods in large volumes through railroad, land, sea, and air transportation. It also offers multimodal transportation services comprising the transportation of goods using various modes of transportation. In addition, the company provides additional services in the form of freight forwarding, warehousing, cargo consolidation, cargo space, and customs clearance for multimodal transportation; rents and leases cars, buses, and trucks without option rights; and leases cars, trucks, and tow trucks without operational rights. Further, it trades in used cars consisting of special cars, such as ambulances, caravans, microbus, fire engines, etc.; and lorries, trailers, semi-trailers, and various other motorized transport vehicles. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia.

name: PT Trinitan Metals and Minerals Tbk
summary: PT Trinitan Metals and Minerals Tbk operates as a metal and mineral processing company in Indonesia. It offers pure, antimony, calcium, and tin lead products, as well as lead parts for use in various fields, including battery storage, pigments, solder, wire coatings, radiation protection materials, and medical devices; and other products. The company also provides silver for jewelry making, photosensitizers, electric contacts, electro plated products, conductive electronic products, and others; and antimony bullions and metals, and antimony alloys for use in fire resistant materials, paints, ceramics, electronics and rubber, anti-scratch mixtures, polystyrene, PVC, engineering plastics, rubber, paint, coatings, synthetic resins, and fibers. It also exports its products in Japan, India, China, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, and Fiji Island. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Bogor, Indonesia. PT Trinitan Metals and Minerals Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Trinitan Resourcetama Indonesia.

name: PT Puri Global Sukses Tbk
summary: PT Puri Global Sukses Tbk operates as a property developer in Indonesia. It develops residential and commercial units. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in Batam, Indonesia.

name: PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk
summary: PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk operates as a real estate developer primarily in Jakarta and Surabaya, Indonesia. It operates through Office, Shopping Center Business, and Service Apartment; Real Estate; and Hospitality segments. The company is involved in the land acquisition, development, marketing, and operational management of properties. Its property portfolio comprises retail, residential, commercial, and hospitality developments, as well as mixed-use developments of retail shopping malls, offices, condominiums, and hotels. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Surabaya, Indonesia. PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk is a subsidiary of PT. Pakuwon Arthaniaga.

name: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk
summary: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk develops, produces, and sells pharmaceuticals, vitamins, supplements, and traditional herbal care products in Indonesia. The company operates in two segments, Pharmaceutical Products and Toll Manufacturing Services, and Medical Equipments. It offers analgesic, antipiretic, anti anemic, anti fungal, anti hypertension, anti parkinsonism, anti rheumatics, anti inflammatory, anti tuberculotic, anti ulcerant and antasida, antibiotic, anticoagulant, anti platelet, fibrinolytic, anticonvulsant, antihistamine, antipsychotic, calcium w/vitamin, central muscle relaxant, cholesterol lowering, and cough and cold remedy products. The company also provides genito-urinary system, eye preparation, hematology, hepatoprotector, immunomodulator, multivitamin and mineral, neurological, nootropic and neurotonic, oral antidiabetics and corticosteroid, peripheral vasodilator and cerebral activator, supplement and adjuvant therapy, anti infective, anti virus, beta-adrenergic agonist bronchodilator, diuretic, hyperuricemia, and gout products, as well as antiemetic and GIT regulators. In addition, it trades in medical equipment. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Sarimelati Kencana Tbk.
summary: PT Sarimelati Kencana Tbk. operates Pizza Hut restaurants under a franchise agreement with Yum! Asia Franchise Pte. Ltd. in Indonesia. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 516 outlets in Jakarta and other cities in Indonesia. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Sarimelati Kencana Tbk. is a subsidiary of PT Sriboga Raturaya.

name: PT Rukun Raharja Tbk
summary: PT Rukun Raharja Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an integrated energy provider in Indonesia. It is involved in the distribution and storage of natural gas and fuel; operation and maintenance of gas facilities; gas transmission and compression activities; and electricity generation and supply activities. The company also offers supporting services for oil and natural gas mining; consultations on mining; port management, loading-unloading containers; leasing and management of building; supporting facilities of property companies; and development planning and supervision consultation services. In addition, it is involved in the development, management, and operation of gas infrastructure; gas transmission pipeline capacity trading; and building construction and trading. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Ramayana Lestari Sentosa Tbk
summary: PT Ramayana Lestari Sentosa Tbk operates a chain of department stores in Indonesia. It sells clothes, accessories, bags, shoes, cosmetics, household appliances, stationery, toys, and daily needs, as well as food products through the company's stores and supermarkets. The company also offers products online through www.ramayana.co.id. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 117 stores in 54 locations throughout Indonesia. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Ramayana Lestari Sentosa Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Ramayana Makmursentosa.

name: PT Supra Boga Lestari Tbk
summary: PT Supra Boga Lestari Tbk operates supermarkets in Indonesia. Its supermarkets offer meat, poultry, seafood, fruits, and vegetables, as well as other specialty products. The company operates its supermarket under the Ranch Market and Farmers Market names. It operates 48 stores consisting of 16 Ranch Markets, 29 Farmers Markets, 1 The Gourmet by Ranch Market, and 2 Day2Day by Farmers Market located in various cities in Jakarta, Jabodetabek, Surabaya, Malang, Balikpapan, Samarinda, Pekanbaru, Ambon, Dumai, and Palembang. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in West Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Ristia Bintang Mahkotasejati Tbk
summary: PT Ristia Bintang Mahkotasejati Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, develops housing projects in Indonesia. It sells residential buildings and land plots. The company develops housing projects under the name of Bintang Metropol in Bekasi, Mahkota Simprug in Tangerang, and Saung Riung in Karawang. PT Ristia Bintang Mahkotasejati Tbk was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Roda Vivatex Tbk
summary: PT Roda Vivatex Tbk, through its subsidiaries, engages in the rental of office spaces in Indonesia. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Repower Asia Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Repower Asia Indonesia Tbk engages in the development, buying, selling, and operating of real estate properties in Indonesia. PT Repower Asia Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Reliance Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Reliance Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk provides securities brokerage and underwriting services in Indonesia. The company also engages in the investment management business. PT Reliance Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia. PT Reliance Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Reliance Capital Management.

name: PT Ricky Putra Globalindo Tbk
summary: PT Ricky Putra Globalindo Tbk manufactures and sells underwear and fashion wear in Indonesia, Australia, the United States, Asia, Europe, Africa, and the Middle East. It operates through Manufacturing of Underwear and Fashion Wear, Trading, and Spinning Manufacturing segments. The company offers men's underwear under the Ricky, GT Man, Ricsony, GT Man Kid, GT Kid, GT Man Sport, and GT Ladies brands. It also provides outfits for children, as well as adolescent and adult women and men under international licenses and own brands, such as Transformer, Pokemon, Barbie, and Despicable Me. In addition, the company offers nightgowns, women's underwear, t-shirts, and polo shirts for children, as well as adolescent and adult women and men. Further, it provides knitting yarn comprising cotton knitting yarn and TC knitting yarns with various sizes; and knit fabrics products under the flag of PT Ricky Tekstil Indonesia. Additionally, the company engages in exporting apparel; and restaurant business. The company was formerly known as PT Ricky Putra Garmindo and changed its name to PT Ricky Putra Globalindo Tbk in June 1996. PT Ricky Putra Globalindo Tbk was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Bogor, Indonesia.

name: PT Rig Tenders Indonesia Tbk
