summary: PT Rig Tenders Indonesia Tbk provides marine logistics services for the oil and coal industry in Indonesia. It offers vessels to support operations such as seismic survey support; anchor handling; mobilization/de-mobilization towing; assisting and mooring of FPSO, FSO, tankers, platforms, and rigs; fire-fighting and oil spill recovery; running cargoes to platforms and rigs; general logistic support; food and fresh water supply; transportation for personnel, bulk, and deck cargoes; chartering of offshore accommodation barges; maintenance support; and protecting, patrolling, and supporting pipe line laying, as well as protecting oil and gas fields from unnecessary ships and boats. The company also offers coal services, which include transportation of ships in the port, as well as delivery services. In addition, it provides ship management services, including inward/outward clearance for vessels, offshore operation permits, entry/exit permits for crew and vessels, and crew changes. The company's fleet comprises 62 units of tugboats, flat tops, and discharging and self-discharging barges. The company was incorporated in 1974 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Rig Tenders Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Surya Indah Muara Pantai.

name: PT Jaya Sukses Makmur Sentosa Tbk
summary: PT Jaya Sukses Makmur Sentosa Tbk operates as a property developer in Indonesia. It develops and leases residential properties; and commercial properties, such as apartments, shopping centers, hotels, offices, industrial land, and warehouse properties. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Sidoarjo, Indonesia.PT Jaya Sukses Makmur Sentosa Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Tancorp Global Sentosa.

name: PT Bentoel Internasional Investama Tbk
summary: PT Bentoel Internasional Investama Tbk manufactures and distributes cigarettes in Indonesia and internationally. It offers a range of machine-made kretek, hand-made kretek, and white cigarettes under the Dunhill Filter, Dunhill Mild, Club Mild, Lucky Strike Mild, Neo Mild, Tali Jagat, Bintang Buana, Sejati, Star Mild, Uno Mild, Lucky Strike, Dunhill Regular, Dunhill Lights, and Dunhill Menthol brand names. The company was formerly known as PT Transindo Multi Prima Tbk and changed its name to PT Bentoel Internasional Investama Tbk in August 2000. The company was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Bentoel Internasional Investama Tbk is a subsidiary of British American Tobacco (2009 PCA) Ltd.

name: PT Rockfields Properti Indonesia Tbk.
summary: PT Rockfields Properti Indonesia Tbk. operates in the property and real estate sectors in Indonesia. It designs, develops, markets, and manages commercial and residential real estate projects, as well as acts as a contractor. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Pikko Land Development Tbk
summary: PT Pikko Land Development Tbk develops and sells real estate properties in Indonesia. It also invests in shares of stocks, and various property assets, such as land and apartment units. The company was formerly known as PT Royal Oak Development Asia Tbk and changed its name to PT Pikko Land Development Tbk in October 2012. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia.

name: PT Aesler Grup Internasional Tbk
summary: PT Aesler Grup Internasional Tbk provides architectural and construction management services in Indonesia. Its architectural services include architecture, urban, town, master, hospital, hotel, and commercial planning, as well as interior design. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk
summary: PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk manufactures, sells, and distributes breads in Indonesia and the Philippines. The company offers white/sliced breads, sweet/filled breads, and cakes under the Sari Roti brand. It sells its products to distributors and agents. The company was formerly known as PT Nippon Indosari Corporation and changed its name to PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk in 2003. PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia.

name: PT Radiant Utama Interinsco Tbk
summary: PT Radiant Utama Interinsco Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides technical support services to the oil and gas sector primarily in Indonesia. It operates through Operating Support Services, Inspection Services, Agency and Offshore Services, and Others segments. The company offers inspection and certification services, including non-destructive testing, oil country tubular goods, blasting and coating, statutory and voluntary inspection, and environmental study services; and technical support services, such as warehouse and camp maintenance, production and facilities maintenance, well intervention, and manpower supply services. It also provides agency and trading services comprising emergency response, integrated risk management, and storm alert services, as well as ALERT iResponse emergency management solution, a software that offers a map view of the asset regarding its resources and support infrastructure. In addition, the company offers strategic, commercial, and technical services; and oilfield equipment and services for the drilling and work over sector, as well as supplies drilling rig components, pressure control equipment, down hole tools, and tubulars. Further, it provides marine and construction services comprising dredging and lifting, river crossing and river bank repair and cement stabilized mud paste, and EPCI construction services; and offshore production facility services, asset management and operations, and offshore and dredging operations support services. Additionally, the company offers equipment exploration and local shipping services. It also engages in the new and renewable energy development business, such as geothermal, coal, and solar cell projects. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Steady Safe Tbk
summary: PT Steady Safe Tbk provides transportation services in Jakarta. It operates in two segments, Land Transportation and Financial Services. The company offers bus transportation services. It also engages in the provision of financing, limousine rental, and taxi services. The company was formerly known as PT. Tanda Widjaja Sakti and changed its name to PT Steady Safe Tbk in December 1993. PT Steady Safe Tbk was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Steady Safe Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Infiniti Wahana.

name: PT Sarana Meditama Metropolitan Tbk
summary: PT Sarana Meditama Metropolitan Tbk engages in the hospital management of OMNI Hospital Pulomas in Pulomas, East Jakarta. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Indonesia. As of December 1, 2020, PT Sarana Meditama Metropolitan Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi Tbk.

name: PT Saraswanti Anugerah Makmur, Tbk
summary: PT Saraswanti Anugerah Makmur, Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production and distribution of non-subsidized NPK Fertilizers. The company retails various fertilizers and pest eradication products, such as single artificial, compound and mixed, and natural fertilizers; and insecticides, fungicides, rodenticides, herbicides, nematicides, and akarisida. It is also involved in business brokerage activities that regulate the buying and selling of small and medium scale businesses, including professional practice, patent brokerage activities, and valuation activities for antiques, jewelry, and others; and account audits and information on goods or cargo rates, quantity measurement activities, and weather forecasting activities. In addition, the company engages in management and consulting activities that comprise strategic and organizational planning; financial decisions; marketing objectives and policies; human resource planning, practices, and policies; and production scheduling and control planning. It offers its fertilizer products under the FERTINDO, PUPINDO, PHONIKA, PLANTA PLUS, CORNALET, HALEI, PUKALET, KOKA, and PALMO brands. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Sidoarjo, Indonesia. PT Saraswanti Anugerah Makmur, Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Saraswanti Utama.

name: PT Satria Antaran Prima Tbk
summary: PT Satria Antaran Prima Tbk operates as an android-based shipping service company in Indonesia. It offers city and domestic courier; warehouse management; international express shipping and cargo; mailroom; land transportation; dedicated courier; ocean and air cargo; cash on delivery; same day and one day delivery; regular delivery; last mile delivery; and label, packaging, and wood packing services. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in East Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Kota Satu Properti Tbk
summary: PT Kota Satu Properti Tbk engages in property development activities in Indonesia. The company also engages in the management and trading of real estate property; land transportation; agriculture; provision of accommodation in the form of hotels and lodging services; and printing and workshop businesses. It also operates hotels under the allstay name and provides hotel management services. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Semarang, Indonesia.

name: PT Sejahtera Bintang Abadi Textile Tbk
summary: PT Sejahtera Bintang Abadi Textile Tbk manufactures and sells yarns using recycled materials primarily in Indonesia. It offers cotton open-end, ploy-cotton bleached open-end, ploy-cotton raw white open-end, ploy-cotton color open-end, mop, and ring-spun yarn products. The company's products are used as materials for mops, towels, denim fabrics, canvas fabrics, carpets, batik, and knitted gloves. It also exports its products to Asia, Europe, the Americas, and Africa. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Bandung, Indonesia.

name: PT Supreme Cable Manufacturing & Commerce Tbk
summary: PT Supreme Cable Manufacturing & Commerce Tbk manufactures and sells electrical cables, and insulation and melamine products in Indonesia and internationally. The company operates through cable, insulation and melamine segments. It offers building wires; low voltage power cables and bare conductors; and medium and high voltage power cables. It also provides fire resistant, armored, fire resistant corrugated, lead and armored, and other instrumentation cables; enameled wires; and OPGW and fiber optic, telecommunication, airport lighting, and fire resistant cables. In addition, the company manufactures pellet cross linked polyethylene and poly-vinyl chloride products; melamine, resin, and melamine sheet products; and plastic and cable reel products. Further, it is involved in the production of copper and aluminum wires and rods. PT Supreme Cable Manufacturing & Commerce Tbk offers its products under the SUPREME brand. The company was formerly known as PT Supreme Cable Manufacturing Corporation Tbk and changed its name to PT Supreme Cable Manufacturing & Commerce Tbk in October 2006. PT Supreme Cable Manufacturing & Commerce Tbk was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Surya Citra Media Tbk
summary: PT Surya Citra Media Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides multimedia services in Indonesia. The company owns SCTV and Indosiar television channels. It also provides soccer management, entertainment, and advertising services; and artist management services. In addition, the company engages in film and content trading, content management and production, production house, and multimedia operations; film production and video recording activities; and provision and utilization of multimedia through telecommunications equipment. Further, it offers film distribution and marketing services; content creative; animation production services; film recording services; and information technology, promotion and marketing, general telecommunication, management agency and production, public relations, and mass media and audio recording services. Additionally, the company provides online media, printed and electronic media, and impresario services; and rental and management services. The company was formerly known as PT Cipta Aneka Selaras and changed its name to PT Surya Citra Media Tbk in January 2002. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Surya Citra Media Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi Tbk.

name: PT Selaras Citra Nusantara Perkasa Tbk
summary: PT Selaras Citra Nusantar Perkasa Tbk produces and sells household appliance products and medical equipment in Indonesia. It offers blenders, electric irons, gas stoves, electric fans, and air purifiers. The company is based in Bogor, Indonesia. PT Selaras Citra Nusantar Perkasa Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Sena Dwimakmur.

name: PT Sidomulyo Selaras Tbk
summary: PT Sidomulyo Selaras Tbk engages in the transportation and storage of toxic and hazardous chemicals in Indonesia. It primarily transports chemicals, oil, and gas. The company also engages in buying and selling spare parts of trucking vehicles, as well as in the customs clearance, isotank washing and repair, and isotank rental activities. It primarily serves companies operating in the upstream chemical industry that produce basic chemicals for domestic and export markets. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Millennium Pharmacon International Tbk
summary: PT Millennium Pharmacon International Tbk engages in the distribution and trading of prescription and non-prescription medicines, food supplements, and medical devices in Indonesia and internationally. The company distributes its products through hospitals, drug stores, pharmacies, and modern markets. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 32 branch offices in Java, Bali, Sumatera, Kalimantan, and Sulawesi Islands. The company was formerly known as PT NVPD Soedarpo Corporation Tbk and changed its name to PT Millennium Pharmacon International Tbk in February 1990. The company was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Millennium Pharmacon International Tbk is a subsidiary of Pharmaniaga International Corporation Sdn. Bhd.

name: PT Bank Woori Saudara Indonesia 1906 Tbk
summary: PT Bank Woori Saudara Indonesia 1906 Tbk provides various commercial banking products and services for individuals and businesses in Indonesia. It operates through Pensioner, Employee, Commercial, Treasury, Funding, and Others segments. The company offers current and savings accounts; time and demand deposits; commercial, pension/retirement, employee general, mortgage, corporate, and car loans, as well as loans for micro, small, and medium enterprises; and bank guarantees. It also provides wealth management; treasury products comprising foreign exchange (forex), money market, fixed income, and update information services on currency exchange rates; and payment services through automatic teller machines and digital banking channels. In addition, the company offers remittance forex transfer and collection; fund transfer; bancassurance; international banking; export and import; safe deposit box; trade finance; Internet and mobile banking; state revenue; and electronic data capture services. Further, it invests in placements and securities. The company was founded in 1906 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Bank Woori Saudara Indonesia 1906 Tbk is a subsidiary of Woori Bank.

name: PT Surya Fajar Capital Tbk
summary: PT Surya Fajar Capital Tbk provides financial advisory services. The company offers advisory services in the areas of pre-IPO restructuring, group restructuring, debt restructuring, mergers and acquisitions, and IPO and back door listing, as well as on right issues, venture capital, private placements, tailor made financing, medium term notes, and bank loans. PT Surya Fajar Capital Tbk was founded in 2015 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk
summary: PT Sumber Global Energy offers coal trading services. The company is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Sampoerna Agro Tbk
summary: PT Sampoerna Agro Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates oil palm and rubber plantations, and palm oil mills in South Sumatera, West Kalimantan, Central Kalimantan, and Riau, Indonesia. The company offers crude palm oil, palm kernel, and germinated oil palm seeds, as well as non-palm oil products, such as rubber and sago starch. It is also involved in the utilization of forestry products; provision of management consultation service; and wholesale trade activities. The company produces and sells its oil palm seeds under the DxP Sriwijaya brand; and sago starch under the brand name Prima Starch. As of September 30, 2020, it total planted area included 119,176 hectares of oil palm inti plantations, sago plantations, and rubber plantations. The company was formerly known as PT Selapan Jaya and changed its name to PT Sampoerna Agro Tbk in 2007. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Palembang, Indonesia. PT Sampoerna Agro Tbk is a subsidiary of Sampoerna Agri Resources Pte. Ltd.

name: PT Hotel Sahid Jaya International Tbk
summary: PT Hotel Sahid Jaya International Tbk engages in the hotel and accommodation businesses in Indonesia. It also leases facilities related to the hotel business; and offers management and other services for hotel and tourism sectors. PT Hotel Sahid Jaya International Tbk was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Hotel Sahid Jaya International Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Empu Sahid International.

name: PT Sillo Maritime Perdana Tbk
summary: PT Sillo Maritime Perdana Tbk provides shipping and agency services. The company is also involved in the offshore support vessel rental and leasing business in the upstream oil and gas industry. In addition, it provides sea transportation and trading services. As of December 31, 2018, it had a fleet of 15 vessels. PT Sillo Maritime Perdana Tbk was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk
summary: PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk provides herbal medicines, cosmetics, and foods and beverages related to health in Indonesia and internationally. The company produces various medicines consisting of ethical products, OTC products, food supplements, and medical herbs. Its products include Anacetine, a medicine to reduce fever; Combicitrine, a medicine for bacteries/worms removal; Berlosid, a medicine for gastric pains; Anabion multivitamins for children; Suprabion multivitamins for adults; and Telon Oil. The company also manufactures herbal extracts, as well as offers confectionary products, energy and health drinks, and other products. In addition, it is involved in commerce and land transportation activities. The company was founded in 1940 and is headquartered in Semarang, Indonesia. PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Hotel Candi Baru.

name: PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk
summary: PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides healthcare services in Indonesia. It also engages in setting up and managing hospitals. The company offers specialist and general medical services, including complex surgical procedures, laboratory services, radiology and imaging services, diagnostic, and emergency services. Its hospitals provide services in the areas of pediatrics, neurosciences, general surgery, emergency, nephrology, cardiology, oncology, obstetrics and gynecology, gastroenterology, ophthalmology, pulmonology, internal medicines, otolaryngology, orthopedics, urology, anesthesiology, dentistry, dermatology, geriatric and nuclear medicines, pathology, plastic surgery, and psychiatry. The company operates 39 hospitals with 8,394 beds in Sumatra, Java, Bali, Kalimantan, Sulawesi, Nusa Tenggara Timur, Nusa Tenggara Barat, and Bangka. In addition, it engages in trading, development, mining, agriculture, service, land transportation, industry, workshop printing, plantation, forestry, electrical, mechanical, engineering, construction, agribusiness, and real estate businesses; computer programming activities; provision of management consulting, trust, financing, financial entities, retail, professional, and scientific and technical activities; and web portal and/or digital platform business. The company was formerly known as PT Sentralindo Wirasta. PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.

name: PT Salim Ivomas Pratama Tbk
summary: PT Salim Ivomas Pratama Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an integrated producer of edible oils and fats in Indonesia, China, Singapore, Nigeria, Timor Leste, the Philippines, Germany, Myanmar, and internationally. It operates through two segments, Plantations; and Edible Oil and Fats. The Plantations segment is primarily involved in the development and maintenance of oil palm, rubber, sugar cane, and timber plantations; and processing, marketing, and selling of finished goods and related products. This segment also develops and maintains cocoa, coconut, agroforestry, and tea plantations. The Edible Oil and Fats segment produces, markets, and sells edible oils, margarines, shortening, fats, and other related products, as well as crude palm oil refining and fractionation. The company also provides transportation, investment and research management, and technical services; and artificial primary macronutrients mix fertilizers. In addition, it engages in the bulking station business; oil palm seed breeding activities; and invests in agricultural technology and cultivation business, as well as engages in the agriculture, marketing and research, fishery and trading, and house prefabrication activities. PT Salim Ivomas Pratama Tbk offers its products under the Bimoli, Bimoli Spesial, Delima, Happy, Palmia, Amanda, Simas, Malinda, and Mahakam brand names. The company was formerly known as PT Ivomas Pratama and changed its name to PT Salim Ivomas Pratama Tbk in February 1994. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Salim Ivomas Pratama Tbk is a subsidiary of Indofood Agri Resources Ltd.

name: PT Singaraja Putra Tbk
summary: PT Singaraja Putra Tbk engages in the wood and accommodation services businesses in Indonesia, the Netherlands, France, Belgium, and the United States. It is also involved in the trading business. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Bekasi, Indonesia.

name: PT Sreeya Sewu Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Sreeya Sewu Indonesia Tbk engages in breeding to produce commercial chickens, chicken slaughter, and integrated chicken processing with cold storage in Indonesia. It operates through Poultry Feeds; Breeder and Farm; and Dressed Chicken and Frozen Foods segments. The company offers broiler, layer, breeder, concentrate, quail, and bird feed; and other type of feeds in the form of flour, pellet, crumble, and expander. It also operates day old chick (DOC) breeding and hatchery farms, which are cultivated by broiler and layer farmers to produce live birds; and slaughterhouses that produce live birds from DOC broilers. In addition, the company offers dressed chicken products to various supermarkets, hypermarkets, restaurants, café, and other outlets; and frozen food, including processed chicken, chicken nuggets, sausages, corned and meatballs under the Royal, Belfoods, and Uenakk brand names. Further, it is involved in the food processing industry; and distribution and trading of poultry equipment, raw materials, feedmill, and other products. The company was formerly known as PT Sierad Produce Tbk and changed its name to PT Sreeya Sewu Indonesia Tbk in September 2020. The company was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Sreeya Sewu Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Great Giant Pineapple.

name: PT Sekar Bumi Tbk
summary: PT Sekar Bumi Tbk processes, produces, trades in, and distributes frozen food products in Indonesia. The company offers block packing, raw, and cooked shrimp, as well as cooked and peeled prawns; beef balls, sea food, fish balls, fish shiumai, hakau, kekian, martabak, mini wonton, nuggets, puffs, samosa, sausage, shiumai, shrimp balls, shrimp shiumai, spring rolls, and squid balls; and cheese and vegetable fish cake, brosur bumifood, dumpling ayam and udang, fish tofu, fish cake laksa recipe, scallop, shrimp and fish dumpling, and shumai. It also processes cashew nuts and other nut products; and bread crumbs and breaded shrimps. In addition, the company is involved in the agriculture, fisheries, aquaculture, trading, transportation, construction, services, printing, and workshop businesses. PT Sekar Bumi Tbk sells its products under the FINNA, SKB, Bumifood, and Mitraku brands. The company also exports its products to the United States, Europe, and other Asian countries. PT Sekar Bumi Tbk was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Sekar Laut Tbk
summary: PT Sekar Laut Tbk produces and sells crackers, tomato and chili sauces, breads, and ready to use seasonings in Indonesia and internationally. The company provides cashew nuts, rice been and other beens, sardines, condiments, cooking spices, and Melinjo products under the Finna brand name. It also involved in the trading of consumer goods; and restaurant business. In addition, the company exports its products to the Netherlands, Korea, England, Oceania, China, and internationally. PT Sekar Laut Tbk was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia.

name: PT Superkrane Mitra Utama Tbk
summary: PT Superkrane Mitra Utama Tbk engages in the rental and trading of heavy equipment and accessories in Indonesia. The company leases crawler cranes, crawler telescopic boom cranes, rough terrain and all terrain cranes, truck mounted cranes, and cargo cranes; tele handlers; man lifts and man lifts crawlers; forklifts; scissor lifts; and multi axle products and truck trailers. It also provides lifting and rigging solutions for the construction/infrastructure, maintenance, mining, and petrochemical industries; and heavy construction services and engineering solutions. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in North Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Superkrane Mitra Utama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Sumi Traktor Perkasa.

name: PT Gaya Abadi Sempurna Tbk
summary: PT Gaya Abadi Sempurna Tbk develops and trades in electric vehicles and electronic products in Indonesia. It offers electric bicycles and motors, and MTB electric bicycles; and fans and LED light products. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Gaya Abadi Sempurna Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Selis Investama Indonesia.

name: PT Sinar Mas Agro Resources and Technology Tbk
summary: PT Sinar Mas Agro Resources and Technology Tbk engages in the cultivation and harvesting of oil palm in Indonesia. The company also processes fresh fruit bunches into crude palm oil (CPO) and palm kernel; and refines CPO into value-added products, such as cooking oil, margarine, shortening, oleo-chemicals, and biodiesel. It offers cooking oil under the Filma, Mitra, Kunci Mas, and Palmvita names; margarines under the Palmboom, Palmboom Cake, Filma Prestige, Filma, Filma Danish Pastry, Menara, Menara Cream, Mitra, Smart Baker, and Palmvita names; and shortening products under the Filma Puff Pastry, Filma Baker's Cream Fat, Filma Butter Oil Substitute, Delicio White Baker's Fat, Filma GoodFry Deep Frying Fat, Goodfry Semi Liquid Frying Oil, Palmvita Deep Frying Fat, Palmvita White Fat, Palmvita Baker's Fat, Palmvita Gold Butter Oil Substitute, Menara, Menara Baker's Fat, Red Rose, and Filma Pusaka White Baker's Fat names. The company also provides specialty fats under the i-Soc CBS, i-Soc PCF, i-Soc CF, Delicio Coating Fat, and Delicio Toffee Fat names. In addition, it offers fractioned fatty acids, distilled fatty acids, glycerine, and soap noodles under the Sinar name; and palm kernel meals, olein, stearin, cocoa butter substitute, and soybean oil and soybean meals. Further, the company is involved in the cultivation of ornamental plants; provision of transportation services; and organic, oleo chemical, and bio energy businesses. As of December 31, 2018, it had a total planted area of approximately 106,637 hectares. The company was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Sinar Mas Agro Resources and Technology Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Purimas Sasmita.

name: PT Semen Baturaja (Persero) Tbk
summary: PT Semen Baturaja (Persero) Tbk produces and distributes cement in Indonesia. The company offers ordinary Portland cement type I, II, and V, as well as Portland composite cement. It also engages in the trading, construction, and land logistics businesses. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Palembang, Indonesia.

name: PT Solusi Bangun Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Solusi Bangun Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production and distribution of cement, ready-mixed concrete, and aggregates in Indonesia and internationally. It operates through three segments: Cement, Ready-mix Concrete and Aggregates Quarry, and Other Construction Services. The company provides other construction and consulting services. In addition, it is involved in mining activities; waste management services used as alternative fuel and raw materials; and aggregate quarry and construction activities. The company was formerly known as PT Holcim Indonesia Tbk and changed its name to PT Solusi Bangun Indonesia Tbk in March 2019. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Solusi Bangun Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk.

name: PT Suryamas Dutamakmur Tbk
summary: PT Suryamas Dutamakmur Tbk engages in the real estate activities in Indonesia. It operates through Real Estate and Property, Golf and Country Club, Estate Management, Hotel, and Investment and Others segments. The company is involved in the sale of land and houses; and operation of the golf courses, country clubs, hotels, and other resort facilities located in Rancamaya, Bogor, West Java. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Suryamas Dutamakmur Tbk is a subsidiary of Top Global Limited.

name: PT Samudera Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Samudera Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides shipping, ports, logistics, and services in Indonesia, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, India, and internationally. The company operates through Shipping and agency, Logistics and ports, and Others segments. It is involved in shipping services that includes liner and feeder services; fleet of vessels, including bulk carriers, LNG, and gas and chemical tankers; offshore support, salvage, and underwater works; bunker supply; and project-related shipping services to the oil and gas industry. The company also engages in crew management, ship management, shipping agency services, and docking space, ship repair, new construction, and fabrication of marine and industrial components. The company was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Samudera Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Samudera Indonesia Tangguh.

name: PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk
summary: PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk manufactures, packs, and distributes cement in Indonesia and internationally. It operates through Cement Production and Non-Cement Production segments. The company is also involved in limestone and clay mining; cement bag manufacturing; industrial real estate development and building rental; ready-mix concrete and aggregates quarry production; and mining, trading, transportation, and construction activities. In addition, it engages in the information system, investment, freight forwarding, stevedoring, sea transportation service, logistic management, and outsourcing businesses, as well as procures public goods and services. PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk was formerly known as PT Semen Gresik (Persero) Tbk and changed its name to PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk in January 2013. The company was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Danantara Asset Management (Persero).

name: PT Satyamitra Kemas Lestari Tbk
summary: PT Satyamitra Kemas Lestari Tbk provides integrated carton packaging solutions in Indonesia. It offers corrugated carton boxes, pre-print, offset, and rigid boxes; and truck rental and logistics services. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Satyamitra Kemas Lestari Tbk is a subsidiary of Satyamitra Investindo Pratama.

name: PT Sinar Mas Multiartha Tbk
summary: PT Sinar Mas Multiartha Tbk provides various financial services to individual and corporate clients in Indonesia. The company's services include banking, insurance, financing, capital markets, asset management, share administration, security, and information technology. It offers savings accounts; call, time, and demand deposits; foreign exchange; mutual funds; bancassurance; corporate and personal credit cards; bank guarantee; loan products, including micro, working capital, investment, non-collateral, agricultural, and multi-purpose loan; supply chain financing; consumer financing; import and export bill; telegraphic transfer; and mobile and internet banking, as well as automatic teller machine, safe deposit box, payroll, and money transfer services. The company also provides life and general insurance, insurance agency, securities and share registry, asset management, commodity trading, factoring, leasing, investment financing, and fund management services. In addition, it is involved in trading and service, auction house, property, clinic, and workshop activities. The company was formerly known as PT Internas Artha Finance Company and changed its name to PT Sinar Mas Multiartha Tbk in February 1995. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Sinar Mas Multiartha Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Sinar Mas Cakrawala.

name: PT Golden Eagle Energy Tbk
summary: PT Golden Eagle Energy Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the coal mining business in Indonesia. The company owns interests in a coal concession that covers an area of 3,238 hectares located in Samarinda, East Kalimantan; and three coal concessions covering 2.143 hectares located in Musi Rawas Regency, South Sumatera province. It also offers mining support and coal transportation services. In addition, the company exports its products. The company was formerly known as PT Eatertainment International Tbk and changed its name to PT Golden Eagle Energy Tbk in August 2012. PT Golden Eagle Energy Tbk was founded in 1980 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Summarecon Agung Tbk
summary: PT Summarecon Agung Tbk engages in the development and management of real estate properties in Indonesia. The company operates through Property Development, Investment Property, Leisure and Hospitality, and Others segments. It develops and sells houses, commercial buildings, apartments, and residential land and commercial shop plots; manages and leases properties; and provides recreational club facilities. The company develops townships; rents shophouses and office buildings; owns leisure and hospitality facilities, such as sports clubs and hotels; and provides health and estate management services. In addition, it manages residential apartments, offices, and other building facilities; and develops infrastructure facilities. Further, the company operates gas stations and hospitals; retails food and beverages; and provides education, as well as trading services. PT Summarecon Agung Tbk was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk
summary: PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk manufactures and sells spare parts and automotive components. It operates through five segments: Filter, Radiator, Body Maker, Trading, and Others. The company offers radiators; hydraulic and automotive components, including body maker, dump truck, tank, box, trailer, and dump hoist; and fuel tank, muffler, oil, cooler, condenser, exhaust system, and brake and fuel pipe products, as well as filters for automotive, commercial, heavy equipment, marine, industrial, construction equipment, and gas turbine applications. It also assembles dump trucks, trailers, mixers, and other special purpose vehicles; and manufactures rubber O-rings, polyurethanes, and plastisol adhesives for automotive industries. The company markets its products under the Sakura Filter brand name. It exports its products to approximately 120 countries worldwide. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Adrindo Intiperkasa.

name: PT Sunter Lakeside Hotel Tbk
summary: PT Sunter Lakeside Hotel Tbk operates a 4-star luxury hotel in North Jakarta. Its hotel provides guest rooms and suites, as well as various facilities and amenities, which include Internet, meeting rooms, banquet ballrooms, gym and fitness center, swimming pool, tennis courts, airport shuttle services, and others. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Soechi Lines Tbk
summary: PT Soechi Lines Tbk provides shipping and marine transportation services in Indonesia. The company operates through two segments, Shipping and Shipyard. It charters vessels to the oil and gas, and chemical companies. The company operates a fleet of 35 vessels. It also operates a shipyard, which offers ship maintenance, repair, and overhauling vessels service, as well as new shipbuilding services. In addition, the company provides management and business consulting services; and engages in investment and other business activities. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Soechi Lines Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Soechi Group.

name: Waran Seri I Boston Furniture I
PT Boston Furniture Industries Tbk
summary: PT Boston Furniture Industries Tbk manufactures and sales furniture products for home in Indonesia. The company is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia with additional location in Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Soho Global Health Tbk
summary: PT Soho Global Health Tbk operates as a healthcare company in Indonesia. The company researches, develops, and markets specialty-focused medicines for use in the therapeutic areas of immunomodulator, respiratory, inflammation, and liver diseases; offers nonprescription brand products to treat and prevent diseases; and provides contract manufacturing services for various dosage forms, as well as distribution and logistics services. It also offers body defense, stamina and vitality, brain nutrient, eye health, skin care, weight management, and wellness products; sells and markets medical devices and medical equipment products in the areas of wound care, hospital general care, surgery, orthopedics, and in-vitro diagnostics; and provides product registration, marketing intelligence, sales, and marketing support services. The company was founded in 1946 and is based in Jakarta Timur, Indonesia.

name: PT Sona Topas Tourism Industry Tbk
summary: PT Sona Topas Tourism Industry Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides travel related services in Indonesia. It operates through three divisions: Tours, Duty Free Shops, and Retail Shops. The company operates duty free shops in Bali and retail shops in Jakarta and Bali. It also sells tours and travel tickets, as well as handles related documents and tours. The company was formerly known as PT Sona Topas and changed its name to PT Sona Topas Tourism Industry Tbk in October 1990. PT Sona Topas Tourism Industry Tbk was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Shield on Service Tbk
summary: PT Shield on Service Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides outsourcing services in Indonesia. It operates through Security Services, Cleaning Services, Human Resource Provider, Parking Services, and Others segments. The company offers security services comprising security management and guarding, security consultancy, corporate and personnel review, and security personnel training services; and cleaning and maintenance services, including daily, full-package, special, and mobile cleaning, as well as landscape/garden maintenance services. It also provides human resource solutions that include talent development, recruitment assessment, and compensation and benefit services; and parking management services, such as parking, valet, car park management, traffic design consultancy, and parking equipment maintenance services. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia.

name: PT Satria Mega Kencana Tbk
summary: PT Satria Mega Kencana Tbk, through its subsidiaries, operates hotels under the Sotis brand in Indonesia. It also owns and leases real estate properties; and offers food and beverages. In addition, the company is involved in the professional, scientific, and technical activities, as well as construction services. Further, it provides spa services. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Suparma Tbk
summary: PT Suparma Tbk manufactures and sells paper and packaging paper products in Indonesia. The company's paper products include laminated wrapping and brown Kraft, and sandwiched ribbed Kraft recycle papers; white papers; and carton papers. It also provides bathroom, facial, napkin, and carrier tissues; hand, hand roll, industrial and clinical roll, and kitchen towels; and OEM products. In addition, the company exports its products. The company was formerly known as PT Supar Inpama and changed its name to PT Suparma Tbk in December 1978. PT Suparma Tbk was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia.

name: PT Surya Pertiwi Tbk
summary: PT Surya Pertiwi Tbk distributes bathroom and kitchen products. The company offers sanitary wares, porcelain, fittings, kitchen products, and household appliances. It also engages in the construction activities. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.

name: PT Wilton Makmur Indonesia Tbk.
summary: PT Wilton Makmur indonesia Tbk., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, production, and mining of gold in Indonesia. It holds interest in the Ciemas Gold Project located in Sukabumi Regency, West Java Province, Indonesia. The company was formerly known as PT Renuka Coalindo Tbk and changed its name to PT Wilton Makmur indonesia Tbk. in October 2019. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Wilton Makmur indonesia Tbk. is a subsidiary of Wilton Resources Holding Pte. Ltd.

name: PT Sejahteraraya Anugrahjaya Tbk
summary: PT Sejahteraraya Anugrahjaya Tbk operates private hospitals in Tangerang and South Jakarta, Indonesia. It operates through two segment; In-Patient and Out-Patient services. The company operates its hospitals under the Mayapada Hospital name, offers support facilities. The company was formerly known as PT Sejahtera Raya Anugrah and changed its name to PT Sejahteraraya Anugrahjaya Tbk in December 1992. PT Sejahteraraya Anugrahjaya Tbk was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Sejahteraraya Anugrahjaya Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Surya Cipta Inti Cemerlang.

name: PT Sri Rejeki Isman Tbk
summary: PT Sri Rejeki Isman Tbk operates as a textile and garment company in Indonesia. It operates through Spinning, Weaving, Finishing Fabric, and Garment segments. The company provides yarn to textile customers; greige; finished fabric; and military and corporate uniforms. It offers its products in the United States, China, Japan, South Korea, Malaysia, Brunei Darussalam, Timor Leste, Singapore, Nepal, the Philippines, South Africa, the United Arab Emirates, Australia, New Zealand, Germany, Austria, England, Bangladesh, and India. The company was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Surakarta, Indonesia. PT Sri Rejeki Isman Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Huddleston Indonesia.

name: PT Indo Acidatama Tbk
summary: PT Indo Acidatama Tbk produces and sells basic and agro chemicals primarily in Indonesia. The company offers ethanol, acetic acid, and ethyl acetate products; and organic plus bio fertilizers under the POMI and BEKA names. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as PT Sarasa Nugraha Tbk and changed its name to PT Indo Acidatama Tbk in May 2006. PT Indo Acidatama Tbk was founded in 1982 and is based in West Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Saratoga Investama Sedaya Tbk
summary: PT Saratoga Investama Sedaya Tbk is a private equity and venture capital firm specializing in early stage, growth stage and special situations investments. It primarily invests in natural resources, energy, infrastructure, telecommunication, shipping, pharmaceutical, retail, food and beverage, and consumer goods sectors. The firm seeks to make investments in Indonesia. It focuses on acquisitions that are six to eight times EBITDA. The firm seeks to hold its investments for a period of three to five years. Saratoga Capital Investment was founded in 1997 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia with an additional office in Singapore, Singapore.

name: PT Surya Semesta Internusa Tbk
summary: PT Surya Semesta Internusa Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the construction business. The company operates through five divisions: Construction of Industrial Estates, Real Estate and Rental Buildings, Building Construction, Investment in Other Companies, and Hotels. It engages in the property, development, and management of industrial estates, real estate, buildings, and commercial centers; provision of construction and general contractor services for commercial buildings, mining, and infrastructure; and development and management of hotels and resorts, as well as hospitality and industrial estate development activities. The company owns approximately 10 hotels under the Gran Meli√É¬° Jakarta and Meli√É¬° Bali Hotels, Banyan Tree Ungasan Resort, The Plaza Hotel Glodok, and BATIQA Hotels brands. It engages in the rental of office buildings and shopping centers; and trading, development, transportation, agriculture, mining and services, and building construction activities. The company was formerly known as PT Multi Investments Limited and changed its name to PT Surya Semesta Internusa Tbk in 1995. PT Surya Semesta Internusa Tbk was founded in 1971 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Sawit Sumbermas Sarana Tbk.
summary: PT Sawit Sumbermas Sarana Tbk., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production and sale of crude palm oil, fresh fruit bunches, palm kernel oil, and palm kernel in Indonesia. The company operates oil palm plantations and a palm oil mill. It is also involved in the provision of consulting and trading services. PT Sawit Sumbermas Sarana Tbk. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Pangkalan Bun, Indonesia.

name: PT Sunson Textile Manufacturer Tbk
summary: PT Sunson Textile Manufacturer Tbk engages in the manufacturing and selling yarn, fabric, and other textile products in Indonesia. The company operates in three segments: Spinning, Weaving, and Others. It also provides general trading services. The company also exports its products in rest of Asia, Europe, the Americas, and Africa. PT Sunson Textile Manufacturer Tbk was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Bandung, Indonesia.

name: PT Buana Artha Anugerah Tbk
summary: PT Buana Artha Anugerah Tbk engages in the wholesale trade and export of thread, cotton, and fiber primarily in Indonesia. It also processes synthetic fibers. The company was formerly known as PT Star Petrochem, Tbk and changed its name to PT Buana Artha Anugerah Tbk in June 2019. PT Buana Artha Anugerah Tbk was founded in 2008 and is based in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Siantar Top Tbk
summary: PT Siantar Top Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells snacks in Indonesia. It operates in two segments, Food Processing and Others. The company offers biscuits, rice, coffee, instant and snack noodles, pellets, vermicelli, crackers, wafers, and candies, as well as flour and seasoning products. It also exports its products in Asia and the Middle East. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Sidoarjo, Indonesia. PT Siantar Top Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Shindo Tiara Tunggal.

name: PT SLJ Global Tbk
summary: PT SLJ Global Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the timber manufacturing, power, and logging businesses in the United States, Indonesia, East Asia, Europe, Australia, and Southeast Asia. It operates through Timber manufacturing, and power plant and logging segments. It manages six natural forest concessions of 770,455 hectares. The company also engages in the industrial plywood and medium density fibre board, as well as mining businesses. In addition, it operates a power plant with a total capacity of 22.5 megawatts. The company was formerly known as PT Sumalindo Lestari Jaya Tbk and changed its name to PT SLJ Global Tbk in December 2012. PT SLJ Global Tbk was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Solusi Tunas Pratama Tbk
summary: PT Solusi Tunas Pratama Tbk operates as an independent tower company in Indonesia. The company operates and rents base transceiver station (BTS) tower buildings or telecommunications towers, and other related telecommunication infrastructure. It operates greenfield and rooftop telecommunication towers, including four-legged supporting towers, three-legged self-supporting towers, camouflage towers, monopoles, and roof top towers, as well as mobile BTS. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Solusi Tunas Pratama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Kharisma Indah Ekaprima.

name: PT Super Energy Tbk
summary: PT Super Energy Tbk, through its subsidiaries, produces and distributes oil and gas in Indonesia. The company processes natural gas into condensate, liquefied petroleum gas, lean gas, and compressed natural gas (CNG). It also trades in and distributes fuel and CNG; and offers transportation services for mining and other petroleum products, as well as operates CNG station. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Sriwahana Adityakarta Tbk
summary: PT Sriwahana Adityakarta Tbk manufactures and sells corrugated carton packaging solutions. It offers corrugated carton for use in transport, consumer, non-direct contact food, and non-food packaging applications; paper cones; and paper tubes. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Boyolali, Indonesia. PT Sriwahana Adityakarta Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Sumber Makmur Lumintu.

name: PT Tunas Alfin Tbk
summary: PT Tunas Alfin Tbk manufactures and sells packaging products in Indonesia. The company offers dry and wet, wax, extrusion, and solventless lamination; paper and board metalizing; and printing services, as well as produces release paper and adhesive coating products. It serves cigarette, consumer food, and health and hygiene products manufacturing industries. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Tunas Alfin Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Proinvestindo.

name: PT Lancartama Sejati Tbk
summary: PT Lancartama Sejati TBK provides construction services in Indonesia. It operates as a general contractor for residential and commercial properties, as well as an infrastructural contractor for agricultural and manufacture companies. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Pelayaran Tamarin Samudra Tbk
summary: PT Pelayaran Tamarin Samudra Tbk operates as an integrated offshore shipping company in Indonesia. The company's services include offshore marine support services, marine equipment chatering, chartering, re-chartering, accommodation work barge, and anchor handling tug supply services. It serves the oil and gas industry. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Pelayaran Tamarin Samudra Tbk is a subsidiary of Pt Andalan Lepas Pantai.

name: PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk
summary: PT Triputra Agro Persada engages in the oil palm plantations and palm oil processing businesses in Indonesia. The company produces crude palm oil and palm kernel products. It also engages in rubber plantations business. The company was formerly known as PT. Alam Permata Indah and changed its name to PT Triputra Agro Persada in March 2005. PT Triputra Agro Persada was founded in 2005 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Sitara Propertindo Tbk
summary: PT Sitara Propertindo Tbk primarily engages in the development of properties in Indonesia. The company constructs commercial and residential properties. PT Sitara Propertindo Tbk company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in West Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Express Transindo Utama Tbk
summary: PT Express Transindo Utama Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides land transportation services in Indonesia. The company offers regular taxi services under the Express Taxi Regular and Eagle Taxi brand name; premium taxi services under the Tiara Express brand; and value added transportation business services, including limousine rental services under the Limousine Express brand name and bus rental services under the Eagle High brand name. It operates a fleet of approximately 8,000 licensed taxis in the Greater Jakarta area, as well as in other cities, such as Medan, Surabaya, Semarang, Bandung, Bali, and Lombok. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in West Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Express Transindo Utama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Rajawali Corpora.

name: PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk
summary: PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk provides telecommunication infrastructure solution and services in Indonesia. It leases antenna and other equipment space to Indonesian telecommunications operators for wireless signal transmission related to wireless voice and data transmission. The company also owns and operates distributed antennae system (DAS) networks installed in a building for wireless communications for telecommunications operators in shopping malls and office buildings. As of December 31, 2019, it had 28,740 tenants; and 15,589 telecommunications sites comprising 15,473 telecommunications towers and 116 DAS networks. The company was formerly known as PT Banyan Mas. PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Tunas Baru Lampung Tbk
summary: PT Tunas Baru Lampung Tbk primarily manufactures and sells vegetable cooking oils in Indonesia. It operates through Plantations and Manufacturing segments. The company offers palm cooking oil, palm kernel oil, crude palm oil, stearine, fatty acid, crude coconut oil, glycerin, margarine, molasses, and sugar, as well as biodiesel, and laundry and cream soaps. It also engages in the plantation of palm oil and sugarcane. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Tembaga Mulia Semanan Tbk
summary: PT Tembaga Mulia Semanan Tbk manufactures, sells, and exports copper and aluminum rods and wires in Indonesia and internationally. The company's Copper Rod and Wire segment engages in the production of copper rods and wires, as well as copper nuggets. Its Aluminum Rod segment produces EC grade rods, alloy rods, and TAL rods. The company was incorporated in 1977 and is based in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.

name: PT. Mandom Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT. Mandom Indonesia Tbk manufactures and sells cosmetics and other products in Indonesia. It offers hair care, skin care and make-up, body care, and face care products, as well as perfumes, cleansing materials, and plastic containers. The company markets its products under the GATSBY, PIXY, PUCELLE, MIRATONE, LUCIDO-L, MANDOM, Tancho, JOHNNY ANDREAN, SPALDING, GLAZELLE de Pucelle, Color Comm., Fresh n fresh, LOVILLEA, and STYLE UP brands. It sells its products in the United Arab Emirates, Malaysia, Japan, Thailand, the Philippines, Singapore, Korea, Vietnam, Hongkong, India, and Taiwan. The company was formerly known as PT Tancho Indonesia and changed its name to PT. Mandom Indonesia Tbk in 2001. The company was incorporated in 1969 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT. Mandom Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Mandom Corporation.

name: PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk
summary: PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk provides sea transport and logistics services in Indonesia. It primarily offers vessel charter and good freight services. The company also provides barging, long hauling, transshipment, oil barge, and agency services, as well as mooring man and oil spill response team services. PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Sari Nusantara Gemilang.

name: PT Tridomain Performance Materials Tbk
summary: PT Tridomain Performance Materials Tbk manufactures and sells high performance specialty materials in Indonesia. It offers waterbased resins, solvent-based coating resins, and unsaturated polyester resins, as well as plasticizers and acrylamides. The company's products are used in infrastructure, construction, automotive, environmental, and manufacturing industries. It also operates in the Asia Pacific, the Middle East, Australia, and New Zealand. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Tridomain Performance Materials Tbk is a subsidiary of DH Corporation Ltd.

name: PT Dana Brata Luhur
summary: PT Dana Brata Luhur Tbk, a coal logistic company, provides pit to port coal hauling services in Indonesia. The company offers mining infrastructure covering haul roads, provision of stockpile areas, and operation of coal terminals. It also operates a private port for coal loading and blending. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Dana Brata Luhur Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Prima Mineral Utama.

name: PT Telefast Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Telefast Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides telecommunication products and digital platform services in Indonesia. The company operates through Digital Products and Digital Services segments. The company provides logistic services, including first mile and last mile, drop point, middle mile, and digital logistics services; and Fastpoint, an express business with a container concept that provides SiCepat Ekspres drop point network services. It offers human resource services comprising manpower supply solution; and HR-KU, a human resources information system that provides human resource management services, including attendance, leave, reimbursement, TAS, employee database and information, internal bulletin, and digital store module. In addition, the company provides telecommunication and mechanical, electrical, and consulting services; operates trading, land transportation, tourism, and logistics businesses; provision of information technology and other computer services; and vehicle rental activities, as well as industrial, agriculture, workshop, agency, and printing services. PT Telefast Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2008 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Tifico Fiber Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Tifico Fiber Indonesia Tbk engages in the production and sale of polyester products in Indonesia, Japan, Thailand, the United States, China, Germany, and internationally. The company operates through Polyester Chip, Polyester Staple Fiber, Polyester Filament Yarn, and RCL segments. It also exports its products. PT Tifico Fiber Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.

name: PT Tigaraksa Satria Tbk
summary: PT Tigaraksa Satria Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the sale and distribution of various consumer products in Indonesia. It operates through Food and Consumer Products, Gas (LPG) and Other Kitchen Appliances, and Books segments. The company sells and distributes food products and consumer products; and educational products, as well as produces powdered milk. It also manufactures and distributes gas stoves; and distributes blenders and rice cookers, as well as offers gas refill services for households. The company offers its products to wholesalers, agents and sub distributors, general trade, medical outlets, hypermarkets, convenient stores, supermarkets, and minimarkets. PT Tigaraksa Satria Tbk was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT. Terregra Asia Energy Tbk
summary: PT. Terregra Asia Energy Tbk focuses on developing, building, and operating renewable energy projects in Indonesia. The company operates through four segments: Rent, Hydro Power, Solar Power, and Trading segments. It is involved in developing hydro and solar power projects. The company was formerly known as PT. Mitra Megatama Perkasa and changed its name to PT. Terregra Asia Energy Tbk in 2016. PT. Terregra Asia Energy Tbk was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.
industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers

name: PT KDB Tifa Finance Tbk
summary: PT KDB Tifa Finance Tbk engages in the investment financing, working capital financing, and multipurpose financing businesses in Indonesia. It operates in four segments: Finance Lease, Multipurpose Financing, Factoring, and Operating Lease. It also offers sharia financing. The company was formerly known as PT Tifa Finance Tbk and changed its name to PT KDB Tifa Finance Tbk in September 2020. PT KDB Tifa Finance Tbk was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. As of September 8, 2020, PT KDB Tifa Finance Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Korea Development Bank.

name: PT TIMAH Tbk
summary: PT TIMAH Tbk engages in tin mining and smelting operations in Indonesia. The company operates through Tin Mining, Industry, Construction, Coal Mining, and Other segments. It offers Banka tin, Mentok tin, Banka low lead, and Kundur tin, as well as tin alloy, solder, and chemical products; and non-tin products, such as coal, aluminum, nickel, gold, and bauxite. The company is also involved in the provision of workshop, construction, shipping dockyard, property, health, transportation, engineering and ship repair, and marketing agency services, as well as in agriculture and trading activities. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Bangka, Indonesia. As of July 14, 2020, PT TIMAH Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Indonesia Asahan Aluminium (Persero).

name: PT Tira Austenite Tbk
summary: PT Tira Austenite Tbk engages in the trading and manufacture of technical products primarily in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Trading and Distribution of Technical Products; Welding and Molding; and Distribution of Industrial Gases. The company sells various steel products, including machinery steel used for the making of shaft, gear, and other machine parts; and stainless and tool steel products, as well as wear resistant steel products for heavy equipment, liner plate, crusher, and other applications. It also provides medical gases, including anaerobic atmosphere mixtures, blood gas mixtures, breathing air, helium, and lung diffusion gas mixtures; and specialty gases, such as analytical instrumentation mixtures, chemical process gases, emission calibration gases, environmental compliance mixtures, gas mixtures, high purity gas products, hydrocarbon calibration standards, laser gas mixtures, rare gases, and ultra-high purity gas products. In addition, the company offers industrial gases, such as argon, carbon dioxide, nitrogen, oxygen, and hydrogen; fuel gases, including acetylene, LPG, and propane; high-pressure cylinder gases; liquid cylinders for gas or liquid service; and shielding gases. Further, it manufactures bronze casting products under the ALPHABRONZE name; welding electrode products under the name of MG and STELEC; and electronic components, as well as trades in steel. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Tira Austenite Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Widjajatunggal Sejahtera.

name: PT Tirta Mahakam Resources Tbk
summary: PT Tirta Mahakam Resources Tbk manufactures and sells plywood and related wood products in Indonesia. The company offers general and polyester plywood, blockboard polyester, and floorbase products, as well as structured panels and blockboards. It also exports its products to the United States, Japan, and Europe. The company was formerly known as PT Tirta Mahakam Plywood Industry. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Tirta Mahakam Resources Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Harita Jayaraya.

name: PT Pabrik Kertas Tjiwi Kimia Tbk
summary: PT Pabrik Kertas Tjiwi Kimia Tbk manufactures and sells paper products in Indonesia. The company operates through two segments, Cultural Paper Products, and Industrial Paper Products and Other. It provides printing and writing, wood free, photocopy, and carbonless papers; and specialty products, such as greaseproof, kraft, and drawing papers, as well as brief cards. The company also offers converting products, which include stationery products, such as exercise books/saddle stitcheads, pads, loose leaf papers, hard cover books, spirals, and binding books; office products comprising envelopes, register rolls, plotters, and computer forms; and shopping bag and packaging products, as well as drawing books, fancy stationery, continuous forms, file folders, and other products. In addition, it provides carton boxes; and chemical products consisting of sodium hypochlorite, hydrochloride acid, chlorine liquid, caporite, calcium chloride, and caustic soda liquid and flake products for various industrial sectors, including water treatment, soap industry, wastewater treatment, etc. The company also exports its products to other Asian countries, Africa, the Middle East, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Pabrik Kertas Tjiwi Kimia Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Purinusa Ekapersada.

name: Perusahaan Perseroan (Persero) PT Telekomunikasi Indonesia Tbk
summary: Perusahaan Perseroan (Persero) PT Telekomunikasi Indonesia Tbk provides information and communications technology, and telecommunications network services worldwide. The company operates through Mobile, Consumer, Enterprise, Wholesale and International Business, and Other segments. The Mobile segment offers mobile voice, SMS, mobile broadband, and value added services. The Consumer segment provides fixed wireline, pay TV, and internet services; and other telecommunication services to home customers. The Enterprise segment offers end-to-end solution to corporate and institutions. The Wholesale and International Business segment provides interconnection services, broadband access, information technology services, data, and internet services to other licensed operator and institutions. The Other segment offers digital content products, big data, business-to-business commerce, and financial services to individual and corporate customers. The company also engages in leasing of towers, and provision of digital support and other telecommunication services; provision of consultation service of hardware, software, data center, and internet exchange, as well as multimedia portal services; business management consulting; property development and management; trading service related to telecommunication, information, multimedia technology, entertainment, and investment services; and digital content exchange hub services. The company was founded in 1884 and is headquartered in Bandung, Indonesia. Perusahaan Perseroan (Persero) PT Telekomunikasi Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Danantara Asset Management (Persero).

name: PT Temas Tbk.
summary: PT Temas Tbk. provides sea transportation services in Indonesia and internationally. It transports commodities, such as rice, flour, sugar, cement, and other general cargoes. The company also provides shipping agency services for container, break bulk, general cargo, bulk, ro ro, tanker, and other vessels; and shipping management, logistic, and stevedoring services. In addition, it offers container depot management services, such as stuffing and stripping, container repair, container cleaning that has been returned by customer, and rental of the container handling equipment; and leases containers. The company was formerly known as PT Pelayaran Tempuran Emas Tbk and changed its name to PT Temas Tbk. in August 2019. PT Temas Tbk. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in North Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Tempo Inti Media Tbk
summary: PT Tempo Inti Media Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the publishing business in Indonesia. The company is also involved in event convention organizer; publishing press; paper trading; building and transport management; buying and selling of digital newspaper, magazine, and media; training, data processing, and research and consultancy; education; multimedia and creative house; television broadcasting; and industrial general trading activities. PT Tempo Inti Media Tbk was founded in 1971 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Trimuda Nuansa Citra Tbk
summary: PT Trimuda Nuansa Citra Tbk provides air courier services with door to door services under the Garuda Express Delivery brand name in Indonesia. It offers domestic and international courier and cargo services for the delivery of general goods, dangerous goods, medical goods, valuable goods, valuable documents, and shipping using refrigerated trucks. The company also offers freight forwarding and commercial post services, as well as rail, land, sea, and air transportation management services. PT Trimuda Nuansa Citra Tbk was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk
summary: PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk, through its subsidiaries, engages in the coal mining, palm oil plantation, and power generation businesses in Indonesia and internationally. It owns interests in the Adimitra Baratama Nusantara mine covering an area of 2,990 hectares; the Trisensa Mineral Utama that covers an area of 3,414 hectares; and the Indomining mine covering an area of 683 hectares situated in Sangasanga, Kutai Kartanegara, East Kalimantan. The company also trades in coal. In addition, it has palm oil cultivation area totaling 8,633 hectares in Muara Jawa, Sangasanga, and Loa Janan District, Kutai Kartanegara Regency, East Kalimantan; and operates as an independent power producer. The company was formerly known as PT Toba Bara Sejahtra Tbk. PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk is a subsidiary of Highland Strategic Holdings Pte. Ltd.

name: PT Totalindo Eka Persada Tbk
summary: PT Totalindo Eka Persada Tbk operates as a construction company in Indonesia. The company engages in the construction of apartments, hotels, shopping malls, factories, superblocks, and commercial buildings. It also constructs public vertical housing projects, as well as public facilities, such as schools, religious buildings, toll roads, and bridges; and develops real estate properties. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Totalindo Eka Persada Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Totalindo Investama Persada.

name: PT Total Bangun Persada Tbk
summary: PT Total Bangun Persada Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides construction and other related services primarily in Indonesia. It operates through Construction, and Rental and Others divisions. The company undertakes construction of education, office and religious buildings, high rise residential buildings, hospitals, shopping centers, hotels, utilities, and industrial projects. PT Total Bangun Persada Tbk also provides equipment rental and installation services. The company was founded in 1970 and is based in West Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Total Bangun Persada Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Total Inti Persada.

name: PT Surya Toto Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Surya Toto Indonesia Tbk manufactures and sells sanitary, fittings, kitchen systems, and other related products in Indonesia and internationally. It operates through the Sanitary, Fittings, Kitchen systems, and Electrical Appliances and Accessories segments. The company offers neorest; washlet; toilet, lavatory, urinal, bidet, bathtub, sink; automatic, shower and bath, shower spray, faucet, and accessories, such as robe hook, floor drain, door handle, shelf, and tumbler holder; and supplementary parts, including stop valve and flexible hose. It sells its products under the TOTO brand. The company also offers supporting activities such as machinery and machine tools for metalworking, repair of machinery for special purposes, and calibration/metrology services. PT Surya Toto Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1977 and is based in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.

name: PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk.
summary: PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk., through its subsidiary, PT Profesional Telekomunikasi Indonesia, owns and operates telecommunication towers for wireless operators in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Tower Rental; Very Small Aperture Terminal (VSAT) Services; and Metropolitan Wireless Fiber Optic and Internet. The company leases space at its multi-tenant tower for wireless operators under long term lease agreements; and acts as a closed fixed network provider with VSAT and fiber optic. It owns and operates approximately 19,319 towers. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Kudus, Indonesia. PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk. is a subsidiary of PT Sapta Adhikari Investama.

name: PT Sunindo Adipersada Tbk
summary: PT Sunindo Adipersada Tbk manufactures and sells toys in Indonesia. The company also exports its products. PT Sunindo Adipersada Tbk was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Bogor, Indonesia.

name: PT. Chandra Asri Petrochemical Tbk
summary: PT. Chandra Asri Petrochemical Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an integrated petrochemical company in Indonesia and Singapore. It operates through Olefin; Polyolefin; Styrene Monomer; Butadiene; Methyl Tertiary Butyl Ethe; and Tanks and Jetty Rental segments. The company offers olefins, such as ethylene, propylene, mixed C4, pyrolysis gasoline, and pyrolysis fuel oil. It also provides polyethylene products, including linear low density and high density polyethylene under the Asrene brand name used in films, injection molding, blow molding, pipe, and monofilament, as well as agriculture films and plastic packaging applications; and resin under the Grene brand name for environmental friendly shopping bags, compost bags, disposal bags, bags on roll, etc. In addition, the company offers polypropylene products, which consist of homopolymer, random copolymer, and impact copolymer under Trilene brand name used for use in flexible packaging, household and industrial appliances, yarn, non-woven bags, furniture, automotive, and electronic parts. Further, it provides styrene monomer that produces polystyrene, expanded polystyrene, styrene acrylonitrile, acrylonitrile butadiene styrene (ABS), styrene butadiene rubber (SBR), styrene butadiene latex (SBL), and unsaturated polyester resin for use in shoe soles, drinking cups, food containers, automotive and electronic parts, building block toys, and helmets; and butadiene for the production of ABS, SBL, SBR, and polybutadiene rubber used in rubber boots, rubber gloves, shoe soles, adhesives, and sealants. The company also exports its products. PT. Chandra Asri Petrochemical Tbk is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Trans Power Marine Tbk
summary: PT Trans Power Marine Tbk provides bulk cargo transportation and handling solutions in Indonesia and Southeast Asia. The company transports bulk commodities, such as iron sand, coal, wood pellets, gypsum, woodchips, clinker, sponge rotary kiln, etc. As of December 31, 2019, it operated a fleet of 74 units, including 38 tugboats, 33 barges, and 3 crane barges. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Trans Power Marine Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Dwitunggal Perkasa Mandiri.

name: PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk engages in securities brokerage and underwriting, and investment management activities in Indonesia. It is also involved in financial advisory and mutual fund activities. The company was formerly known as PT Trimegah Securities Tbk and changed its name to PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk in July 2016. PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Perintis Triniti Properti Tbk
summary: PT Perintis Triniti Properti Tbk engages in the real estate business in Indonesia. It purchases, sells, rents, and leases real estate, as well as sells land. The company develops and sells apartments, mixed use properties, office buildings, houses, shophouses, and other buildings. It also offers marketing services. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Tangerang Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Trisula International Tbk
summary: PT Trisula International Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, designs and manufactures garments in Indonesia. It operates in two segments, Garment and Retail. The Garment segment manufactures and markets casual wear, lifestyle clothing, golf clothing, executive office wear, and uniforms; and corporate garments and uniforms for a range of industry sectors, including banks, airlines, retail outlets, hotels, governments, schools, transportation entities, and hospitals. The Retail segment operates retail outlets; and distributes garments to department stores, retail outlets, and designer boutiques. The company markets its products primarily under the JOBB, Jack Nicklaus, Man Club, and G2000 brands. It owns and operates 300 outlets. The company also exports its products primarily to the United States, the United Kingdom, Australia, Japan, South Korea, Malaysia, and Singapore. In addition, PT Trisula International Tbk offers its products through jobb.co.id, g2000.co.id, and jacknicklaus.co.id Websites. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in West Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Trisula International Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Trisula Insan Tiara.

name: PT Transkon Jaya Tbk
summary: PT Transkon Jaya Tbk engages in the rental and lease without option rights for cars, buses, trucks, and others. The company rents light vehicles, light trucks and buses, manhauls, ambulance, service bodies, rescue vehicles, and other specialist vehicles. It also provides special vehicles with double and single cabin modification units for service units, palfinger cranes, heavy duty trays, drop side trays, and rescue units; and various accessories. The company serves mining, oil and gas, and construction industries. It also offers internet network, internet and communications, and IT and computer services.
