The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Balikpapan, Indonesia. PT Transkon Jaya Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Damai Investa Sukses.

name: PT Trias Sentosa Tbk
summary: PT Trias Sentosa Tbk engages in the manufacture and trading of plastic packaging materials in Indonesia Japan, rest of Asia, the United States, Australia, Europe, and internationally. The company manufactures and sells biaxially oriented polypropylene (BOPP) and biaxially oriented polyester (BOPET) films and plastics; and offers solutions of plastic packaging products. Its BOPP and BOPET products include printing and lamination, overwrap, anti-fog, matte, pearlized, white opaque, label, metallized, coated, heat sealable, and thermal film products. The company's products are used for food packaging; tobacco and box overwraps; anti-fog bags for vegetables, fresh fruits, and salad; paper look packaging and paper lamination; clear, white, and metallized label packaging; and ice cream, candy, and soap packaging. It is also involved in the investment, trading, import, export, distribution, and other activities. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Sidoarjo, Indonesia.

name: PT Guna Timur Raya Tbk
summary: PT Guna Timur Raya Tbk provides land transportation services for customers worldwide. It operates trucks. The company was formerly known as PT Timur Jaya and changed its name to PT Guna Timur Raya Tbk in July 1980. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Guna Timur Raya Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Guna Makmur Raya.

name: PT Trust Finance Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Trust Finance Indonesia Tbk provides financing services in Indonesia. The company provides finances to passenger and commercial vehicles, as well as heavy equipment, such as excavators, bulldozers, and others. It offers services through agents and distributors. The company was formerly known as PT KIA Asia Finance and changed its name to PT Trust Finance Indonesia Tbk in February 2002. PT Trust Finance Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Tempo Scan Pacific Tbk
summary: PT Tempo Scan Pacific Tbk engages in the pharmaceuticals, personal care and cosmetics, and distribution services businesses in Indonesia and internationally. It operates through three segments: Pharmaceuticals, Consumer Products and Cosmetics, and Distribution Services. The company is involved in the construction and rental of buildings; provision of warehousing, freight forwarding, advertising and promotion, research and development, computer systems, and distribution and marketing services; medical devices trading; and manufacture of food supplements, food and beverages, and plastic packaging, as well as consumer products, soaps, and household products. It sells its products under Bodrex, Vidoran, Hemaviton, Oskadon, Bodrexin, Neo rheumacyl, Oskadryl, Contrexyn, Zevit Grow, Wybert, Vitonal, Polaris, and Vitamin IPI brands. The company was formerly known as PT Scanchemie. PT Tempo Scan Pacific Tbk was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Tempo Scan Pacific Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Bogamulia Nagadi.

name: PT Asuransi Tugu Pratama Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Asuransi Tugu Pratama Indonesia Tbk engages in the general insurance, reinsurance, and sharia insurance businesses in Indonesia. It operates through General Insurance, Reinsurance, Rental and Related Business, and Others segments. The company offers corporate insurance services, such as energy, fire and property, satellite and aviation, engineering, liability, health, and miscellaneous; marine insurance services, including builder's risk, marine cargo, protection and indemnity, marine hull and machinery, marine war risks, marine operation all risks, marine hull loss of hire, and stock throughput; and credit and guarantee services comprising credit, surety, bank guarantee cons, and payment bond insurance services. It also provides retail insurance for houses, motorized vehicles, and persona safety. In addition, the company offers Sharia insurance services for business interruption, robbery, money, liability suit, fire, heavy equipment, accident, motorcycle, and car. Further, it provides real estate development and trading; brokerage and reinsurance consultancy; and risk management, surveyor, and valuation services. Additionally, it invests in mutual funds. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Asuransi Tugu Pratama Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Pertamina (Persero).

name: PT Tunas Ridean Tbk
summary: PT Tunas Ridean Tbk engages in the automotive dealership business in Indonesia. The company operates in three segments: Automotive, Rental Services, and Financial Services. It acts as a dealer for Toyota, BMW, Daihatsu, Isuzu, and Honda brands. The company also rents motor vehicles; and provides driver, cleaning, and auction services. PT Tunas Ridean Tbk was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Pakuan, Tbk
summary: PT Pakuan, Tbk. operates as a property developer in the residential and commercial sectors in Indonesia. It also manages Sawangan golf courses; and hotels and resorts. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Depok, Indonesia. PT Pakuan, Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Pt Sawangan Investasi Indonesia.

name: PT Uni-Charm Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Uni-Charm Indonesia Tbk operates in the sanitary napkin industry in Indonesia. It operates through two segments: Diapers and Non Diapers. The company engages in the manufacture and sale of sanitary napkin, night wing, panty liners, and baby diapers; and feminine care, baby care, wellness care, and pet care. It also offers non-woven and tissue papers; and trading services. The company serves its products through CHARM, MamyPoko, Lifree, Fitti Pants, Certainty, Silcot, CharmNap Urine Dry, Unicharm pet, and Kirey Care Wipes brand names. PT Uni-Charm Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Uni-Charm Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of Unicharm Corporation.

name: PT Damai Sejahtera Abadi Tbk
summary: PT Damai Sejahtera Abadi Tbk operates retail electronics store in Indonesia. It sells LED TVs, LCDs, plasmas, computers, laptops, office supplies, mobile phones, various gadgets, speakers, home theaters, digital cameras, kitchen electronic equipment, and household furniture. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Surabaya, Indonesia.

name: PT Ultrajaya Milk Industry & Trading Company Tbk
summary: PT Ultrajaya Milk Industry & Trading Company Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates in the food and beverage industry in Indonesia. The company operates in two segments, Beverages and Foods. It produces various beverages, such as milk, fruit juices, tea, traditional drinks, and health drinks; and sweetened condensed milk, powder milk, and tropical fruit juice concentrates. The company also offers milk products under the Ultra Milk and Ultra Mimi names; tea products under the Teh Kotak name; drinks and other health beverages under the Sari Kacang Ijo and Sari Asem names; and sweetened condensed milk under the Ultra Milk and Cap Sapi names. In addition, it provides freight and other services; and air and water management services, as well as engages in agriculture, dairy farm, and trading activities. Further, the company produces powder milk products through other parties for toll packing services. The company sells its products directly through retail outlets, food and beverages stores, kiosks, and its sales force; and indirectly through agents/distributors, minimarkets, supermarkets, and hypermarkets. It also exports its products. PT Ultrajaya Milk Industry & Trading Company Tbk was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Bandung, Indonesia.

name: PT Unggul Indah Cahaya Tbk
summary: PT Unggul Indah Cahaya Tbk manufactures and sells alkylbenzene chemicals as primary raw material for the production of detergents in Indonesia. The company operates in two segments, Chemicals and Real Estate. It offers linear alkylbenzene and branched alkylbenzene, as well as by-products, such as heavy and light alkylate. The company also manufactures and distributes active detergents of linear alkylbenzene sulfonic acid and sodium lauryl ether sulfate, sodium tripolyphosphate, and phosphate and surfactant. It exports its products to Australia, France, Germany, Japan, Singapore, Vietnam, and the United States. In addition, the company operates as a real estate developer; engages in trading and investment activities; and retails consumer products. PT Unggul Indah Cahaya Tbk was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Ulima Nitra Tbk
summary: PT Ulima Nitra Tbk offers mining services, truck and heavy equipment rental, construction services, and others. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Palembang, Indonesia.

name: PT Bakrie Sumatera Plantations Tbk
summary: PT Bakrie Sumatera Plantations Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the plantation, processing, and trading of agricultural and industrial products in Indonesia. The company operates in three segments: Palm Oil and Derivatives, Rubber, and Oleochemical. The Palm Oil and Derivatives segment processes, markets, and sells palm oil, as well as develops and maintains palm oil. Its palm oil derivative products and palm kernel oil are used in food and non-food industries, including cooking oil, margarine, ice creams, soaps and detergents, animal feeds, cosmetics, industrial lubricants, and bio-fuels. The Rubber segment processes, markets, and sells rubber products for use in footwear, gloves, contraceptives, and other industries, as well as develops and maintains rubber. The Oleochemical segment processes, markets, and sells oleochemicals that are used as raw materials for various fast moving consumer goods. The company also provides financial services for issuing bonds; and industrial estate management services, as well as processes fatty acids and distillate, fatty alcohols, glycerin, and palm stearin and olein. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as United Sumatera Plantations and changed its name to PT Bakrie Sumatera Plantations Tbk in 1991. PT Bakrie Sumatera Plantations Tbk was founded in 1911 and is headquartered in Kisaran, Indonesia.

name: PT United Tractors Tbk
summary: PT United Tractors Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, sells and rents heavy equipment in Indonesia. The company operates through five segments: Construction Machinery, Mining Contracting, Coal Mining, Gold Mining, and Construction Industry. The company distributes heavy equipment and spare-parts under the Komatsu, UD Trucks, Scania, Bomag, and Tadano names to mining, plantation, construction, and forestry sectors, as well as for transportation; and offers services in the areas of non-destructive test, full maintenance contract, UT PAP service, machine inspection program, service call, workshop service, tire management system, pit stop management service, fabrication and remanufacturing cylinder, and UT remanufacturing. It also transports coal through river; and distributes tractors, generators, forklifts, and mini excavators, as well as sells commodity parts, as well as operates mini hydro power plant located in Banjarnegara, Central Java. In addition, the company offers mining services that supports coal companies, such as mining design and implementation, preliminary assessment and feasibility studies, construction of infrastructure and plant, removal of overburden and waste, commercial exploitation, expansion of mine/plant, reclamation and revegetation, and transshipment and marketing, as well as owns interests in various coal mine concessions with total estimated coal reserves of 395 million tons. Further, it engages in the engineering, planning, assembling, and manufacturing components of machinery, tools, parts, and heavy equipment; provision of vessel construction and related repair services; provision of vessel charter and shipping services; construction and concrete product businesses; operating power plants; gold mining business; and fishery business. The company was founded in 1972 and is based in Jakarta Timur, Indonesia. PT United Tractors Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Astra International Tbk.

name: PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk manufactures, markets, and distributes consumer goods in Indonesia. The company operates in two segments: Home and Personal Care; and Foods and Refreshment. It offers soaps, detergents, dairy based foods, ice creams, cosmetic products, tea-based beverages, and fruit juices. The company provides its products under the Axe, Bango, Buavita, Cif, Citra, Clear, Clear Men, Close Up, Cornetto, Dove, Feast, Feast, Glow & Lovely, Jawara, Knorr, Lifebuoy, Lipton, Love Beauty & Planet, Lux, Magnum, Molto, Paddle Pop, Pepsodent, Pond's, Pond's Men, Populaire, Rexona, Rinso, Royco, SariWangi, Seru, Simple, St. Ives, Suave, Sunlight, Sunsilk, Superpell, TRESemmé, The Vegetarian Butcher, Unilever Professional, Vaseline Men, Viennetta, Vixal, Wall's, Wipol, Zwitsalm, and other brands. It also leases office space. PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1933 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Unilever Indonesia Holding B.V.

name: PT Urban Jakarta Propertindo Tbk
summary: PT Urban Jakarta Propertindo Tbk engages in the property development activities in Indonesia. It develops and/or manages office areas, shopping centers, and apartments that are integrated directly with mass transportation. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Urban Jakarta Propertindo Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Nusa Wijaya Propertindo.

name: PT Victoria Care Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Victoria Care Indonesia Tbk manufactures and sells cosmetics and toiletries in Indonesia and internationally. It operates in three segments: Personal Care and Antiseptic, Hair Care, and Others. The Personal Care and Antiseptic segment offers skincare creams and lotions, makeup, and body care products, such as body scrubs, hand and body soaps, perfumes, and deodorants; and antiseptic products, including antiseptic liquids and gels, antiseptic soaps, cleaning fluids, disinfectant liquids and sprays, and other products. It also provides facial masks, facial cotton, eyebrow pencils, lip creams, serums, hand sanitizers, and mouthwash. The Hair Care segment offers shampoo, hair mask, hair coloring, hair curling, and straightening agents, as well as other products related to hair care and treatments. Its Others segment provides coffee beans and powder, souvenirs, and snacks. In addition, it engages in the wholesale trading of pharmaceutical and medical laboratory equipment. The company sells its products under the Miranda, Herborist, Victoria, Nuface, Creative Beauty Dazzle Professional, Secret Clean, Sixsence, and Bath & Buff brands. It exports its products to Japan, China, Korea, Malaysia, the Philippines, Brunei Darussalam, and Hong Kong. PT Victoria Care Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.

name: PT Victoria Investama Tbk
summary: PT Victoria Investama Tbk, through its subsidiaries, provides financial services in Indonesia. It offers commercial banking products and services, which includes saving and current accounts, deposits, and investment products; and loan products, which include consumer and production credit. The company also operates as a security broker and underwriter for individual client, and local and foreign business entities; and manages securities and securities products, such as stocks, bonds, and other assets, including property. In addition, it offers general insurance products, such as assurance of property, motorized vehicles, personal accidents, transportation, engineering, money, liability, and boat frame to multi finance companies, banks, local government, state-owned enterprises, private companies, and individuals. Further, the company provides corporate finance and advisory management services, as well as act as a fund arranger. The company was formerly known as PT Victoria Sekuritas and changed its name to PT Victoria Investama Tbk in 2012. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Victoria Investama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Gratamulia Pratama.

name: PT Victoria Insurance Tbk
summary: PT Victoria Insurance Tbk provides general insurance products and services in Indonesia. The company offers fire, motor vehicle, marine transportation, engineering, surety bond, personal accident, health, hull, liability, property, and freight insurance products. It serves finance, banking, state-owned enterprise, and private and individual customers. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Victoria Insurance Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Victoria Investama Tbk.

name: PT Visi Media Asia Tbk
summary: PT Visi Media Asia Tbk operates as an integrated convergent media company in Indonesia. It operates through Advertisement and Non-Advertisement segments. The company operates tvOne, a news and sports television station; ANTV, which provides entertainment and lifestyle content, such as drama, comedy, animation, and other general entertainment programs for families and children; viva.co.id, an online news and entertainment portal; and Viva and tvOneConnect applications to access and engage with tvOne content. It also offers trading and business management consultancy services; office rental, property management, and other services; internet advertising and website services; multimedia and telecommunication services; general private television broadcasting services; television broadcasting industry services; and production house services. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Visi Media Asia Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Bakrie Global Ventura.

name: PT Voksel Electric Tbk
summary: PT Voksel Electric Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells power, telecommunication, and fiber optic cables in Indonesia. It operates through five segments: Power Cable, Fiber Optic Cable, Copper Wire Cable, Contractor Service, and Trading. The company provides bare copper conductors and bare aluminum conductors; and power and control cables, such as high and medium voltage submarine cables, low voltage cross linked polyethylene insulated cable, polyethylene insulated cables, polyvinyl chloride insulated cables, fire resistance cables, flame retardant cables, control and instrument cables, and sheath halogen free cables. It also offers optical fiber cables, which include all dielectric self supporting cables, aerial and duct cables, armor/buried cables, fibre To The Home (FTTH) and Single Core Per Tube (SCPT) cables, air blowing micro duct cables, submarine fiber optic cables, and optical ground wires, as well as supplies free market cables to contractors and distributors. In addition, the company is involved in the general trading, and development and services business; and operates as a general contractor. Further, it exports its products. PT Voksel Electric Tbk was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT. Verena Multi Finance Tbk
summary: PT. Verena Multi Finance Tbk provides consumer finance and leasing services to individuals and financial institutions in Indonesia. The company offers financing for new and used cars; and investment and working capital financing services, as well as financial leasing for heavy equipment and production machines. It operates through 21 branches in Bandung, Bogor, Cikarang, Jakarta, Makassar, Depok, Malang, Medan, Palembang, Pekanbaru, Samarinda, Semarang, Serang, Surabaya, and Tangerang cities. The company was formerly known as PT. Verena Oto Finance Tbk and changed its name to PT. Verena Multi Finance Tbk in January 2011. PT. Verena Multi Finance Tbk was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. PT. Verena Multi Finance Tbk is a subsidiary of Mizuho Leasing Company, Limited

name: PT Wahana Pronatural Tbk
summary: PT Wahana Pronatural Tbk trades in agriculture and marine products in Indonesia. The company operates through two segments, Sales Agrobisnis Product and Candy. It trades in dried seaweeds, cashew nut, rice, corn, coffee, and soybeans. The company also manufactures and sells candies under various brands. In addition, it engages in the agricultural products, coffee and mining commodities, industrial, transportation, and printing activities; and general contracting business. The company was formerly known as PT Wahana Phonix Mandiri and changed its name to PT Wahana Pronatural Tbk in June 2012. PT Wahana Pronatural Tbk was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia.

name: PT Wijaya Karya Bangunan Gedung Tbk.
summary: PT Wijaya Karya Bangunan Gedung Tbk provides building construction services in Indonesia. The company offers general civil construction services, such as foundation and structural work, mechanical work, electrical, plumbing, lighting, and architecture, as well as interior and exterior work, including landscape and hardscape work. It also provides precast blocks, precast columns, hollow core slab, and precast concrete fa√É¬ßade. The company constructs academic facilities, airports, apartments, commercial facilities, hospitals, hotels, offices, and sports facilities. It serves governments and private sectors. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Wijaya Karya Bangunan Gedung Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk.

name: PT WEHA Transportasi Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT WEHA Transportasi Indonesia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides passenger transportation services in Indonesia. It operates in three segments: Passenger Transportation Services, Inter-Cities Transportation Services, and Other Services. The company manages integrated land transportation services, including airport handling, wedding, employee shuttle, MICE transportation, and school bus transportation services. It also provides bus chartering; intercity shuttle and package delivery services; public transportation; car rental; and tour services, including open and private trips. The company serves customers in the oil and gas, banking, telecommunications, tourism, and other industries. The company was formerly known as PT Panorama Transportasi Tbk and changed its name to PT WEHA Transportasi Indonesia Tbk in June 2015. PT WEHA Transportasi Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT WEHA Transportasi Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk.

name: Pt Wicaksana Overseas International Tbk
summary: Pt Wicaksana Overseas International Tbk engages in the distribution and trading of food, beverage, and other products in Indonesia. It operates through two segments, Distribution and Trading Centre. The company also offers snacks, beverages, milk powder, instant noodles, personal care products, cosmetics, medicine, household products, cooking oil, and plastic and electrical materials, as well as patient, commercial, and regulatory support services. It operates a network of 46 distribution centers. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in North Jakarta, Indonesia. Pt Wicaksana Overseas International Tbk is a subsidiary of DKSH Holding AG.

name: Waran Seri I Solusi Sinergi Dig
PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk
summary: PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk engages in the network infrastructure, application and software, out of home advertising media, and digital advertising businesses. The company operates fiber optic infrastructure, point of presence infrastructure, and base transceiver station towers. It also provides mobile apps, software integration, and web applications; and integrated advertising media in out of home environment. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Wismilak Inti Makmur Tbk
summary: PT Wismilak Inti Makmur Tbk manufactures and trades in cigarettes in Indonesia. It offers hand-rolled and machine-rolled cigarettes, cigars, and filter rods. The company markets and sells its products under the Galan Kretek, Wismilak Spesial, Wismilak Slim, Wismilak Diplomat, Diplomat Mild, Diplomat Mild Menthol, Wismilak Premium Cigars, and Wismilak Premium Seleccion brands. PT Wismilak Inti Makmur Tbk was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia.

name: PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk.
summary: PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk operates as an integrated construction company in Indonesia and internationally. The company's Infrastructure and Building segment provides civil construction services, such as general construction and infrastructure, including roads, bridges, harbors, airports, dams, and irrigation, as well as construction service on toll concession. Its Energy and Industrial Plant segment is involved in energy; engineering, procurement and construction; and field operations and maintenance of the power plants; and construction of oil and gas, petrochemical, cement, power, biofuel, fertilizer, and cooking oil plants. The company's Industry segment produces precast concrete products, such as PC polishing, PC piles, railway sleeper CP, bridge concrete, sheet pile, PC pipes, RC box culvert, marine structure CP, HCS, PC cylinder, and rigid pavement fabricated; steel fabrication by producing steel construction products, aluminum casting, steel frame structure, conveyor, pipe rack, telecommunication tower, electricity transmission tower, steel frame bridge, steel tank, silo, hopper, pressure vessel, welded beam, and other steel plate work and aluminum casting and plastic injection; and offers bitumen, including granular and extraction asphalt. It's Realty and Property segment engages in the real estate, property services, and other services, such as landed house, high-rise building, and industrial estate. PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Wintermar Offshore Marine Tbk
summary: PT Wintermar Offshore Marine Tbk supporting services for the offshore transportation for the oil and gas industry in Indonesia, Malaysia, Brunei, Myanmar, Thailand, India, Bangladesh, Papua New Guinea, Micronesia, the Middle East, and Africa. The company operates through three segments: Charter of Own Vessels, Charter of Third Party Vessels, and Other Services. Its fleet includes platform supply vessels, anchor handling tug supply vessels, anchor handling tug vessels, fast utility vessels, fast multi-purpose supply vessels, azimuth stern drive tugs, utility vessels, crew boats, landing crafts, oil barges, heavy load deck barges, and tug boats. The company also offers rig moving and anchor handling, crew change and rig supply, firefighting and emergency rescue, air diving and remotely operated vehicle support, pipe tailing support, seismic survey support services, as well as ship management and other services. It operates a fleet of approximately 48 offshore support vessels. The company was formerly known as PT Swakarya Mulia Shipping and changed its name to PT Wintermar Offshore Marine Tbk in September 2010. The company was founded in 1970 and is based in West Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk
summary: PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk engages in the integrated poultry business. It offers chicken feed, day old chicks, commercial broilers, eggs, and chicken meat. The company was formerly known as PT Pakan Makmur Perkasa and changed its name to PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk in June 2017. PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk was founded in 2015 and is based in East Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Wahana Ottomitra Multiartha Tbk
summary: PT Wahana Ottomitra Multiartha Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in consumer financing activities in Indonesia. The company offers investment financing and working capital financing services, such as finance lease, sale and leaseback, factoring, project financing, and infrastructure financing, as well as purchase payment by installments and other financing services. It also provides financing services for new and used two-wheeled and four-wheeled motor vehicles. The company was formerly known as PT Wahana Ometraco Multi Artha and changed its name to PT Wahana Ottomitra Multiartha Tbk in March 2000. The company was incorporated in 1982 and is headquartered in Jakarta Utara, Indonesia. PT Wahana Ottomitra Multiartha Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Bank Maybank Indonesia Tbk.

name: PT Integra Indocabinet Tbk
summary: PT Integra Indocabinet Tbk manufactures and sells wooden furniture and other wooden products in Indonesia. The company operates through Manufacturing, Forestry, and Trading segments. It offers indoor, reclaim wood, panel, set up, garden/outdoor, and industrial and natural fiber furniture; building components, door products, and solid and fingerjoint laminated boards; and furniture for hotel, apartment, and school projects. The company also holds forest concession rights. It exports its products to the United States, Asia, Australia, Africa, and Europe. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Sidoarjo, Indonesia. PT Integra Indocabinet Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Integra Indo Lestari.

name: PT Ginting Jaya Energi Tbk
summary: PT Ginting Jaya Energi Tbk, an oil and gas contracting company, engages in supporting oil and gas operations in Indonesia. The company provides drilling well operation, workover, and well services. It also offers rig rental services, as well as sells spare parts. The company is based in Palembang, Indonesia.

name: PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk
summary: PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk manufactures precast, ready mix concrete, and quarry. It operates through three segments: Precast, Ready Mix, and Construction Service. The company provides girders, spun and square piles, concrete barriers, U-gutter, U-ditch, box culverts, diaphragm wall, spider web foundation, CCSP and FCSP, pier head precast, electric pole, railway sleeper, sprigWP, RC pipe, and tetrapod products, as well as full, half, deck, and voided slabs. It also offers supporting services comprising engineering, installation, piling, construction, and post-tensioning services. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Jakarta Timur, Indonesia. PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk.

name: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk
summary: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the engineering, procurement, and construction works in Indonesia. It constructs building projects, transportation facilities, and water resources and energy projects; invests in various toll roads; and operates realty projects. The company is also involved in the hotel management business; building and equipment rental business; and production of precast concrete. In addition, it operates as an independent power producer; and develops real estate properties. PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Wijaya Karya Beton Tbk
summary: PT Wijaya Karya Beton Tbk manufactures and sells pre-stressed concrete (PC) products in Indonesia. The company offers concrete poles; piles, rounded hollow poles, poles hollow boxes, and cylinder piles; concrete pipe products; PC piles, such as spun, triangle, square hollow, and solid square piles; and railway concrete products, such as railway sleepers, poles, and bridges. It also provides bridge concrete products comprising girder, voided slab, double tee, full depth slab, and half slab concrete products; retaining wall concrete products, such as corrugated, flat prestressed, and flat reinforced concrete sheet piles; maritime concrete products including breakwater and dock components; hydro concrete products; building concrete products, which consists of precast walls, hollow core slabs, concrete slabs, columns, blocks, stairs, beams, and ladders; and ready-mix concrete. In addition, the company engages in the mining and production of split, screen material, etc.; engineering, production, and installation businesses; and provision of patent, inner bore system installation, gantry, and post tensioning services. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Wijaya Karya Beton Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk.

name: PT Yelooo Integra Datanet Tbk
summary: PT Yelooo Integra Datanet Tbk engages in leasing communication technology equipment in Indonesia. It also provides tour and travel services, as well as trades in communication equipment. The company was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia.

name: PT Yanaprima Hastapersada Tbk
summary: PT Yanaprima Hastapersada Tbk manufactures and exports polypropylene (PP) and polyethylene woven bags in Indonesia, rest of Asia, and internationally. The company operates through Plastic Bags, Cement Bags, Roll Sheet and Sandwich Sheet, and Others segments. It provides block-bottom bags for use in packaging cement, resins, and other bulk materials; PP woven bags for bulk material packaging; coated woven PP bags and woven PP bags laminated with kraft paper; and semi-finished products. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Yanaprima Hastapersada Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Hastagraha Bumipersada.

name: PT Yulie Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk
summary: PT Yulie Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk operates as a securities company in Indonesia. It involved in securities trading, underwriting, and other activities. The company was formerly known as PT Yulie Sekurindo Tbk and changed its name to PT Yulie Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk in May 2017. PT Yulie Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk was incorporated in 1989 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.

name: PT Zebra Nusantara Tbk
summary: PT Zebra Nusantara Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides taxi and other related services in Indonesia. It operates through two divisions, Taxi and Gas Fuel services. The company also sells gas fuels. The company was formerly known as PT. Zebra Taksi and changed its name to PT. Zebra Nusantara Tbk in May 1990. PT. Zebra Nusantara Tbk was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia. As of March 9, 2021, PT Zebra Nusantara Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Trinity Healthcare.

name: PT Kapuas Prima Coal Tbk
summary: PT Kapuas Prima Coal Tbk engages in the mining and trading businesses in Indonesia. The company primarily mines iron ore and galena; and produces zinc, lead, and silver ores. Its mining concession area comprises 5,569 hectares. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Jakarta Utara, Indonesia. PT Kapuas Prima Coal Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Sarana Inti Selaras.

name: PT Mega Perintis Tbk
summary: PT Mega Perintis Tbk manufactures, retails, and trades in men's fashion products and accessories in Indonesia. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

name: PT Zyrexindo Mandiri Buana Tbk
summary: PT Zyrexindo Mandiri Buana Tbk engages in the production, assembly, and marketing of mobile and computer related products in Indonesia. The company offers IT products, such as desktop and min PCs, and servers, as well as POS, kiosks, and digital signage products; and mobile computing devices, such as laptops, smartphones, feature phones, and tablet PCs. It also retails electronic products. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.
